Matthew18:31 Awo baddu banne bwe baakiraba ne banakuwala nnyo, ne bagenda bategeeza mukama we ebigambo bye balabye." 
Matthew18:32 “Awo mukama we n’atumya omuddu gwe yali asonyiye n’amugamba nti, ‘Oli muddu mubi nnyo. Nakusonyiye ebbanja eryo lyonna, kubanga wanneegayiridde," 
Matthew18:33 naye ggwe kyali tekikugwanira kusaasira muddu munno nga nange bwe nakusaasidde?’ 
Matthew18:34 Mukama we kyeyava asunguwala nnyo, n’amukwasa abaserikale bamusse mu kkomera okutuusa lw’alisasula ebbanja lyonna." 
Matthew18:35 “Kale ne Kitange ali mu ggulu bw’atyo bw’alibakola singa mmwe abooluganda temusonyiwa okuva mu mitima gyammwe.” 
Matthew19:1 Awo Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebigambo ebyo n’ava e Ggaliraaya n’ajja mu bitundu bya Buyudaaya okusukka emitala wa Yoludaani. 
Matthew19:2 Ekibiina kinene ne bamugoberera era n’awonya abalwadde baabwe. 
Matthew19:3 Abafalisaayo ne bajja gy’ali bamugezese nga bagamba nti, “Kikkirizibwa omusajja okugoba mukazi we olw’ensonga n’emu?”" 
Matthew19:4 Yesu n’abaddamu nti, “Temusomanga nti, ‘Okuva ku lubereberye Katonda yatonda omusajja n’omukazi,’" 
Matthew19:5 era nti, ‘Omusajja anaalekanga kitaawe ne nnyina, ne yeegatta ne mukazi we. Nabo banaabanga omuntu omu," 
Matthew19:6 nga tebakyali babiri naye omuntu omu.’ Noolwekyo Katonda be yagatta awamu, omuntu tabaawukanyanga.”" 
Matthew19:7 Ne bamubuuza nti, “Kale lwaki Musa yalagira nti omusajja bw’abanga agoba mukazi we amuwenga ebbaluwa ey’okumugoba?”" 
Matthew19:8 Yesu n’abaddamu nti, “Olw’obukakanyavu bw’emitima gyammwe, Musa kyeyava abakkiriza okugoba bakazi bammwe, naye nga okuva olubereberye tekyali bwe kityo." 
Matthew19:9 Era mbagamba nti omuntu yenna anaagobanga mukazi we okuggyako olw’obwenzi, n’amala awasa omulala, anaabanga ayenze, n’oyo anaawasanga oyo agobeddwa anaabanga ayenze.”" 
Matthew19:10 Abayigirizwa ne bamugamba nti, “Obanga bwe biri bwe bityo, ekisingako obulungi bwe butawasiza ddala!”" 
Matthew19:11 Yesu n’abaddamu nti, “Abantu bonna tebayinza kutegeera kigambo kino okuggyako abo Katonda b’akiwa." 
Matthew19:12 Kubanga abamu bazaalibwa nga tebasobola kuwasa abalala balaayibwa bantu bannaabwe ate abalala bagaana okuwasa ne beewaayo okukola omulimu ogw’obwakabaka obw’omu ggulu. Buli asobola okutegeera kino akitegeere.” 
Matthew19:13 Yesu ne bamuleetera abaana abato abasseeko emikono gye abawe n’omukisa. Naye abayigirizwa ne bajunga abaabaleeta. 
Matthew19:14 Naye Yesu n’agamba abayigirizwa be nti, “Mukkirize abaana abato bajje gye ndi so temubaziyiza, kubanga abafaanana ng’abo be bannannyini bwakabaka obw’omu ggulu.”" 
Matthew19:15 N’abassaako emikono n’abawa omukisa n’alyoka avaayo. 
Matthew19:16 Awo omuntu omu n’amusemberera n’amubuuza nti, “Omuyigiriza, nkole ki ekirungi okufuna obulamu obutaggwaawo?”" 
Matthew19:17 Yesu n’amuddamu nti, “Lwaki ombuuza ebikwata ku birungi? Omulungi ali omu, naye bw’obanga oyagala okuyingira mu bulamu, ggondera amateeka.”" 
Matthew19:18 N’amuddamu nti, “Ge galuwa?” Yesu n’amugamba nti, “ ‘Tottanga, toyendanga, tobbanga, towaayirizanga," 
Matthew19:19 ossangamu ekitiibwa kitaawo ne nnyoko era yagalanga muliraanwa wo nga bwe weeyagala wekka.’ ” 
Matthew19:20 Omuvubuka oyo n’amuddamu nti, “Ebyo byonna nabikwata dda, ate kiki ekimpeebuuseeko?”" 
Matthew19:21 Yesu n’amugamba nti, “Obanga oyagala okuba omutuukirivu genda otunde ebibyo, ensimbi ozigabire abaavu, kale oliba n’obugagga mu ggulu, olyoke ojje ongoberere.”" 
Matthew19:22 Naye omuvubuka bwe yawulira ebyo n’agenda ng’anakuwadde kubanga yali mugagga. 
Matthew19:23 Awo Yesu n’agamba abayigirizwa be nti, “Ddala ddala mbagamba nti, kizibu omugagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka obw’omu ggulu." 
Matthew19:24 Era mbategeeza nti kyangu eŋŋamira okuyita mu nnyindo y’empiso, okusinga omugagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda!”" 
Matthew19:25 Ebigambo ebyo abayigirizwa be ne bibeewuunyisa nnyo, n’okugamba ne bagamba nti, “Kale ani ayinza okulokolebwa?”" 
Matthew19:26 Yesu n’abatunuulira enkaliriza n’abagamba nti, “Eri abantu tekiyinzika. Naye Katonda, ayinza byonna.”" 
Matthew19:27 Awo Peetero n’abuuza Yesu nti, “Ffe twaleka byonna ne tukugoberera. Kale ffe tulifuna ki?”" 
Matthew19:28 Yesu n’amuddamu nti, “Ddala ddala mbagamba nti, Omwana w’Omuntu bw’alituula ku ntebe ye ey’ekitiibwa mu nsi empya, nammwe abangoberera mulituula ku ntebe ekkumi n’ebbiri nga mulamula ebika bya Isirayiri ekkumi n’ebibiri." 
Matthew19:29 Na buli muntu yenna eyaleka ennyumba, oba baganda be, oba bannyina, oba kitaawe oba nnyina, oba baana be, oba ttaka lye olw’erinnya lyange aliweebwa okwenkana emirundi kikumi, era alisikira obulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Matthew19:30 Bangi aboolubereberye, abaliba abooluvannyuma, n’ab’oluvannyuma ne baba aboolubereberye.”" 
Matthew20:1 Awo Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Obwakabaka obw’omu ggulu bufaanana ng’omuntu ssemaka, eyakeera mu makya n’apangisa abakozi okukola mu nnimiro ye ey’emizabbibu." 
Matthew20:2 N’alagaana n’abapakasi okubasasula omuwendo eddinaali emu emu, ze zaali ensimbi ez’olunaku olumu. N’abasindika mu nnimiro ye ey’emizabbibu." 
Matthew20:3 “Bwe waayitawo essaawa nga bbiri n’asanga abalala nga bayimiridde mu katale nga tebalina kye bakola," 
Matthew20:4 nabo n’abagamba nti, ‘Nammwe mugende mu nnimiro y’emizabbibu, era nnaabasasula empeera ebasaanira.’" 
Matthew20:5 Ne bagenda. “Ku ssaawa omukaaga ne ku mwenda n’asindikayo abalala mu ngeri y’emu. 
Matthew20:6 Essaawa nga ziweze nga kkumi n’emu n’asanga abalala nga bayimiridde awo, n’ababuuza nti, ‘Lwaki muyimiridde awo olunaku lwonna nga temulina kye mukola?’" 
Matthew20:7 “Ne bamuddamu nti, ‘Kubanga tetufunye atuwa mulimu.’ N’abagamba nti, ‘Nammwe mugende mukole mu nnimiro yange ey’emizabbibu.’" 
Matthew20:8 “Awo obudde nga buwungeera nannyini nnimiro n’alagira nampala ayite abakozi abawe empeera yaabwe ng’asookera ku b’oluvannyuma. 
Matthew20:9 “Abaatandika ku ssaawa ekkumi n’emu ne baweebwa eddinaali emu emu. 
Matthew20:10 Bali abaasookayo bwe bajja ne basuubira nti bo ze banaasasulwa zijja kusingako obungi. Naye nabo yabasasula omuwendo gwe gumu ogw’olunaku olumu nga bali. 
Matthew20:11 Bwe baagifuna ne beemulugunyiza nannyini nnimiro 
Matthew20:12 nga bagamba nti, ‘Bano abooluvannyuma baakoledde essaawa emu yokka naye lwaki obawadde empeera eyenkana eyaffe, ffe abaakoze okuva mu makya ne mu musana gw’omu tuntu?’" 
Matthew20:13 “Mukama waabwe kwe kuddamu omu ku bo nti, ‘Munnange si kubbye; bwe wabadde otandika okukola tetwalagaanye eddinaali emu?" 
Matthew20:14 Twala eddinaali yo ogende. Naye njagala n’ono asembyeyo okumuwa empeera y’emu nga gye nkuwadde. 
Matthew20:15 Siyinza kukozesa byange nga bwe njagala? Obuggya bukukutte kubanga ndi wa kisa?’ 
Matthew20:16 “Kale nno bwe kityo bwe kiriba abooluvannyuma ne baba aboolubereberye, n’aboolubereberye ne baba abooluvannyuma.”" 
Matthew20:17 Awo Yesu bwe yali ayambuka e Yerusaalemi n’atwala abayigirizwa be ekkumi n’ababiri, mu kyama. Bwe baali mu kkubo, n’abagamba nti," 
Matthew20:18 “Laba twambuka e Yerusaalemi, Omwana w’Omuntu aliweebwayo eri bakabona abakulu n’abannyonnyozi b’amateeka, bamusalire omusango ogw’okufa." 
Matthew20:19 Era balimuwaayo eri Abamawanga ne bamuduulira ne bamukuba, era balimukomerera ku musaalaba. Naye ku lunaku olwokusatu alizuukizibwa.”" 
Matthew20:20 Awo nnyina w’abaana ba Zebbedaayo, n’ajja eri Yesu ne batabani be bombi, n’amusinza ng’ayagala okubaako ky’amusaba." 
Matthew20:21 Yesu n’amubuuza nti, “Kiki ky’oyagala?” N’addamu nti, “Nsaba, mu bwakabaka bwo, abaana bange bano bombi batuule naawe omu ku mukono gwo ogwa ddyo n’omulala ku gwa kkono.”" 
Matthew20:22 Naye Yesu n’amuddamu nti, “Tomanyi ky’osaba. Muyinza okunywa ku kikompe nze kye ŋŋenda okunywako?” Ne baddamu nti, “Tuyinza.”" 
Matthew20:23 N’abagamba nti, “Weewaawo ekikompe mugenda kukinywako. Naye eky’okutuula ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo oba ogwa kkono nze sikirinaako buyinza. Ebifo ebyo byategekebwa dda Kitange.”" 
Matthew20:24 Abayigirizwa bali ekkumi bwe baawulira ebyo abooluganda ababiri bye baasaba, ne babanyiigira nnyo." 
Matthew20:25 Yesu kwe kubayita n’abagamba nti, “Mumanyi ng’abakulembeze b’abamawanga babazitoowereza embeera, n’abakulu baabwe babafuza lyanyi." 
Matthew20:26 Naye tekisaanye kuba bwe kityo mu mmwe. Buli ayagala okubeera omukulu mu mmwe, abeerenga muweereza wa banne." 
Matthew20:27 Na buli ayagala okuba omwami mu mmwe aweerezenga banne ng’omuddu waabwe. 
Matthew20:28 Mube nga Omwana w’Omuntu atajja kuweerezebwa wabula okuweereza, n’okuwaayo obulamu bwe ng’omutango okununula abangi.”" 
Matthew20:29 Awo Yesu n’abayigirizwa be bwe baali bava mu kibuga Yeriko, ekibiina kinene ne kimugoberera." 
Matthew20:30 Abazibe b’amaaso babiri abaali batudde ku mabbali g’ekkubo bwe baawulira nga Yesu ayita mu kkubo eryo, ne baleekaanira waggulu nnyo nga bakoowoola nti, “Ssebo, Omwana wa Dawudi, otusaasire!”" 
Matthew20:31 Ekibiina ne kibalagira okusirika, naye bo, ne beeyongera bweyongezi okukoowoolera waggulu nga boogera nti, “Ssebo, Omwana wa Dawudi, tusasire.”" 
Matthew20:32 Yesu bwe yabatuukako n’ayimirira n’ababuuza nti, “Mwagala mbakolere ki?”" 
Matthew20:33 Ne bamuddamu nti, “Mukama waffe, twagala otuzibule amaaso.”" 
Matthew20:34 Yesu n’abasaasira n’akwata ku maaso gaabwe amangwago ne gazibuka, ne bamugoberera." 
Matthew21:1 Awo Yesu n’abayigirizwa be bwe baali basemberera Yerusaalemi nga batuuse kumpi n’ekibuga Besufaage ku lusozi lwa Zeyituuni, Yesu n’atuma babiri ku bayigirizwa be." 
Matthew21:2 N’abagamba nti, “Mugende mu kibuga ekiri mu maaso, bwe munaaba mwakakiyingira mujja kulaba endogoyi ng’esibiddwa awo wamu n’omwana gwayo. Muzisumulule muzireete wano." 
Matthew21:3 Naye omuntu yenna bw’anaabaako ky’abagamba, mumuddamu nti, ‘Mukama waffe y’azeetaaga,’ amangwago ajja kuziweereza.”" 
Matthew21:4 Kino kyabaawo okutuukiriza ebigambo nnabbi bye yayogera nti," 
Matthew21:5 “Mubuulire omuwala wa Sayuuni nti, ‘Laba Kabaka wammwe ajja gye muli nga muwombeefu, nga yeebagadde omwana gw’endogoyi.’ ”" 
Matthew21:6 Awo abayigirizwa ababiri ne bagenda ne bakola nga Yesu bwe yabalagira. 
Matthew21:7 Ne baleeta endogoyi n’omwana gwayo, ne baaliirako eminagiro gyabwe ku ndogoyi, n’agyebagala." 
Matthew21:8 Abantu bangi ne baaliira engoye zaabwe mu luguudo n’abalala ne batema amatabi g’emiti ne bagaalira mu luguudo. 
Matthew21:9 Ebibiina ebyamukulembera, n’ebyo ebyamuva emabega ne bireekaana nti, “Ozaana Omwana wa Dawudi!” “Aweereddwa omukisa oyo ajja mu linnya lya Mukama.” “Ozaana waggulu ennyo!”" 
Matthew21:10 Awo Yesu bwe yayingira mu Yerusaalemi, ne wabaawo oluyoogaano mu kibuga kyonna nga beebuuza nti, “Ono ye ani?”" 
Matthew21:11 Abaali mu kibiina ne baddamu nti, “Ono ye Yesu Nnabbi ava mu Nazaaleesi eky’omu Ggaliraaya.”" 
Matthew21:12 Awo Yesu n’ayingira mu Yeekaalu n’agobamu abasuubuzi bonna n’avuunika emmeeza z’abaali bawaanyisa ensimbi n’entebe z’abaali batunda amayiba. 
Matthew21:13 N’abagamba nti, “Kyawandiikibwa nti, ‘Ennyumba yange eneeyitibwanga nnyumba ya kusabirangamu,’ naye mmwe mugifudde ‘empuku y’abanyazi.’ ”" 
Matthew21:14 Awo abazibe b’amaaso n’abalema ne bajja gy’ali mu Yeekaalu n’abawonya. 
Matthew21:15 Naye bakabona abakulu n’abannyonnyozi b’amateeka bwe baalaba eby’ekitalo bye yakola, n’abaana abato abaali mu Yeekaalu nga baleekaanira waggulu nti, “Ozaana Omwana wa Dawudi!” ne banyiiga." 
Matthew21:16 Ne bamubuuza nti, “Owulira bano bye bagamba?” Yesu n’abaddamu nti, “Mpulira. Temusomangako nti, “ ‘Abaana abato n’abawere abayonka balimutendereza!’ ”" 
Matthew21:17 N’abaviira, n’afuluma mu kibuga n’agenda e Besaniya, n’asula eyo." 
Matthew21:18 Awo enkeera bwe yali ng’addayo mu kibuga n’alumwa enjala," 
Matthew21:19 n’alengera omutiini ku mabbali g’ekkubo, n’agutuukako n’atasangako ttiini okuggyako amakoola ameereere. N’agugamba nti, “Toddangayo okubala ebibala.” Amangwago omuti ne guwotoka." 
Matthew21:20 Abayigirizwa bwe baakiraba ne beewuunya ne beebuuza nti, “Omutiini guwotose gutya amangu?”" 
Matthew21:21 Yesu n’abaddamu nti, “Ddala ddala mbagamba nti bw’oba n’okukkiriza nga tobuusabuusa, oyinza okukola ekiri nga kino n’ebisingawo. Oyinza n’okulagira olusozi luno nti, ‘Siguka ogwe mu nnyanja,’ ne kibaawo." 
Matthew21:22 Buli kye munaasabanga nga mukkiriza, munaakiweebwanga.”" 
Matthew21:23 Awo Yesu bwe yakomawo mu Yeekaalu bakabona abakulu n’abakulembeze b’Abayudaaya ne bajja gy’ali ne bamubuuza nti, “Buyinza ki obukukoza ebyo, era ani yakuwa obuyinza obwo?”" 
Matthew21:24 Yesu n’addamu nti, “Mumale okunziramu ekibuuzo kyange kino, nange ndyoke mbabuulire obuyinza bwe nkozesa bino." 
Matthew21:25 Okubatiza kwa Yokaana kwava wa? Kwava mu ggulu oba mu bantu?” Ne basooka ne boogeraganyaamu bokka na bokka nti, “Bwe tugamba nti, ‘Kwava mu ggulu,’ ajja kutubuuza nti, ‘Kale lwaki temwamukkiriza?’ " 
Matthew21:26 Ate bwe tunaagamba nti, ‘Kwava mu bantu,’ tutya ekibiina, kubanga bonna bamanyi nga Yokaana yali nnabbi.”" 
Matthew21:27 Bwe batyo ne baddamu nti, “Tetumanyi!” Yesu kwe kubaddamu nti, “Nange sijja kubabuulira obuyinza bwe nkozesa bino.”" 
Matthew21:28 “Kale mulowooza mutya ku kino? Waaliwo omusajja eyalina abaana be babiri, n’agamba omubereberye nti, ‘Genda okole mu nnimiro y’emizabbibu leero.’" 
Matthew21:29 “Omulenzi n’addamu nti, ‘ŋŋaanyi,’ naye oluvannyuma ne yeerowooza n’agenda." 
Matthew21:30 “Ate kitaabwe n’agenda eri omulala n’amugamba ekintu kye kimu. Naye ye n’addamu nti, ‘Nnaagenda mukama wange.’ Naye n’atagenda." 
Matthew21:31 “Kale, ku bombi aliwa eyagondera kitaawe?” Ne bamuddamu nti, “Omulenzi ow’olubereberye.” Awo Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Ddala ddala mbagamba nti, abasolooza b’omusolo ne bamalaaya balibasooka okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
Matthew21:32 Kubanga Yokaana yajja ng’abuulira ekkubo ery’obutuukirivu naye ne mutamukkiriza. Wabula abasolooza b’omusolo ne bamalaaya baamukkiriza, newaakubadde nga mwakiraba, oluvannyuma temwenenya kumukkiririzaamu.”" 
Matthew21:33 “Muwulirize olugero olulala. Waaliwo omusajja ssemaka eyalina emizabbibu, n’agyetoolooza olukomera, n’asimamu essogolero, n’azimbamu n’omunaala, n’agipangisa abalimi, n’agenda olugendo." 
Matthew21:34 Ekiseera ky’amakungula bwe kyatuuka, n’atuma abaddu be eri abalimi banone ebibala byamu." 
Matthew21:35 “Naye abalimi ne badda ku baddu be, omu ne bamukuba, n’omulala ne bamutta, n’omulala ne bamukasuukirira amayinja." 
Matthew21:36 Ate n’abatumira abaddu abalala nga bangiko okusinga abaasooka, era nabo ne babayisa mu ngeri y’emu nga bali abaasooka." 
Matthew21:37 Oluvannyuma n’abatumira mutabani we, ng’alowooza nti, ‘Bajja kumussaamu ekitiibwa.’" 
Matthew21:38 “Naye abalimi bwe baalaba omwana ng’ajja ne bateesa nti, ‘Ono y’agenda okusika, ka tumutte, ebyobusika bwe biriba byaffe!’" 
Matthew21:39 Bwe batyo ne bamufulumya ebweru w’ennimiro y’emizabbibu ne bamutta. 
Matthew21:40 Kale nannyini nnimiro y’emizabbibu bw’alikomawo alibakola atya?” 
Matthew21:41 Ne bamuddamu nti, “Abantu abo ababi bwe batyo alibazikiririza ddala, ennimiro y’emizabbibu n’agipangisa abalimi abalala abanaamuwanga ebibala mu ntuuko zaabyo.”" 
Matthew21:42 Awo Yesu n’ababuuza nti, “Temusomanga ku Kyawandiikibwa kino nti, “ ‘Ejjinja abazimbi lye baagaana lye lifuuse ejjinja ekkulu ery’oku nsonda. Kino kyava eri Mukama era kya kyewuunyo.’" 
Matthew21:43 “Kyenva mbagamba nti, Obwakabaka bwa Katonda bulibaggyibwako ne buweebwa eggwanga eribala ebibala byabwo." 
Matthew21:44 Oyo alyesitala n’agwa ku jjinja eryo, alibetentebwa, na buli gwe lirigwako lirimubetenta.”" 
Matthew21:45 Awo bakabona abakulu n’Abafalisaayo bwe baabiwulira ne bategeera nga Yesu bo b’ayogerako. 
Matthew21:46 Ne baagala bamukwate, naye ne batya ekibiina, kubanga abantu Yesu baamukkiriza, nga nnabbi." 
Matthew22:1 Yesu n’addamu n’ayogera nabo mu ngero ng’agamba nti," 
Matthew22:2 “Obwakabaka obw’omu ggulu bufaanana nga, kabaka eyategekera omwana we embaga ey’obugole." 
Matthew22:3 N’atuma abaddu be okuyita abaayitibwa ku mbaga, ne batayagala kujja." 
Matthew22:4 “Kabaka n’abatumira abaddu abalala babategeeze nti, ‘Mutegeeze abayite nti nteeseteese, ekijjulo, zisseddume zange n’ente ensavuwazze zittiddwa, era buli kimu kitegekeddwa. Mujje ku mbaga.’" 
Matthew22:5 “Naye ne batassaayo mwoyo, omu n’alaga mu nnimiro ye, omulala n’alaga mu bya busuubuzi bye." 
Matthew22:6 Abalala ne babakwata ne bababonyaabonya ne babatta. 
Matthew22:7 Awo Kabaka n’asunguwala, n’ayungula ekibinja ky’abaserikale n’azikiriza abatemu abo, n’ayokya ekibuga kyabwe." 
Matthew22:8 “Awo kabaka n’agamba abaddu be nti, ‘Ekijjulo ky’embaga kiteekeddwateekeddwa, naye abaayitibwa ne batasaanira." 
Matthew22:9 Noolwekyo mugende mu nguudo z’omu kibuga muyite abantu bonna be munaasangayo bajje ku mbaga.’ 
Matthew22:10 Abaddu bwe baagenda mu nguudo, ne bakuŋŋaanya buli gwe baasanga, ababi n’abalungi, ekisenge ky’embaga ne kijjula abagenyi." 
Matthew22:11 “Kabaka bwe yayingira okulaba abaali batudde ku mmeeza, n’alaba omusajja eyali tayambadde kyambalo kya mbaga." 
Matthew22:12 Kabaka n’amubuuza nti, ‘Munnange, oyingidde otya wano nga toyambadde kyambalo kya mbaga?’ Omusajja nga talina ky’addamu." 
Matthew22:13 “Awo kabaka n’alagira basajja be nti, ‘Mumusibe emikono n’amagulu mumukasuke ebweru mu kizikiza ekikutte be zigizigi, eri okukaaba n’okuluma obujiji.’" 
Matthew22:14 “Abayitibwa bangi, naye abalondemu batono.”" 
Matthew22:15 Awo Abafalisaayo ne bagenda ne bateesa engeri gye banaategamu Yesu bamukwase mu bigambo. 
Matthew22:16 Ne bamutumira abayigirizwa baabwe awamu n’Abakerodiyaani nga bagamba nti, “Omuyigiriza, tumanyi ng’oli mulungi, era oyigiriza mazima awatali kutya muntu yenna, kubanga tososola mu bantu." 
Matthew22:17 Kale tutegeeze, olowooza ekituufu kye kiri wa? Kituufu okuwa Kayisaali omusolo oba si kituufu?”" 
Matthew22:18 Naye Yesu bwe yamanya obutali butuukirivu bwabwe, n’abagamba nti, “Bannanfuusi mmwe, Lwaki mungezesa?" 
Matthew22:19 Kale, mundeetere wano ku nsimbi ze muweesa omusolo ndabe.” Ne bamuleetera eddinaali." 
Matthew22:20 N’ababuuza nti, “Kino ekifaananyi n’obuwandiike ebiriko by’ani?”" 
Matthew22:21 Ne bamuddamu nti, “Bya Kayisaali.” N’abagamba nti, “Kale ebya Kayisaali mubiwenga Kayisaali, n’ebya Katonda mubiwenga Katonda.”" 
Matthew22:22 Bwe baawulira ebigambo ebyo ne beewuunya ne bamuleka ne bagenda. 
Matthew22:23 Ku lunaku olwo lwe lumu, Abasaddukaayo, abagamba nti, “Tewali kuzuukira,” ne bajja eri Yesu, ne bamubuuza nti," 
Matthew22:24 “Omuyigiriza Musa yagamba nti, ‘Singa omusajja afa nga tazadde mwana, muganda w’omufu awase nnamwandu oyo azaalire muganda we abaana.’" 
Matthew22:25 Twalina abooluganda musanvu. Owooluganda ow’olubereberye n’awasa, kyokka n’afa nga tazadde mwana, bw’atyo mukazi we n’afumbirwa muganda we." 
Matthew22:26 Ekintu kye kimu ne kituuka ku wookubiri ne ku wookusatu, okutuusa ku w’omusanvu." 
Matthew22:27 Oluvannyuma n’omukazi oyo naye n’afa. 
Matthew22:28 Kale okuzuukira nga kutuuse omukazi oyo aliba muka ani ku abo omusanvu? Kubanga bonna abooluganda omusanvu yabafumbirwako.” 
Matthew22:29 Naye Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Olw’obutamanya byawandiikibwa n’obutategeera maanyi ga Katonda kyemuvudde mukyama." 
Matthew22:30 Kubanga mu kuzuukira teriiyo kuwasa wadde okufumbirwa, naye abantu bonna baba nga bamalayika mu ggulu." 
Matthew22:31 Naye ebikwata ku kuzuukira kw’abafu, temusomanga ku kigambo ekyayogerwa Katonda ng’agamba nti," 
Matthew22:32 ‘Nze, ndi Katonda wa Ibulayimu era ndi Katonda wa Isaaka era ndi Katonda wa Yakobo?’ Noolwekyo Katonda si Katonda wa bafu wabula Katonda wa balamu.”" 
Matthew22:33 Ebibiina ne biwuniikirira bwe baawulira okuyigiriza kwe. 
Matthew22:34 Abafalisaayo bwe baawulira nga Yesu Abasaddukaayo abamazeeko eby’okwogera, ne bakuŋŋaana." 
Matthew22:35 Omu ku bo eyali munnamateeka n’amubuuza ekibuuzo ng’amugezesa nti," 
Matthew22:36 “Omuyigiriza, tteeka ki erisinga obukulu mu mateeka.”" 
Matthew22:37 Yesu n’addamu nti, “ ‘Yagalanga Mukama Katonda wo n’omutima gwo gwonna, n’obulamu bwo bwonna, n’amagezi go gonna.’" 
Matthew22:38 Eryo ly’etteeka ery’olubereberye era lye Iisingira ddala obukulu. 
Matthew22:39 N’eryokubiri eririfaananako lye lino nti, ‘Yagalanga muliraanwa wo nga gwe bwe weeyagala wekka.’" 
Matthew22:40 Amateeka amalala gonna gasinziira mu mateeka ago gombi ne bya bannabbi.” 
Matthew22:41 Awo mu kiseera ekyo Abafalisaayo nga bakuŋŋaanye, Yesu n’ababuuza nti," 
Matthew22:42 “Kristo mumulowoozako mutya? Mwana waani?” Ne baddamu nti, “Mwana wa Dawudi.”" 
Matthew22:43 Yesu kyeyava ababuuza nti, “Dawudi ng’ajjudde Omwoyo bw’ayogera ku Kristo, lwaki ate amuyita ‘Mukama we’, ng’agamba nti," 
Matthew22:44 “ ‘Mukama yagamba Mukama wange nti: “Tuulira wano ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo, okutuusa lwe ndifufuggaza abalabe bo ne mbassa wansi w’ebigere byo?” ’" 
Matthew22:45 Noolwekyo obanga Dawudi amuyita ‘Mukama we,’ kale, ate abeera atya omwana we?”" 
Matthew22:46 Ne wataba n’omu amuddamu, era okuva olwo ne watabaawo ayaŋŋanga kwongera kumubuuza bibuuzo birala." 
Matthew23:1 Awo Yesu n’ayogera eri ebibiina n’abayigirizwa be ng’agamba nti," 
Matthew23:2 “Abawandiisi n’Abafalisaayo batudde ku ntebe ya Musa. 
Matthew23:3 Noolwekyo mukole era mwekuume buli kye babagamba wabula temugoberera bikolwa byabwe. Kubanga boogera naye ne batakola bye bagamba. 
Matthew23:4 Basiba emigugu emizito ne bagitikka abalala, so nga bo n’okugezaako tebagezaako kukwatako n’engalo yaabwe." 
Matthew23:5 “Buli kye bakola bakikola abantu babalabe. Bambala ku mikono gyabwe obusawo omuli ennyiriri eziva mu Byawandiikibwa, ne bawanvuya amatanvuuwa ku byambalo byabwe, agajjukiza abagambala okudda eri Mukama, nga babikola okulaga ababalaba." 
Matthew23:6 Baagala nnyo ebifo eby’oku mwanjo ku mbaga, ne mu bifo eby’ekitiibwa mu makuŋŋaaniro." 
Matthew23:7 Banyumirwa nnyo okuweebwa ekitiibwa mu butale n’okuyitibwa ‘Labbi.’ 
Matthew23:8 “Temweyitanga ‘Labbi,’ kubanga Katonda yekka ye Muyigiriza wammwe, naye mmwe muli baaluganda." 
Matthew23:9 Era temuyitanga muntu yenna ku nsi ‘Kitammwe,’ kubanga Katonda ali mu ggulu ye yekka gwe muteekwa okuyita bwe mutyo." 
Matthew23:10 Era temuganyanga muntu yenna kubayita ‘bayigiriza,’ kubanga omuyigiriza wammwe ali omu yekka, ye Kristo." 
Matthew23:11 Oyo ayagala abantu okumussaamu ekitiibwa. Asaana abeere muweereza waabwe. 
Matthew23:12 Naye buli alyegulumiza alikkakkanyizibwa, na buli alyetoowaza aligulumizibwa." 
Matthew23:13 “Zibasanze mmwe Abawandiisi, nammwe Abafalisaayo. Bannanfuusi mmwe! Muziyiza abantu abalala okuyingira mu bwakabaka obw’omu ggulu, ate nammwe ne mutayingira." 
Matthew23:14 “Bannanfuusi mmwe Abawandiisi nammwe Abafalisaayo! Mulowoozesa abantu nti muli batuukirivu nga musaba essaala, so ng’ate mwekyusa ne mugobaganya bannamwandu mu mayumba gaabwe." 
Matthew23:15 Zibasanze bannanfuusi mmwe Abawandiisi nammwe Abafalisaayo! Kubanga mutambula okwetooloola ennyanja ne ku lukalu musobole okukyusa omuntu, naye bw’akyuka, mumufuula mwana wa ggeyeena okusingawo emirundi ebiri." 
Matthew23:16 “Zibasanze mmwe abakulembeze abazibe b’amaaso abagamba nti, ‘Okulayira Yeekaalu, si nsonga, naye oyo alayira zaabu ali mu Yeekaalu, asaana okukituukiriza!’" 
Matthew23:17 Mmwe abatalina magezi abazibe b’amaaso! Ku ebyo byombi kiruwa ekisingako obukulu, zaabu oba Yeekaalu efuula zaabu okuba entukuvu?" 
Matthew23:18 Ate mugamba nti, ‘Omuntu okulayira ekyoto, kirina amakulu, naye bw’alayira ebirabo ebireeteddwa ku kyoto, asaana okukituukiriza!’" 
Matthew23:19 Mmwe abazibe b’amaaso, ku byombi kiruwa ekisinga kinnaakyo obukulu, ekirabo ekiri ku kyoto oba ekyoto kyennyini ekifuula ekirabo ekyo okuba ekitukuvu?" 
Matthew23:20 Bwe mulayira ekyoto, muba mulayira ekyoto n’ebikiriko byonna," 
Matthew23:21 era bwe mulayira Yeekaalu muba mulayira Yeekaalu ne Katonda agibeeramu. 
Matthew23:22 Era bwe mulayira eggulu, muba mulayira n’entebe ya Katonda ey’obwakabaka n’oyo yennyini agituulako." 
Matthew23:23 “Zibasanze, mmwe Abawandiisi, nammwe Abafalisaayo! Bannanfuusi mmwe! Kubanga muwaayo ekimu eky’ekkumi ku buli kintu, ne ku buli kika kya muddo oguwunyisa obulungi era oguwoomesa enva, okutuukira ddala ne ku kalagala akasinga obutono, naye ne mulagajjalira ebintu ebisinga obukulu eby’amateeka, ng’obwenkanya, n’okusaasira n’okukkiriza. Weewaawo musaanidde okuwaayo ekitundu eky’ekkumi, naye ebintu ebirala ebisinga obukulu temusaanidde kubiragajjalira." 
Matthew23:24 Mmwe abakulembeze abazibe b’amaaso! Musengejja akabu muleme kukanywera mu mazzi, naye ne munyweramu eŋŋamira!" 
Matthew23:25 “Zibasanze mmwe Abawandiisi nammwe Abafalisaayo! Bannanfuusi mmwe! Muzigula kungulu kw’ekikopo ne kungulu kw’ebbakuli, naye nga munda mujjudde omululu n’okwefaako mwekka." 
Matthew23:26 Mmwe Abafalisaayo abazibe b’amaaso! Musooke mulongoose munda w’ekikopo olwo nno mulongoose ne kungulu. 
Matthew23:27 “Zibasanze mmwe Abawandiisi nammwe Abafalisaayo! Mulabika ng’amalaalo agatemagana kungulu, songa munda gajjudde amagumba g’abafu n’obuvundu obwa buli ngeri." 
Matthew23:28 Mulabika ng’abantu abatuukirivu kungulu, songa munda mujjudde obunnanfuusi n’obumenyi bw’amateeka." 
Matthew23:29 “Zibasanze mmwe Abawandiisi nammwe Abafalisaayo! Bannanfuusi mmwe! Kubanga muzimbira bannabbi ebijjukizo, ne mutimba ebijjukizo, by’abatuukirivu," 
Matthew23:30 ne mulyoka mugamba nti, ‘Naye ddala singa twaliwo mu biseera bya bajjajjaffe tetwandisizza kimu nabo mu kuyiwa omusaayi gw’abannabbi.’" 
Matthew23:31 Bwe mwogera mutyo muba mwessaako omusango nga bwe muli abaana b’abo abatta bannabbi. 
Matthew23:32 Mugenda nga mutuukiriza ebyo bajjajjammwe bye bataamaliriza. 
Matthew23:33 “Mmwe emisota! Abaana b’embalasaasa muliwona mutya omusango ogugenda okubatwaza mu ggeyeena? 
Matthew23:34 Kyenva mbaweereza bannabbi, n’abasajja ab’amagezi, n’abawandiisi, abamu mulibatta nga mubakomerera ku musaalaba, n’abalala mulibakuba embooko mu makuŋŋaaniro gammwe, ne mubagobaganya mu bibuga byammwe." 
Matthew23:35 Bwe mutyo omusango gw’okutemula abatuukirivu, okutandikira ku Aberi omutuukirivu okutuuka ku Zaakaliya, mutabani wa Balakiya gwe mwattira wakati wa yeekaalu n’ekyoto, ne gubasingira ddala." 
Matthew23:36 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti ebyo byonna birituuka ku mulembe guno. 
Matthew23:37 “Ggwe Yerusaalemi, ggwe Yerusaalemi atta bannabbi, n’okuba amayinja abo ababa batumiddwa gy’oli, emirundi nga mingi nnyo gye njagadde okukuŋŋaanya abaana bo ng’enkoko bw’ekuŋŋaanya obwana bwayo mu biwaawaatiro byayo, naye n’ogaana." 
Matthew23:38 Laba kaakano ennyumba yo esigalidde awo, kifulukwa." 
Matthew23:39 Kubanga nkugamba nti toliddayo kundaba nate, okutuusa ng’oyogedde nti, ‘Aweereddwa omukisa oyo ajja mu linnya lya Mukama.’ ”" 
Matthew24:1 Awo Yesu bwe yali ng’ava mu luggya lwa Yeekaalu, abayigirizwa be ne bajja w’ali okumulaga enzimba ya Yeekaalu," 
Matthew24:2 naye n’abagamba nti, “Bino byonna temubiraba? Ddala ddala mbagamba nti tewaliba jjinja na limu eririsigala nga litudde ku linnaalyo eritalibetentebwa.”" 
Matthew24:3 Awo Yesu bwe yali ng’atudde ku lusozi olwa Zeyituuni, abayigirizwa be ne bajja gy’ali ne bamubuuza mu kyama nti, “Ebyo biribaawo ddi? Era kabonero ki akalitegeeza okujja kwo n’enkomerero y’ensi nti eri kumpi?”" 
Matthew24:4 Yesu n’abaddamu nti, “Temukkirizanga muntu yenna kubalimbalimba." 
Matthew24:5 Kubanga bangi balijja mu linnya lyange nga bagamba nti, ‘Nze Kristo’, era balirimba bangi." 
Matthew24:6 Munaatera okuwulira entalo n’eŋŋambo z’entalo. Temwekanganga, kubanga ebyo biteekwa okubaawo, naye enkomerero eriba tennatuuka." 
Matthew24:7 Amawanga galirwana ne gannaago, n’obwakabaka bulirwana n’obwakabaka, era walibaawo enjala mu bifo bingi ne musisi aliyuuguumya ebifo bingi." 
Matthew24:8 Naye bino byonna biriba ntandikwa butandikwa ng’ey’okulumwa okuzaala.” 
Matthew24:9 “Muliweebwayo ne mubonyaabonyezebwa era ne muttibwa, era mulikyayibwa amawanga gonna olw’erinnya lyange." 
Matthew24:10 Era bangi balisendebwasendebwa okukola ebibi, n’abalala baliryamu bannaabwe olukwe, n’abalala ne bakyawagana." 
Matthew24:11 Era bannabbi ab’obulimba bangi balijja ne bawubisa abantu bangi. 
Matthew24:12 Olw’obujeemu okuyinga obungi, era bangi okwagala kwabwe kuliwola." 
Matthew24:13 Naye abo abaligumiikiriza okutuuka ku nkomerero be balirokolebwa. 
Matthew24:14 Era Enjiri ey’obwakabaka eribuulirwa mu nsi yonna, nga bwe bujulirwa eri amawanga gonna n’oluvannyuma enkomerero n’eryoka etuuka.”" 
Matthew24:15 “Noolwekyo bwe muliraba ‘eky’omuzizo eky’entiisa,’ nnabbi Danyeri kye yayogerako, nga kiyimiridde mu kifo ekitukuvu asoma bino ategeere," 
Matthew24:16 n’abo abalibeera mu Buyudaaya baddukiranga mu nsozi. 
Matthew24:17 Alibeera waggulu ku kasolya, takkanga kuyingira mu nnyumba ye kubaako byaggyamu." 
Matthew24:18 N’oyo alibeera mu nnimiro taddangayo eka okunonayo olugoye lwe. 
Matthew24:19 Naye ziribasanga abakyala abaliba balina embuto, n’abaliba bayonsa mu nnaku ezo." 
Matthew24:20 Naye musabe ekiseera ky’okudduka kireme kutuukira mu biro bya butiti oba ku lunaku lwa Ssabbiiti. 
Matthew24:21 Kubanga wagenda kubeerawo okubonyaabonyezebwa okunene ennyo okutabangawo kasookedde ensi ebaawo era tewaliddayo kubaawo kikifaanana. 
Matthew24:22 Singa ennaku ezo tezakendezebwako, tewandibadde n’omu alokolebwa. Naye olw’abalonde be ennaku ezo zirikendezebwako." 
Matthew24:23 Bwe wabangawo omuntu agamba nti, ‘Kristo ali wano, oba ali wali,’ temubakkirizanga." 
Matthew24:24 Kubanga bakristo ab’obulimba balijja, ne bannabbi ab’obulimba nabo balijja ne bakola eby’amagero n’ebyewuunyo; nga singa kibadde kisoboka, bandilimbyelimbye n’abalonde ba Katonda." 
Matthew24:25 Laba mbalabudde nga bukyali!” 
Matthew24:26 “Noolwekyo omuntu bw’abagambanga nti Kristo akomyewo ali eri mu ddungu, temugendangayo. Oba nti ali mu bisenge eby’omunda, temukkirizanga." 
Matthew24:27 Kubanga nga bwe mulaba okumyansa kw’eraddu nga kutabaala ebire okuva ebuvanjuba ne kusala okulaga ebugwanjuba, n’okujja kw’Omwana w’Omuntu bwe kutyo." 
Matthew24:28 Era mukimanyi nti awabeera ekifudde awo ensega we zikuŋŋaanira.” 
Matthew24:29 “Amangu ddala ng’okubonyaabonyezebwa “kw’omu nnaku ezo kuwedde, ‘enjuba eriggyako ekizikiza era n’omwezi teguliyaka, n’emmunyeenye zirigwa n’amaanyi g’eggulu galinyeenyezebwa.’ ”" 
Matthew24:30 “Oluvannyuma lw’ebyo akabonero k’Omwana w’omuntu kalirabika ku ggulu, era walibaawo okukungubaga kw’amawanga gonna ag’omu nsi, era baliraba Omwana w’Omuntu ng’ajja ku bire by’eggulu, mu maanyi ne mu kitiibwa ekinene." 
Matthew24:31 Era alituma bamalayika be nga bwe bafuuwa amakondeere mu ddoboozi ery’omwanguka, ne bakuŋŋaanya abalonde be nga babaggya mu mpewo ennya okuva ku ludda olumu olw’eggulu okutuuka ku ludda olulala.”" 
Matthew24:32 “Kale muyigire ku lugero lw’omutiini. Amatabi gaagwo bwe gatandika okutojjera nga mumanya nti ebiseera eby’ebbugumu binaatera okutuuka. 
Matthew24:33 Noolwekyo nammwe bwe muliraba ebintu ebyo byonna, nga mumanya nti ekiseera kiri kumpi, era kisemberedde ddala ku luggi." 
Matthew24:34 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti, omulembe guno teguliggwaawo okutuusa ng’ebintu ebyo byonna bituukiridde." 
Matthew24:35 Eggulu n’ensi biriggwaawo naye ebigambo byange tebiriggwaawo.” 
Matthew24:36 “Naye eby’olunaku olwo wadde essaawa tewali n’omu abimanyi, newaakubadde bamalayika ab’omu ggulu nabo tebakimanyi, wadde Omwana, okuggyako Kitaffe yekka." 
Matthew24:37 Kubanga nga bwe kyali mu biseera bya Nuuwa, okujja kw’Omwana w’Omuntu nakwo bwe kuliba." 
Matthew24:38 Nga bwe kyali mu biseera by’amataba, abantu nga balya nga banywa, nga bawasa n’abalala nga bafumbirwa, olunaku ne lutuuka Nuuwa n’ayingira mu lyato," 
Matthew24:39 abantu ne batamanya, amataba ne gajja ne gabasaanyaawo ne buli kintu, bwe kutyo n’okudda kw’Omwana w’Omuntu bwe kulibeera." 
Matthew24:40 Mu biseera ebyo abasajja babiri baliba bakola mu nnimiro, omu n’atwalibwa omulala n’alekebwa." 
Matthew24:41 Abakazi babiri baliba basa ku mmengo zaabwe mu nnyumba y’emu, omu n’atwalibwa omulala n’alekebwa.”" 
Matthew24:42 “Noolwekyo mubeere beetegefu, kubanga olunaku Mukama wammwe lw’aliddirako temulumanyi." 
Matthew24:43 Naye mutegeere kino: ssinga ssemaka amanya essaawa omubbi w’anaayingirira okumenya ennyumba ye, yandisigadde ng’atunula, n’ataganya mubbi kumuyingirira." 
Matthew24:44 Noolwekyo nammwe bwe mutyo mweteeketeeke, kubanga Omwana w’omuntu alijjira mu kiseera kye mutamulowoolezaamu.”" 
Matthew24:45 “Kale aliwa omuddu omugezi era omwesigwa mukama we gwe yawa obuvunaanyizibwa okulabirira abaddu ab’omu maka ge, n’okubawa emmere mu kiseera ekituufu?" 
Matthew24:46 Alina omukisa omuddu oyo, mukama we gw’alisanga ng’akola bw’atyo." 
Matthew24:47 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti, alimukwasa ebintu bye byonna." 
Matthew24:48 Naye obanga omuddu omubi bw’agamba mu mutima gwe nti, ‘Mukama wange tajja kudda mangu,’" 
Matthew24:49 n’adda ku baddu banne, n’abakuba, n’alya, n’anywa n’abatamiivu, okutuusa lw’alidda." 
Matthew24:50 Mukama w’omuddu oyo n’akomawo ku lunaku lw’atamusuubidde ne mu kiseera ky’atamanyi," 
Matthew24:51 alimubonereza, era omugabo gwe guliba okubeera awamu n’abannanfuusi, eriba okukaaba n’okuluma obujiji.”" 
Matthew25:1 “Obwakabaka obw’omu ggulu bufaananyizibwa n’abawala embeerera ekkumi, abaatwala ettaala zaabwe ne bagenda okusisinkana anaawasa omugole." 
Matthew25:2 Abataano tebaalina magezi, abataano abalala ne baba b’amagezi." 
Matthew25:3 Abataalina magezi, ne batatwala mafuta gamala mu ttaala zaabwe." 
Matthew25:4 Naye abagezi baatwala amafuta mu macupa gaabwe ag’okweyambisa wamu n’ettaala zaabwe. 
Matthew25:5 Naye anaawasa omugole bwe yalwawo okutuuka otulo ne tubakwata bonna, ne beebaka." 
Matthew25:6 “Obudde bwe bwatuuka mu ttumbi oluyoogaano ne lubazuukusa, abantu nga baleekaana nti, ‘Awasa omugole atuuse! Mujje mumwanirize!’" 
Matthew25:7 “Abawala embeerera bonna ne bazuukuka ne baseesa ettaala zaabwe. 
Matthew25:8 Awo abawala abataano abataalina magezi ne bagamba nti, ‘Mutuwe ku mafuta gammwe, kubanga ettaala zaffe zaagala kuzikira ziggweerera.’" 
Matthew25:9 “Naye bannaabwe ne babaddamu nti, ‘Amafuta ge tulinawo gatumala bumazi. Mugende mu maduuka mwegulireyo.’" 
Matthew25:10 “Naye baali baakagenda anaawasa omugole n’atuuka, abo abaali beeteeseteese ne bayingira ku mbaga, oluggi ne luggalwawo." 
Matthew25:11 Oluvannyuma abawala bali abataano ne bakomawo ne bayita nti, ‘Ssebo, tuggulirewo!’" 
Matthew25:12 Naye n’abaddamu nti, ‘Ddala ddala mbagamba nti, sibamanyi!’" 
Matthew25:13 “Kale mutunule mweteeketeeke, kubanga temumanyi kiseera wadde olunaku.”" 
Matthew25:14 “Obwakabaka bwa Katonda, ate bufaananyizibwa n’olugero lw’omusajja eyali agenda olugendo, n’ayita abaddu be n’abalekera ebintu bye." 
Matthew25:15 Eyasooka yamuwa ttalanta ttaano, owookubiri bbiri n’owookusatu emu, ng’ageraageranya ng’okusobola kwa buli omu bwe kwali. Bw’atyo ne yeetambulira." 
Matthew25:16 Omusajja eyafuna ttalanta ettaano n’azisuubuzisa n’afunamu ttalanta ttaano endala. 
Matthew25:17 N’oyo eyalekerwa ttalanta ebiri naye n’aviisaamu endala biri. 
Matthew25:18 Naye eyaweebwa ttalanta emu, bwe yagifuna n’agenda n’aziika ttalanta ya mukama we mu ttaka." 
Matthew25:19 “Awo nga wayiseewo ekiseera kiwanvu, mukama w’abaddu abo n’akomawo. N’ayita abaddu be bamutegeeze ebyafa ku ttalanta ze yabalekera." 
Matthew25:20 Omusajja gwe yalekera ttalanta ettaano n’ajja n’amuleetera ttalanta endala ttaano ng’agamba nti, ‘Mukama wange wampa ttalanta ttaano, nviisizaamu ttalanta endala ttaano.’" 
Matthew25:21 “Mukama we n’amugamba nti, ‘Weebale, oli muddu mulungi era mwesigwa, obadde mwesigwa mu bintu ebitono, ndikusigira ebintu ebingi. Yingira sanyukira wamu ne mukama wo.’" 
Matthew25:22 “Eyalekerwa ttalanta ebiri naye n’ajja, n’ategeeza mukama we nti, ‘Ssebo, wandekera ttalanta bbiri, era ne nziviisaamu ttalanta endala bbiri.’" 
Matthew25:23 “Mukama we n’amugamba nti, ‘Weebale, oli muddu mulungi era mwesigwa, obadde mwesigwa mu bintu ebitono, ndikusigira ebintu ebingi. Yingira osanyukire wamu ne mukama wo.’" 
Matthew25:24 “Omusajja eyalekerwa ttalanta emu n’ajja, n’agamba nti, ‘Ssebo, nakumanya nga bw’oli omuntu omuzibu, okungulira gy’otaasigira era okuŋŋaanyiza gy’otaasaasaanyiza." 
Matthew25:25 Olw’okutya bwe wagenda ne nkweka ttalanta yo mu ttaka era yiino ttalanta yo.’ 
Matthew25:26 “Naye mukama we n’amugamba nti, ‘Ggwe omuddu omubi era omugayaavu! Obanga wamanya nti ndi muntu akungulira gye ssaasigira," 
Matthew25:27 wanditadde ensimbi zange mu bbanka gye bandimpaddemu amagoba nga nkomyewo.’ 
Matthew25:28 “N’alagira nti, ‘Mumuggyeeko ettalanta eyo mugiwe oli alina ttalanta ekkumi." 
Matthew25:29 Kubanga alina aliweebwa abe na bingi naye atalina, n’ebyo by’alina ebitono birimuggyibwako." 
Matthew25:30 N’omuddu oyo ataliiko ky’agasa mumusuule ebweru mu kizikiza eri okukaaba n’okuluma obujiji.’ 
Matthew25:31 “Omwana w’Omuntu bw’alijja mu kitiibwa kye ne bamalayika bonna nga bali naye, alituula ku ntebe ey’ekitiibwa kye." 
Matthew25:32 Awo amawanga gonna galikuŋŋaanyizibwa mu maaso ge era aligaawulamu ng’omusumba bw’ayawulamu endiga n’embuzi. 
Matthew25:33 Endiga aliziteeka ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo n’embuzi ku gwa kkono. 
Matthew25:34 “Awo Kabaka n’alyoka agamba abali ku mukono gwe ogwa ddyo nti, ‘Mujje mmwe Kitange be yawa omukisa, musikire obwakabaka obwabateekerwateekerwa okuva ku kutondebwa kw’ensi." 
Matthew25:35 Kubanga nnali muyala ne mundiisa, nnali muyonta ne mumpa ekyokunywa, nnali mugenyi ne munnyaniriza," 
Matthew25:36 nnali bwereere ne munnyambaza, nnali mulwadde ne munnambula, nnali mu kkomera ne mujja okundaba.’" 
Matthew25:37 “Abatuukirivu ne bamubuuza nti, ‘Mukama waffe, twakulaba ddi ng’oli muyala ne tukuliisa? Oba ng’olina ennyonta ne tukuwa ekyokunywa?" 
Matthew25:38 Oba ng’oli mugenyi ne tukwaniriza? Oba ng’oli bwereere, ne tukwambaza?" 
Matthew25:39 Twakulaba ddi ng’oli mulwadde oba ng’oli mu kkomera ne tukulambula?’ 
Matthew25:40 “Kabaka, alibaddamu nti, ‘Ddala ddala mbagamba nti bwe mwabikolera baganda bange bano abasembayo wansi kye kimu mwabikolera nze!’" 
Matthew25:41 “Bw’atyo aligamba abo abali ku mukono gwe ogwa kkono nti, ‘Muveewo, mmwe abakolimire, mulage mu muliro ogutazikira ogwateekerwateekerwa Setaani ne bamalayika be." 
Matthew25:42 Kubanga nnali muyala ne mutampa kyakulya, nnali muyonta ne mutampa kyakunywa," 
Matthew25:43 nnali mugenyi ne mutannyaniriza, nnali bwereere ne mutannyambaza, nnali mulwadde ne mu kkomera ne mutajja kunnambula.’" 
Matthew25:44 “Nabo baliddamu nti, ‘Mukama waffe, twakulaba ddi ng’oli muyala oba ng’oli muyonta, oba ng’oli mugenyi oba ng’oli bwereere oba mulwadde oba ng’oli mu kkomera, ne tutakuyamba?’" 
Matthew25:45 “Naye alibaddamu nti, ‘ddala ddala mbagamba nti, nga bwe mutaakikola omu ku bano abasembayo wansi, nange temwakinkola.’" 
Matthew25:46 “Abo baligenda ku kibonerezo eky’emirembe n’emirembe, naye abatuukirivu baliyingira mu bulamu obutaggwaawo.”" 
Matthew26:1 Awo Yesu bwe yamala okwogera ebyo byonna, n’agamba abayigirizwa be nti," 
Matthew26:2 “Nga bwe mumanyi, ebulayo ennaku bbiri tutuuke ku mbaga ey’Okuyitako. Omwana w’Omuntu aliweebwayo akomererwe.”" 
Matthew26:3 Mu kiseera ekyo kyennyini, bakabona abakulu n’abakulembeze b’Abayudaaya baali bakuŋŋaanye mu lubiri lwa Kayaafa, Kabona Asinga Obukulu," 
Matthew26:4 nga bakola olukwe mwe banaayita okukwata Yesu bamutte. 
Matthew26:5 Naye baasalawo kireme kubaawo mu kiseera eky’Embaga, si kulwa nga wabaawo akeegugungo mu bantu." 
Matthew26:6 Awo Yesu bwe yali mu nnyumba ya Simooni Omugenge e Besaniya," 
Matthew26:7 ng’ali ku mmeeza, omukazi n’ajja gy’ali ng’alina eccupa y’amafuta ag’akaloosa ag’omuwendo omungi, n’agafuka ku mutwe gwa Yesu." 
Matthew26:8 Abayigirizwa be bwe baakiraba ne banyiiga. Ne bagamba nti, “Lwaki okwonoona amafuta ag’omuwendo gatyo!" 
Matthew26:9 Kubanga yandisobodde okugatundamu ensimbi nnyingi n’azigabira abaavu.” 
Matthew26:10 Yesu bwe yamanya ebirowoozo byabwe, n’abagamba nti, “Lwaki mutawanya omukazi? Ankoledde ekintu ekirungi." 
Matthew26:11 Bulijjo abaavu muli nabo, naye nze sijja kuba nammwe bulijjo." 
Matthew26:12 Anfuseeko amafuta gano okuteekateeka omubiri gwange okuguziika. 
Matthew26:13 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti, bulijjo ajjanga kujjukirwa olw’ekikolwa kino. Ekikolwa ky’omukazi ono kijjanga kwogerwako wonna wonna mu nsi Enjiri gy’eneebuulirwanga.”" 
Matthew26:14 Awo Yuda Isukalyoti omu ku bayigirizwa ekkumi n’ababiri n’agenda eri bakabona abakulu. 
Matthew26:15 N’ababuuza nti, “Munampa ki okubalaga Yesu mulyoke mumukwate?” Ne bamuwa ebitundu bya ffeeza amakumi asatu." 
Matthew26:16 Okuviira ddala mu kiseera ekyo Yuda n’anoonya akakisa konna alyemu Yesu olukwe. 
Matthew26:17 Awo ku lunaku olusooka mu nnaku ez’Embaga ey’Emigaati egitazimbulukuswa, abayigirizwa ne bajja eri Yesu ne bamubuuza nti, “Embaga y’Okuyitako tukugiteekereteekere wa?”" 
Matthew26:18 Yesu n’abaddamu nti, “Mugende mu kibuga ewa ‘Gundi,’ mumugambe nti, ‘Omuyigiriza agambye nti: Ekiseera kyange kituuse, era Embaga ey’Okuyitako njagala kugiriira mu maka go awamu n’abayigirizwa bange.’ ”" 
Matthew26:19 Abayigirizwa ne bagenda ne bakola nga Yesu bwe yabalagira ne bateekateeka Okuyitako. 
Matthew26:20 Akawungeezi ako Yesu bwe yali ng’atudde 
Matthew26:21 ku mmere n’abayigirizwa be ekkumi n’ababiri, nga balya n’abagamba nti, “Omu ku mmwe ajja kundyamu olukwe.”" 
Matthew26:22 Bwe baakiwulira emitima ne gibeewanika, buli omu n’abuuza nti, “Ye nze?”" 
Matthew26:23 Yesu n’addamu nti, “Akozezza nange mu kibya, y’oyo." 
Matthew26:24 Mutegeere nti Omwana w’Omuntu agenda nga bwe kyamuwandiikibwako, naye zimusanze omuntu oyo agenda okulya mu Mwana w’Omuntu olukwe. Kyandibadde kirungi singa omuntu oyo teyazaalirwa ddala.”" 
Matthew26:25 Yuda anaamulyamu olukwe n’amubuuza nti, “Ddala ddala, ye nze Labbi?” Yesu n’amuddamu nti, “Oyogedde.”" 
Matthew26:26 Bwe baali balya, Yesu n’addira omugaati n’agusabira omukisa, n’agumenyaamenyamu n’agabira abayigirizwa be, n’agamba nti, “Mutoole mulye, kubanga guno gwe mubiri gwange.”" 
Matthew26:27 Bw’atyo n’asitula ekikompe, ne yeebaza Katonda, n’abawa ng’agamba nti, “Munywe ku kino mwenna," 
Matthew26:28 kubanga guno gwe musaayi gwange ogw’endagaano oguyiika ku lw’abantu abangi, olw’okusonyiyibwa ebibi." 
Matthew26:29 Era mbagamba nti, Sigenda kuddayo kunywa ku kibala kino okutuusa ku lunaku olwo lwe ndikinywa nammwe nga kiggya mu bwakabaka bwa Kitange.”" 
Matthew26:30 Bwe baamala okuyimbayo oluyimba ne bafuluma ne bagenda ku lusozi olwa Zeyituuni. 
Matthew26:31 Awo Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Ekiro kya leero mwenna mujja kunjabulira. “Kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, ‘Ndikuba omusumba n’endiga z’omu kisibo kye ne zisaasaana.’" 
Matthew26:32 Naye bwe ndimala okuzuukizibwa ndibakulembera okugenda e Ggaliraaya.” 
Matthew26:33 Peetero n’amuddamu nti, “Abalala bonna bwe banaakwabulira, nze sijja kukwabulira.”" 
Matthew26:34 Yesu n’amugamba nti, “Ddala ddala nkugamba nti, Mu kiro kino kyennyini enkoko eneeba tennakookolima, onooneegaana emirundi esatu.”" 
Matthew26:35 Peetero n’amugamba nti, “Oba kufiira wamu naawe n’afa, naye sijja kukwegaana n’akamu kokka.” N’abayigirizwa be abalala bonna ne boogera bwe batyo." 
Matthew26:36 Awo Yesu n’agenda nabo mu kifo ekiyitibwa Gesusemane n’abagamba nti, “Mutuule wano okutuusa lwe nnaamala okusaba nkomewo.”" 
Matthew26:37 N’atwala Peetero ne batabani ba Zebbedaayo bombi, n’atandika, okuwulira ennaku nnyingi n’okweraliikirira ennyo." 
Matthew26:38 N’abagamba nti, “Omwoyo gwange guliko ennaku egenda na kunzita. Kale mubeere wano tutunule ffenna.”" 
Matthew26:39 N’abaleka awo ne yeeyongerayo akabanga, n’agwa wansi ng’avuunise amaaso ge ku ttaka, n’asaba nti, “Kitange! Obanga kisoboka, leka ekikompe kino kinzigibweko. Naye si nga Nze bwe njagala, wabula nga ggwe bw’oyagala.”" 
Matthew26:40 N’addayo eri abayigirizwa be n’abasanga nga beebase. N’agamba Peetero nti, “Peetero, naawe tosobodde kutunula nange n’essaawa emu?" 
Matthew26:41 Mutunule nga bwe musaba. Omwoyo gwo gwagala, naye omubiri gwe munafu!”" 
Matthew26:42 N’abavaako omulundi ogwokubiri akabanga n’agenda n’asaba ng’agamba nti, “Kitange! Oba tekisoboka ekikompe kino kuvaawo wabula Nze okukinywa, kale ky’oyagala kye kiba kikolebwa.”" 
Matthew26:43 N’akomawo nate gye bali n’abasanga nga beebase, kubanga amaaso gaabwe gaali gazitowa nga gajjudde otulo." 
Matthew26:44 N’abaleka n’agenda asaba ebigambo bye bimu nga biri. 
Matthew26:45 Ate n’akomawo awali abayigirizwa n’abagamba nti, “Kale mwebakire ddala, muwummule. Kyokka mumanye ng’ekiseera kituuse Omwana w’Omuntu aweebweyo mu mikono gy’abalina ebibi." 
Matthew26:46 Muzuukuke! Musituke tugende! Laba, omuntu agenda okundyamu olukwe wuuli ajja!”" 
Matthew26:47 Laba Yesu yali akyayogera Yuda omu ku kkumi n’ababiri, n’atuuka ng’alina ekibiina ky’abantu abaali babagalidde ebitala n’emiggo nga batumiddwa bakabona abakulu n’abakulembeze b’Abayudaaya." 
Matthew26:48 Eyali agenda okumulyamu olukwe yali abategeezezza akabonero nti omuntu gw’anaalamusa nga y’oyo gwe baali beetaaga, nga bamukwata." 
Matthew26:49 Amangwago n’ajja eri Yesu n’amulamusa nti, “Mirembe, Labbi,” n’amugwa mu kifuba." 
Matthew26:50 Yesu kwe kumugamba nti. “Munnange, kola ky’ojjiridde.” Awo abalala ne bakwata Yesu." 
Matthew26:51 Omuntu omu ku abo abaali ne Yesu n’asowolayo ekitala kye n’asalako okutu kw’omuweereza wa Kabona Asinga Obukulu. 
Matthew26:52 Naye Yesu n’amulagira nti, “Ekitala kyo kizzeeyo mu kiraato kyakyo. Kubanga abo abakozesa ebitala nabo bagenda kuttibwa na kitala." 
Matthew26:53 Tomanyi nti nnyinza okusaba Kitange bamalayika nkumi na nkumi okujja okutulwanirira? 
Matthew26:54 Naye singa nkola bwe ntyo, olwo Ebyawandiikibwa, ebyogera ku bino ebiriwo kaakano, binatuukirira bitya?”" 
Matthew26:55 Mu kiseera ekyo Yesu n’abuuza ekibiina nti, “Ndi ng’omumenyi w’amateeka ow’akabi ennyo, n’okujja ne mujja okunkwata nga mubagalidde ebitala n’emiggo? Nabeeranga nammwe nga njigiriza mu Yeekaalu buli lunaku, ne mutankwata." 
Matthew26:56 Naye kino kibaddewo okutuukiriza ebigambo bya bannabbi ebiri mu Byawandiikibwa.” Olwo abayigirizwa be bonna ne bamwabulira ne badduka. 
Matthew26:57 Awo ekibiina ne kitwala Yesu ewa Kayaafa, Kabona Asinga Obukulu, n’abakulembeze b’Abayudaaya gye baali bakuŋŋaanidde." 
Matthew26:58 Mu kiseera ekyo ne Peetero yali agoberera kyokka ng’ali walako emabega w’ekibiina; n’atuuka mu luggya lw’ennyumba ya Kabona Asinga Obukulu, n’atuula awaali abaweereza ng’alinda okutegeera ebinaavaayo." 
Matthew26:59 Bakabona abakulu n’Abasaddukaayo bonna ne banoonya obujulizi obw’obulimba ku Yesu obunamuweesa ekibonerezo eky’okufa. 
Matthew26:60 Kyokka ne bafunayo batono ab’obujulirwa obw’obulimba. N’evumbukayo babiri 
Matthew26:61 abeesimbawo okugamba nti, “Omuntu ono yagamba nti, ‘Nsobola okumenyawo Yeekaalu ya Katonda, ate ne ngizimba ne ngimalira mu nnaku ssatu.’ ”" 
Matthew26:62 Awo Kabona Asinga Obukulu n’ayimirira n’abuuza Yesu nti, “Tolina ky’oddamu ku bino abasajja bano bye bakuloopa?”" 
Matthew26:63 Naye Yesu n’asirika busirisi. Ate Kabona Asinga Obukulu, n’amuddira ng’amugamba nti, “Nkulagira, mu linnya lya Katonda omulamu otutegeeze obanga Ggwe Kristo, Omwana wa Katonda.”" 
Matthew26:64 Yesu n’addamu nti, “Okyogedde. Naye mbagamba nti, okuva ne kaakano mugenda kulaba Omwana w’Omuntu ng’atudde ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogwa Katonda, ng’akomawo ku bire eby’eggulu.”" 
Matthew26:65 Kabona Asinga Obukulu, n’ayuza ebyambalo bye, n’agamba nti, “Kuno kuvvoola! Ate kati tukyetaagira ki abajulirwa abalala? Mwenna mumuwulidde ng’akyogera!" 
Matthew26:66 Mumusalira mutya?” Ne baddamu nti, “Gumusinze! Asaanidde kufa!”" 
Matthew26:67 Olwo ne bawandira Yesu amalusu mu maaso, abamu ne bamukuba ebikonde ne bamukuba empi," 
Matthew26:68 nga bwe bamugamba nti, “Tutegeeze, Kristo, akukubye y’aluwa?”" 
Matthew26:69 Mu kiseera ekyo Peetero yali atudde mu luggya. Awo omuweereza omuwala n’ajja awali Peetero n’amugamba nti, “Wali wamu ne Yesu, ow’e Ggaliraaya.”" 
Matthew26:70 Naye Peetero ne yeegaana mu maaso ga buli omu ng’agamba nti, “Ky’oyogerako sikimanyi.”" 
Matthew26:71 Oluvannyumako nga Peetero ayimiridde okumpi n’oluggi olunene oluva mu luggya, omuwala omulala n’amulaba, n’agamba abo abaali bayimiridde awo nti, “Omusajja ono yali ne Yesu ow’e Nazaaleesi.”" 
Matthew26:72 Peetero era n’akyegaana, nga kw’atadde n’okulayira nga bw’agamba nti, “Nze oyo n’okumumanya simumanyi.”" 
Matthew26:73 Naye nga wayiseewo akabanga, abasajja abaali bayimiridde awo ne bajja w’ali, ne bamugamba nti, “Ddala ddala oli omu ku bo, kubanga otegeerekeka olw’enjogera yo.”" 
Matthew26:74 Peetero n’atandika okulayira nate, ne yeeyongera okwegaana ng’agamba nti, “Omuntu simumanyi.” Amangwago enkoko n’ekookolima." 
Matthew26:75 Awo Peetero n’ajjukira ebigambo bya Yesu bye yali amugambye nti, “Enkoko eneeba tennakookolima onoonneegaana emirundi esatu.” N’afuluma ebweru ng’akaaba nnyo amaziga." 
Matthew27:1 Awo obudde bwe bwakya, bakabona abakulu bonna n’abakulembeze b’Abayudaaya ne beeyongera okukuŋŋaana ne bateeseza wamu balabe ekkubo lye banaayitamu okutta Yesu." 
Matthew27:2 Ne bamusiba, ne bamuweereza ewa Piraato eyali gavana Omuruumi." 
Matthew27:3 Awo Yuda, eyali amuliddemu olukwe, bwe yalaba nga Yesu bamusalidde omusango gwa kufa, n’azzaayo ebitundu amakumi asatu ebya ffeeza eri bakabona abakulu n’abakulembeze b’Abayudaaya," 
Matthew27:4 ng’agamba nti, “Nnyonoonye, kubanga ndiddemu olukwe omusaayi ogutalina musango.” Naye ne bamuddamu nti, “kyo kitukwatako kitya? Ezo nsoga zo.”" 
Matthew27:5 Kyeyava addira ensimbi eza ffeeza n’aziyiwa mu Yeekaalu n’afuluma n’agenda yeetuga! 
Matthew27:6 Bakabona abakulu ne balondalondawo ensimbi eza ffeeza, ne bagamba nti, “Kya muzizo okuzissa mu ggwanika lya yeekaalu kubanga muwendo gwa musaayi.”" 
Matthew27:7 Bwe baamala okukikubaganyaako ebirowoozo, ne basalawo okuzigulamu ennimiro ababumbi mwe baggyanga ebbumba. Ne bateesa ennimiro eyo okugifuula ekifo eky’okuziikangamu abagwira." 
Matthew27:8 Kyebaava batuuma ennimiro eyo, “Ennimiro y’Omusaayi” n’okutuusa leero." 
Matthew27:9 Kino ne kituukiriza nnabbi Yeremiya bye yayogera nti, “Baddira ebitundu bya ffeeza amakumi asatu, nga gwe muwendo abaana ba Isirayiri gwe baamulamula," 
Matthew27:10 ne bagulamu ennimiro eyali ey’ababumbi, nga Mukama bwe yalagira.”" 
Matthew27:11 Awo Yesu bwe yayimirira mu maaso ga gavana, Omuruumi, gavana n’amubuuza nti, “Ggwe Kabaka w’Abayudaaya?” Yesu n’amuddamu nti, “Okyogedde.”" 
Matthew27:12 Naye bakabona abakulu n’abakulembeze b’Abayudaaya bwe baaleeta ensonga zaabwe ze baasinziirako okumuwawaabira, Yesu teyabaanukula." 
Matthew27:13 Piraato kwe ku mubuuza nti, “Ebyo byonna bye bakwogerako tobiwulira?”" 
Matthew27:14 Naye Yesu n’ataddamu kigambo na kimu, era gavana ne kimwewuunyisa nnyo." 
Matthew27:15 Gavana yalina empisa ey’okusumulula omusibe omu mu kiseera eky’Embaga y’Okuyitako, ng’omusibe oyo abantu be baamweronderanga." 
Matthew27:16 Mu kkomera mwalimu kkondo lukulwe ng’erinnya lye ye Balaba. 
Matthew27:17 Awo Piraato n’abuuza ekibiina ekyali kikuŋŋaanye nti, “Mwagala mbasumululire ani, Balaba oba Yesu, ayitibwa Kristo?”" 
Matthew27:18 Kubanga yamanya ng’abakulembeze b’Abayudaaya bamuwaddeyo lwa buggya. 
Matthew27:19 Piraato yali akyali wakati mu musango ogwo, mukazi we n’amutumira n’obubaka buno nti, “Toba na nsonga na musajja oyo omutuukirivu kubanga natawaanyizibbwa n’ekirooto eky’omuntu oyo.”" 
Matthew27:20 Naye bakabona abakulu n’abakulembeze b’Abayudaaya ne basendasenda ebibiina basabeyo Balaba y’aba ateebwa, naye Yesu attibwe." 
Matthew27:21 Gavana bwe yaddamu okubabuuza nti, “Ku bano bombi mbateereko aluwa?” Ekibiina kyonna ne kiddamu nti, “Balaba!”" 
Matthew27:22 Piraato n’ababuuza nti, “Kale Yesu, ayitibwa Kristo, mukole ntya?” buli omu n’addamu nti, “Akomererwe!”" 
Matthew27:23 Piraato n’ababuuza nti, “Lwaki, kiki ky’asobezza?” Naye bo ne beeyongera kuleekaanira waggulu nti, “Akomererwe!”" 
Matthew27:24 Awo Piraato bwe yalaba ng’ensoga talina gy’aziraza, ate ng’ebibiina byagala kusasamala, n’atumya amazzi, n’anaaba engalo ze mu maaso g’ekibiina nga bw’agamba nti, “Nze siriiko musango gwonna olw’omusaayi gw’omuntu ono omulungi. Obuvunaanyizibwa bwonna buli ku mmwe!”" 
Matthew27:25 Abantu bonna ne baanukula nti, “Omusaayi gwe gubeere ku ffe ne ku baana baffe!”" 
Matthew27:26 Awo Piraato n’asumulula Balaba n’abamuwa. Naye bwe yamala okukuba Yesu embooko n’amuwaayo bamukomerere. 
Matthew27:27 Naye abaserikale baasooka kumutwala mu luggya lw’olubiri, oluyitibwa Pulayitoliyo ne bakuŋŋaanira eyo, ne bayita bannaabwe bonna." 
Matthew27:28 Awo ne bamwambulamu engoye ze, ne bamwambaza ekyambalo ekimyufu," 
Matthew27:29 ne bakola engule mu maggwa ne bagimutikkira, ne bamukwasa olumuli mu mukono gwe ogwa ddyo. Ne bamufukaamirira nga bamuduulira nti, “Mirembe, Kabaka w’Abayudaaya!”" 
Matthew27:30 Ne bamuwandira amalusu, ne bamusikako olumuli ne balumukubya ku mutwe." 
Matthew27:31 Eby’okumuduulira bwe byaggwa, ne bamwambulamu ekyambalo ekimyufu, ne bamwambaza ekyambalo kye ekya bulijjo, ne balyoka bamufulumya okumutwala okumukomerera." 
Matthew27:32 Bwe baali nga bagenda gye banaamukomerera, ne basisinkana omusajja omukuleene, erinnya lye nga ye Simooni, ne bamulagira lwa maanyi yeetikke omusaalaba gwa Yesu." 
Matthew27:33 Bwe baatuuka mu kifo ekiyitibwa Gologoosa, amakulu nti, “Akasozi k’Ekiwanga,”" 
Matthew27:34 ne bawa Yesu wayini atabuddwamu omususa, naye bwe yakombako n’amugaana." 
Matthew27:35 Bwe baamala okumukomerera, abaserikale ne bagabana ebyambalo bye nga babikubira akalulu." 
Matthew27:36 Bwe batyo ne batuula awo nga bamukuuma. 
Matthew27:37 Ne bawanika ekipande waggulu w’omutwe gwe ku musaalaba okuwandiikiddwa nti, “Ono ye Yesu, Kabaka w’Abayudaaya.”" 
Matthew27:38 Waaliwo n’abanyazi babiri abaakomererwa naye omu ku ddyo, n’omulala ku kkono." 
Matthew27:39 Awo abantu abaali bayitawo, ne bamuvuma nga bamunyeenyeza emitwe" 
Matthew27:40 nga bwe bagamba nti, “Wagamba okumenya Yeekaalu, ate ogizimbe mu nnaku ssatu! Weerokole okke wansi okuva ku musaalaba, obanga ggwe Mwana wa Katonda.”" 
Matthew27:41 Bakabona abakulu n’abawandiisi, n’abakulembeze abalala ne bamuduulira, nga bagamba nti," 
Matthew27:42 “Yalokolanga balala, naye ye tasobola kwerokola! Kale nga bw’ali Kabaka wa Isirayiri, ave ku musaalaba akke wansi, naffe tunaamukkiriza!" 
Matthew27:43 Yeesiga Katonda, kale amuggye ku musaalaba obanga Katonda amwagala. Yagamba nti, ‘Ndi Mwana wa Katonda.’ ”" 
Matthew27:44 N’abanyazi ababiri abaakomererwa awamu naye nabo ne bamuvuma. 
Matthew27:45 Okuviira ddala ku ssaawa mukaaga mu ttuntu okutuusiza ddala essaawa mwenda ez’olweggulo ensi yonna yabikkibwa ekizikiza. 
Matthew27:46 Ku ssaawa nga mwenda Yesu n’ayogerera waggulu n’eddoboozi ery’omwanguka nti, “Eri, Eri lama sabakusaani,” ekitegeeza nti, “Katonda wange, Katonda wange, lwaki onjabulidde?”" 
Matthew27:47 Naye abamu ku baali bayimiridde awo bwe baakiwulira ne bagamba nti, “Ayita Eriya.”" 
Matthew27:48 Amangwago omu n’adduka n’addira ekyangwe n’akinnyika mu mwenge omukaatuufu n’akiteeka ku muti, n’akimuwa anuuneko." 
Matthew27:49 Naye abalala ne bagamba nti, “Mumuleke. Ka tulabe obanga Eriya anajja n’amulokola.”" 
Matthew27:50 Awo Yesu ne yeeyongera okwogerera waggulu n’eddoboozi eddene, n’awaayo omwoyo gwe." 
Matthew27:51 Era laba! Eggigi ly’omu Yeekaalu ne liyulikamu wakati okuva waggulu okutuuka wansi; ensi n’ekankana, n’enjazi ne zaatika." 
Matthew27:52 Entaana ne zibikkuka era abantu ba Katonda bangi abaali bafudde ne bazuukira," 
Matthew27:53 era Yesu bwe yamala okuzuukira ne bava mu ntaana gye baali baziikiddwa ne bayingira mu kibuga ekitukuvu ne balabibwa abantu bangi. 
Matthew27:54 Omuserikale omukulu w’ekibinja ky’abaserikale ekikumi, n’abaserikale abaali bakuuma Yesu, bwe baalaba okukankana kw’ensi ng’okwa musisi, n’ebirala ebyabaawo, ne batya nnyo. Ne bagamba nti, “Ddala ddala ono abadde Mwana wa Katonda.”" 
Matthew27:55 Waaliwo n’abakazi bangi abaayitanga ne Yesu abaava naye e Ggaliraaya nga bamuweereza, baali beesuddeko akabanga, nga balaba ebigenda mu maaso." 
Matthew27:56 Mu bo mmwe mwali Maliyamu Magudaleene ne Maliyamu nnyina wa Yakobo ne Yusufu, ne nnyina w’abaana ba Zebbedaayo." 
Matthew27:57 Obudde bwe bwawungeera, ne wajja omusajja omugagga ng’ava Alimasaya, erinnya lye Yusufu eyali omu ku bagoberezi ba Yesu." 
Matthew27:58 N’agenda eri Piraato n’asabayo omulambo gwa Yesu. Piraato n’alagira bagumuwe. 
Matthew27:59 Yusufu n’atwala omulambo n’aguzinga mu lugoye olulungi olwa linena," 
Matthew27:60 n’agugalamiza mu ntaana ye empya gye yatema mu lwazi, n’addira ejjinja eddene n’aliyiringisiza mu mulyango gw’entaana n’aggalawo, ne yeetambulira." 
Matthew27:61 Maliyamu Magudaleene ne Maliyamu munne, bombi baali batudde awo kumpi n’entaana." 
Matthew27:62 Enkeera, ng’olunaku olusooka mu nnaku z’Embaga y’Okuyitako luweddeko, bakabona abakulu n’Abafalisaayo ne bagenda eri Piraato," 
Matthew27:63 ne bamugamba nti, “Oweekitiibwa, omulimba oli tujjukira ng’akyali mulamu yagamba nti, ‘Nga wayiseewo ennaku ssatu ndizuukira.’" 
Matthew27:64 Noolwekyo tukusaba olagire entaana ye ekuumibwe, okutuusa ku lunaku olwokusatu, abayigirizwa be baleme kumubbamu, ne balyoka bategeeza abantu nti azuukidde! Singa ekyo kiba bwe kityo, ekyo kye kijja okuba ekibi ennyo okusinga n’ekyasooka.”" 
Matthew27:65 Piraato n’abaddamu nti, “Mukozese abaserikale bammwe be mulina mugende mugikuume.”" 
Matthew27:66 Bwe batyo ne bateeka akabonero ak’envumbo ku jjinja eryaggala omulyango gw’entaana, ne bateekawo n’abakuumi." 
Matthew28:1 Oluvannyuma lwa Ssabbiiti ku lunaku olusooka mu nnaku omusanvu, ng’obudde bukya, Maliyamu Magudaleene ne Maliyamu oli omulala ne balaga ku ntaana." 
Matthew28:2 Mu kiseera ekyo ne wabaawo okukankana ng’okwa musisi. Malayika wa Mukama yakka okuva mu ggulu n’ayiringisa ejjinja ne liva mu mulyango gw’entaana, n’alituulako." 
Matthew28:3 Amaaso ge gaali gamasamasa ng’okumyansa kw’eraddu, n’ekyambalo kye nga kyeru ekitukula be tukutuku." 
Matthew28:4 Abakuumi bwe baamulaba, ne bakankana nga batidde nnyo ne bagwa wansi ne baba ng’abafudde." 
Matthew28:5 Awo malayika n’agamba abakazi nti, “Temutya. Mmanyi nga munoonya Yesu, eyakomererwa," 
Matthew28:6 wabula taliiwo wano! Azuukidde mu bafu, nga bwe yagamba. Muyingire mulabe we yali agalamiziddwa." 
Matthew28:7 Kale kaakano, mugende mangu mutegeeze abayigirizwa be nti, Azuukidde mu bafu, era abakulembeddemu okugenda e Ggaliraaya gye mulimusisinkana. Obwo bwe bubaka bwange bwe muba mubatuusaako.”" 
Matthew28:8 Abakazi abo ne badduka embiro nnyingi nga bava ku ntaana kyokka nga batidde nnyo, naye ate nga bajjudde essanyu. Ne bayanguwa mangu okugenda okubuulira abayigirizwa be." 
Matthew28:9 Bwe baali bagenda, amangwago Yesu n’ayimirira mu maaso gaabwe! N’abalamusa nti, “Mirembe?” Ne bagwa wansi ne bavuunama mu maaso ge, ne bamukwata ku bigere ne bamusinza." 
Matthew28:10 Awo Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Temutya, mugende mugambe abooluganda bagende mangu e Ggaliraaya, gye balindabira.”" 
Matthew28:11 Abakazi bwe baali bagenda mu kibuga, abamu ku bakuumi abaali bakuuma entaana ne bagenda eri bakabona abakulu ne babategeeza byonna ebibaddewo." 
Matthew28:12 Awo abakulembeze b’Abayudaaya bonna ne bakuŋŋaana ne bateesa era ne batoola ffeeza na basalawo bagulirire abakuumi. 
Matthew28:13 Ne babalagira bagambe nti, “Bwe twali twebase ekiro, abayigirizwa ne bajja ne babba omulambo gwa Yesu ne bagutwala.”" 
Matthew28:14 Abaali mu lukiiko olwo ne basuubiza abakuumi nti, “Singa ebigambo bino bituuka ku gavana, ffe tujja kumuwooyawooya, tubazibire.”" 
Matthew28:15 Bwe batyo abaserikale ne balya enguzi, ne bakkiriza okwogera nga bwe baabagamba. Ebigambo byabwe ne bibuna nnyo wonna mu Buyudaaya, n’okutuusa ku lunaku lwa leero." 
Matthew28:16 Awo abayigirizwa ekkumi n’omu ne basitula ne bagenda e Ggaliraaya ku lusozi Yesu gye yabagamba okumusanga. 
Matthew28:17 Ne bamusisinkana ne bamusinza. Naye abamu ku bo tebaakakasiza ddala nti ye Yesu, ne babuusabuusa!" 
Matthew28:18 Awo Yesu n’asemberera abayigirizwa be n’abategeeza nti, “Mpeereddwa obuyinza bwonna mu ggulu ne ku nsi." 
Matthew28:19 Kale mugende mufuule abantu bonna mu nsi zonna, abayigirizwa nga mubabatiza mu linnya lya Kitaffe, Omwana era Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Matthew28:20 Era mubayigirize okugonderanga byonna bye nabalagira mmwe, era Ndi nammwe bulijjo n’okutuukira ddala ensi lw’eriggwaawo.”" 
Mark1:1 Entandikwa y’Enjiri ya Yesu Kristo, Omwana wa Katonda." 
Mark1:2 Kyawandiikibwa mu kitabo kya nnabbi Isaaya nti, “Laba ntuma omubaka wange akukulembere, ateeketeeke ekkubo lyo;" 
Mark1:3 eddoboozi ly’oyo ayogelera waggulu mu ddungu nti, ‘Muteeketeeke ekkubo lya Mukama, mutereeze amakubo ge.’ ”" 
Mark1:4 Yokaana yajja ng’abatiriza mu ddungu, ng’abuulira okubatiza okw’okwenenya olw’okusonyiyibwa ebibi." 
Mark1:5 Ensi yonna ey’e Buyudaaya n’abantu bonna ab’omu Yerusaalemi, ne bagendanga gy’ali, n’ababatiza mu mugga Yoludaani nga baatula ebibi byabwe." 
Mark1:6 Yokaana yayambalanga ekyambalo eky’obwoya bw’eŋŋamira, ne yeesibanga olukoba olw’eddiba mu kiwato kye, era yalyanga nzige na mubisi gwa njuki." 
Mark1:7 Yabuuliranga ng’agamba nti, “Waliwo omuntu omukulu era ansinga amaanyi ajja okujja, gwe sisaanira na kusumulula bukoba bwa ngatto ze." 
Mark1:8 Nze mbabatiza na mazzi, naye ye alibabatiza na Mwoyo Mutukuvu.”" 
Mark1:9 Awo olwatuuka mu nnaku ezo Yesu n’ava e Nazaaleesi mu Ggaliraaya n’ajja, Yokaana n’amubatiza mu mugga Yoludaani." 
Mark1:10 Awo Yesu bwe yali yaakava mu mazzi, n’alaba eggulu nga libikkuse, ne Mwoyo ng’ali ng’ejjiba ng’amukkako." 
Mark1:11 Eddoboozi ne liva mu ggulu nga ligamba nti, “Ggwe Mwana wange omwagalwa, ggwe, gwe nsanyukira ennyo.”" 
Mark1:12 Amangwago Mwoyo n’amutwala mu ddungu. 
Mark1:13 N’amalayo ennaku amakumi ana ng’ali n’ensolo ez’omu nsiko, ng’akemebwa Setaani, kyokka nga bamalayika bamuweereza." 
Mark1:14 Oluvannyuma nga Yokaana Omubatiza amaze okusibwa mu kkomera, Yesu n’ajja mu Ggaliraaya okubuulira Enjiri ya Katonda," 
Mark1:15 ng’agamba nti, “Ekiseera kituukiridde, n’obwakabaka bwa Katonda busembedde! Mwenenye mukkirize Enjiri.”" 
Mark1:16 Awo Yesu yali ng’ayita ku lubalama lw’ennyanja y’e Ggaliraaya, n’alaba Simooni ne muganda we Andereya nga basuula obutimba bwabwe mu nnyanja; kubanga baali bavubi." 
Mark1:17 Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Mujje mungoberere nange ndibafuula abavubi b’abantu!”" 
Mark1:18 Amangwago ne baleka obutimba bwabwe ne bamugoberera. 
Mark1:19 Bwe yeeyongerayo katono, n’alaba Yakobo ne Yokaana batabani ba Zebbedaayo, nga bali mu lyato baddaabiriza obutimba bwabwe." 
Mark1:20 Amangwago n’abayita ne baleka kitaabwe Zebbedaayo mu lyato n’abapakasi, ne bagoberera Yesu." 
Mark1:21 Awo ne bayingira mu Kaperunawumu. Amangwago n’ayingira mu kuŋŋaaniro ku Ssabbiiti, n’abayigiriza." 
Mark1:22 Ne beewuunya okuyigiriza kwe, kubanga yabayigiriza nga nannyini buyinza, so si ng’abannyonnyozi b’amateeka bwe baakolanga." 
Mark1:23 Amangwago ne walabika omusajja eyaliko omwoyo omubi mu ssinzizo, n’awowoggana," 
Mark1:24 ng’agamba nti, “Otwagaza ki Yesu Omunnazaaleesi? Ozze okutuzikiriza? Nkumanyi gwe Mutukuvu wa Katonda.”" 
Mark1:25 Awo Yesu n’aguboggolera ng’agamba nti, “Sirika era muveeko.”" 
Mark1:26 Awo omwoyo omubi ne gumusikambula nnyo, ne gumuvaako." 
Mark1:27 Buli omu ne yeewuunya, ne beebuuzaganya nti, “Kuyigiriza kwa ngeri ki kuno okuggya okujjudde obuyinza? So n’emyoyo emibi agiragira ne gimugondera.”" 
Mark1:28 Amangwago amawulire agamukwatako ne gasaasaana wonna mu byalo ebyetoolodde Ggaliraaya. 
Mark1:29 Amangwago ne bava mu kkuŋŋaaniro ne bagenda mu nnyumba ya Simooni ne Andereya nga bali ne Yakobo ne Yokaana. 
Mark1:30 Ne basanga nga nnyina muka Simooni agalamidde mulwadde omusujja. Amangwago ne bakitegeeza Yesu. 
Mark1:31 Bwe yamusemberera, n’amukwata ku mukono n’amuyimusa, omusujja ne gumuwonako, n’abaweereza!" 
Mark1:32 Awo obudde bwe bwali buwungeera, ng’enjuba egwa, ne bamuleetera abalwadde bonna, n’abaaliko dayimooni." 
Mark1:33 Ekibuga kyonna ne kikuŋŋaanira ku luggi. 
Mark1:34 Era Yesu n’awonya abalwadde bangi abaalina endwadde ez’enjawulo era n’abaaliko baddayimooni bangi n’ababagobako, ne baddayimooni teyabaganya kwogera, kubanga baali bamumanyi." 
Mark1:35 Enkeera ng’obudde tebunnalaba yesu n’azuukuka n’agenda yekka mu kifo ekyekusifu, okusaba." 
Mark1:36 Awo Simooni ne be yali nabo ne bamunoonya," 
Mark1:37 bwe baamulaba ne bamugamba nti, “Buli muntu akunoonya.”" 
Mark1:38 Naye Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Tugende awalala mu byalo ebituliraanye, n’abeeyo mbabuulire, kubanga ekyo kye najjirira.”" 
Mark1:39 Awo n’abuulira mu makuŋŋaaniro ag’omu kitundu kyonna eky’e Ggaliraaya, era n’agoba ne baddayimooni." 
Mark1:40 Awo omugenge n’ajja eri Yesu ne yeegayirira ng’afukamidde mu maaso ge, n’amugamba nti, “Bwe kuba nga kwe kusiima kwo, oyinza okunnongoosa.”" 
Mark1:41 Yesu n’amusaasira, n’agolola omukono gwe, n’amukwatako, n’amugamba nti, “Nsiimye, longooka!”" 
Mark1:42 Amangwago ebigenge ne bimuwonako, n’aba mulongoofu." 
Mark1:43 Awo Yesu n’amukuutira nnyo n’amusiibula," 
Mark1:44 ng’agamba nti, “Kino tokibuulirako muntu n’omu, wabula genda weeyanjule eri kabona, oweeyo n’ekirabo Musa kye yalagira okuweebwangayo, okuba obujulirwa gye bali.”" 
Mark1:45 Naye omusajja n’atandika okwogera ku ebyo ebyamubaako, n’okubibunyisa. Yesu n’atasobola kuyingira mu kibuga mu lwatu, naye n’abeeranga mu bifo ebyekusifu. Abantu ne bajjanga gy’ali okuva mu njuyi zonna." 
Mark2:1 Awo bwe waayitawo ennaku nnyingi Yesu n’akomawo mu kibuga Kaperunawumu, ne kiwulirwa nti ali ka." 
Mark2:2 Abantu bangi ne bakuŋŋaana, ne wataba kafo wayinzika kuyisibwa kigere ku mulyango; n’ababuulira Enjiri." 
Mark2:3 Omulwadde eyali akoozimbye ne bamuleeta eri Yesu ng’asituliddwa abasajja bana. 
Mark2:4 Naye bwe balemwa okuyingiza omulwadde eyali akoozimbye olw’ekibiina ekinene ne baseluukulula ku kasolya ne bassa omulwadde ng’ali ku katanda ke. 
Mark2:5 Yesu bwe yalaba okukkiriza kwabwe, n’agamba omulwadde eyali akoozimbye nti, “Mwana wange ebibi byo bikusonyiyiddwa.”" 
Mark2:6 Naye abamu ku bannyonnyozi b’amateeka abaali batudde awo nga balowooza ku bintu bino mu mitima gyabwe ne boogera nti," 
Mark2:7 “Ono ayinza atya okwogera bw’atyo? Avvodde! Ani ayinza okusonyiwa ebibi okuggyako Katonda?” 
Mark2:8 Amangwago Yesu n’amanya mu mutima gwe bye baali boogerako bokka ne bokka n’ababuuza nti, “Lwaki mwebuuzaganya ebintu bino mu mitima gyammwe?" 
Mark2:9 Ekyangu kye kiruwa, okugamba akoozimbye nti ebibi byo bikusonyiyiddwa oba nti yimirira ositule akatanda ko otambule?" 
Mark2:10 Naye mmwe okusobola okutegeera ng’Omwana w’Omuntu alina obuyinza okusonyiwa ebibi ku nsi;” n’agamba eyali akoozimbye nti," 
Mark2:11 “Yimirira ositule akatanda ko oddeyo ewuwo.” 
Mark2:12 Awo omusajja n’asituka, amangwago n’asitula akatanda ke n’afuluma nga bonna balaba. Bonna ne bawuniikirira era ne bagulumiza Katonda, nga bagamba nti, “Kino tetukirabangako.”" 
Mark2:13 Awo Yesu n’addayo nate ku lubalama lw’ennyanja ekibiina ky’abantu ne bajja gy’ali, n’abayigiriza." 
Mark2:14 Awo bwe yali ng’atambula n’alaba Leevi mutabani wa Alufaayo ng’atudde we yasoloolezanga omusolo, n’amugamba nti, “Ngoberera.” Awo Leevi n’asituka n’amugoberera." 
Mark2:15 Awo Yesu bwe yali mu nnyumba ya Leevi nga bali ku mmere, ng’ali wamu n’abawooza, n’abalina ebibi, n’abayigirizwa be, ng’abantu bangi bamugoberedde," 
Mark2:16 abannyonnyozi b’amateeka n’Abafalisaayo ne baalaba Yesu ng’alya n’abalina ebibi n’abawooza, ne bagamba abayigirizwa be nti, “Lwaki alya n’abawooza n’abalina ebibi?”" 
Mark2:17 Yesu bwe yakiwulira n’abagamba nti, “Abalamu tebeetaaga musawo, wabula abalwadde! Sajja kuyita batuukirivu wabula abalina ebibi.”" 
Mark2:18 Abayigirizwa ba Yokaana n’ab’Abafalisaayo baali basiiba. Abantu ne bajja eri Yesu ne bamubuuza nti, “Lwaki abayigirizwa ba Yokaana n’abayigirizwa b’Abafalisaayo basiiba, naye abayigirizwa bo ne batasiiba?”" 
Mark2:19 Awo Yesu n’abaddamu nti, “Ddala ddala abali n’awasiza omugole bayinza batya okusiiba, ng’awasizza omugole ali nabo?" 
Mark2:20 Naye ekiseera kirituuka awasizza omugole bw’alibaggibwako; okuva olwo ne balyoka basiiba. 
Mark2:21 Teri muntu atunga kiwero kiggya mu lugoye olukadde kubanga ekiwero ekiggya kiyuza olugoye olukadde, n’ekituli ne kyeyongera okugaziwa." 
Mark2:22 Teri muntu ateeka mwenge musu mu nsawo z’amaliba nkadde kubanga omwenge omusu gwabya ensawo enkadde, omwenge ne guyiika, n’ensawo ne ziyulika. Naye omwenge omusu baguteeka mu nsawo mpya.”" 
Mark2:23 Awo mu biro ebyo Yesu yali ayita mu nnimiro y’emmere ey’empeke ku Ssabbiiti, abayigirizwa be ne batandika okunoga ku birimba by’emmere ey’empeke." 
Mark2:24 Abafalisaayo ne bagamba Yesu nti, “Lwaki abayigirizwa bo bakola ekitakkirizibwa ku Ssabbiiti.”" 
Mark2:25 Yesu n’abaddamu nti, “Temusomanga ku Dawudi kye yakola bwe yalina okwetaaga n’enjala ng’emuluma, ye ne be yali nabo," 
Mark2:26 bwe yayingira mu nnyumba ya Katonda mu biro bya Abiyasaali kabona omukulu, n’alya emigaati egy’okulaga n’awaako n’abo be yali nabo, egitakkirizibwa kuliibwako bantu balala okuggyako bakabona.”" 
Mark2:27 N’abagamba nti, “Ssabbiiti yateekebwawo lwa muntu, so si omuntu ku lwa Ssabbiiti." 
Mark2:28 Noolwekyo Omwana w’Omuntu ye Mukama wa Ssabbiiti.” 
Mark3:1 Awo Yesu n’ayingira nate mu kkuŋŋaaniro, nga mulimu omusajja eyalina omukono ogukaze." 
Mark3:2 Baali balindirira okulaba obanga anaamuwonya ku Ssabbiiti balyoke bamuwawaabire. 
Mark3:3 Yesu n’agamba omusajja eyalina omukono ogukaze nti, “Yimirira wakati.”" 
Mark3:4 N’abagamba nti, “Kikkirizibwa okukola ekirungi ku Ssabbiiti oba okukola ekibi? Okuwonya bulamu oba okubuzikiriza?” Naye ne batamuddamu." 
Mark3:5 Yesu n’abatunuulira ng’akambuwadde era nga munakuwavu nnyo olw’obukakanyavu bw’emitima gyabwe, n’agamba omusajja nti, “Golola omukono gwo.” N’agolola omukono gwe, ne guwona." 
Mark3:6 Amangwago Abafalisaayo ne bafuluma ne bateesa n’Abakerodiyaani nga bwe banaamuzikiriza. 
Mark3:7 Awo Yesu n’abayigirizwa be ne bagenda ku nnyanja. Ekibiina kinene ekyava mu Ggaliraaya ne mu Buyudaaya ne kimugoberera. 
Mark3:8 N’abalala ne bava mu kibuga Yerusaalemi, n’abalala mu Idumaya, n’abalala ne bava emitala w’omugga Yoludaani n’okwetooloola Ttuulo ne Sidoni ne bamugoberera. Ekibiina ky’abantu bwe baawulira bye yali akola ne bajja gy’ali." 
Mark3:9 Yesu n’agamba abayigirizwa be eryato limubeere kumpi olw’ekibiina ekinene, ekibiina kireme kumunyigiriza." 
Mark3:10 Kubanga yawonya bangi, bangi ne baagala okumugwira bamukwateko olw’endwadde zaabwe." 
Mark3:11 Awo emyoyo emibi bwe gyamulaba ne gigwa mu maaso ge nga gireekaana nga gigamba nti, “Ggwe Mwana wa Katonda.”" 
Mark3:12 Naye n’agikomako gireme okumwatuukiriza. 
Mark3:13 Awo Yesu n’alinnya ku lusozi, n’ayita abo be yayagala, ne bajja gy’ali." 
Mark3:14 N’alonda kkumi na babiri mu abo, be yafuula abatume babeerenga naye, era abatumenga okubuulira." 
Mark3:15 N’abawa n’obuyinza okugobanga baddayimooni. Ekkumi n’ababiri be yalonda be bano: 
Mark3:16 Awo n’alonda ekkumi na babiri era be bano: Simooni, gwe yatuuma “Peetero” ne" 
Mark3:17 Yakobo ne Yokaana, batabani ba Zebbedaayo, Yesu be yatuuma “Bowanerege” amakulu nti, “Abaana b’Okubwatuka.”" 
Mark3:18 Andereya, ne Firipo, ne Battolomaayo, ne Matayo, ne Tomasi, ne Yakobo, omwana wa Alufaayo ne Saddayo, ne Simooni, Omukananaayo," 
Mark3:19 ne Yuda Isukalyoti eyamulyamu olukwe. 
Mark3:20 Awo Yesu n’ayingira mu nnyumba ekibiina kinene ne bakuŋŋaanira nate w’ali, ye ne be yali nabo ne batasobola kulya." 
Mark3:21 Awo baganda be bwe baakiwulira ne bagenda bamuggyeyo, kubanga baalowooza nti alaluse." 
Mark3:22 Naye abannyonnyozi b’amateeka abaava e Yerusaalemi ne bagamba nti, “Aliko Beeruzebuli omukulu wa baddayimooni, era obuyinza bwe bw’akozesa okugoba baddayimooni.”" 
Mark3:23 Awo Yesu n’abayita n’ayogera nabo mu ngero ng’agamba nti, “Setaani ayinza atya okugoba Setaani?" 
Mark3:24 Obwakabaka bwe bwawukana tebuyinza kubaawo. 
Mark3:25 N’ennyumba eyawukanye, teyinza kubeerawo." 
Mark3:26 Ne Setaani bw’atyo bw’alwanagana yekka na yekka tayinza kubaawo. Wabula yeezikiriza yekka. 
Mark3:27 Naye tewali ayinza kuyingira mu nnyumba ya muntu w’amaanyi, okunyaga ebintu bye nga tasoose kumusiba n’alyoka anyaga ebintu bye." 
Mark3:28 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti buli kintu kyonna omuntu ky’akola kirisonyiyibwa abaana b’abantu, ebibi n’okuvvoola kwonna kwe bavvoola." 
Mark3:29 Naye buli alivvoola Mwoyo Mutukuvu talisonyiyibwa, emirembe n’emirembe naye alisingibwa omusango olw’ekibi eky’emirembe n’emirembe.”" 
Mark3:30 Yayogera atyo gye bali kubanga baagamba nti, “Aliko omwoyo omubi.”" 
Mark3:31 Awo baganda ba Yesu ne nnyina ne bajja gy’ali ebweru nga baagala okumulaba. Awo ne bamutumira bamuyite ajje ayogere nabo. 
Mark3:32 Ekibiina ky’abantu kyali kimwetoolodde, ne bamugamba nti, “Nnyoko ne baganda bo ne bannyoko bali wabweru bakunoonya.”" 
Mark3:33 Naye n’abaddamu nti, “Mmange ye ani, ne baganda bange be baani?”" 
Mark3:34 Awo bwe yeetoolooza amaaso abo abaali batudde nga bamwebunguludde, n’abagamba nti, “Bano be mulaba be bammange era be baganda bange!" 
Mark3:35 Kubanga buli muntu akola Katonda by’asiima ye muganda wange, ye mwannyinaze era ye mmange.”" 
Mark4:1 Ate era n’atandika okuyigiriza ku lubalama lw’ennyanja. Ekibiina ky’abantu kinene nnyo ne bakuŋŋaana okumwetooloola. Kyeyava alinnya mu lyato n’ayigiriza ng’atudde omwo. 
Mark4:2 Yabayigirizanga ebintu bingi mu ngero. N’abayigiriza ng’agamba nti," 
Mark4:3 “Muwulirize. Waaliwo omulimi eyafuluma okusiga ensigo. 
Mark4:4 Bwe yali ng’azimansa ng’asiga mu nnimiro, ezimu ne zigwa ku mabbali g’ekkubo ennyonyi ne zijja ne zizirya." 
Mark4:5 N’endala ne zigwa ku ttaka ery’ekyaziyazi awatali ttaka lingi, ezo ne zimera mangu kubanga tezaali mu ttaka gwanvu." 
Mark4:6 Awo omusana bwe gwayaka ne zikalirawo, kubanga emirandira gyali kungulu." 
Mark4:7 Endala ne zigwa mu maggwa. Awo ensigo ne zikula kyokka amaggwa ne gazitta ne zitabala bibala. 
Mark4:8 Endala ne zigwa ku ttaka eddungi, ezo ne zibala ebibala, ezimu emirundi amakumi asatu, endala emirundi nkaaga, n’endala kikumi.”" 
Mark4:9 N’abagamba nti, “Oyo alina amatu agawulira awulire.”" 
Mark4:10 Awo bwe yasigala yekka, abayigirizwa be ekkumi n’ababiri n’abantu abalala, ne bamubuuza amakulu g’engero ezo ze yabagerera." 
Mark4:11 Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Mmwe muweereddwa omukisa okumanya ekyama ekifa ku bwakabaka bwa Katonda ekyakisibwa abantu abalala abali ebweru waabwo.”" 
Mark4:12 “Balaba bulabi naye nga tebeetegereza, era n’okuwulira bawulira naye tebategeera, si kulwa nga bakyuka ne basonyiyibwa.”" 
Mark4:13 “Kale obanga temutegedde makulu ga lugero luno olwangu bwe luti mulitegeera mutya endala ze ŋŋenda okweyambisa nga njigiriza? 
Mark4:14 Omusizi asiga ekigambo y’asiga. 
Mark4:15 Ate ensigo ezaagwa ku mabbali g’ekkubo, be bawulira ekigambo, amangwago Setaani n’ajja n’akibatwalako." 
Mark4:16 Ate ensigo ezaagwa ku byaziyazi, gy’emitima gy’abantu abawulira ekigambo amangwago ne bakyaniriza n’essanyu." 
Mark4:17 Naye tebalina mirandira, babeera bulungi okusooka, naye olutuukibwako ebizibu oba okuyigganyizibwa olw’ekigambo amangwago babivaako." 
Mark4:18 Ate endala ezaagwa mu maggwa, be bawulira ekigambo," 
Mark4:19 naye okweraliikirira n’okusikirizibwa eby’obugagga n’okwegomba ebintu ebirala, bizikiriza ekigambo ne kitabala bibala." 
Mark4:20 Ettaka eddungi gy’emitima gy’abantu abawulira ekigambo ne bakkiririza ddala era ne bavaamu ebibala, emirundi amakumi asatu, abalala emirundi nkaaga, n’abalala kikumi.”" 
Mark4:21 Awo Yesu n’ababuuza nti, “Waliwo omuntu akoleeza ettaala n’agivuunikako ekibbo oba n’agiteeka wansi w’ekitanda? Naye omuntu bw’akoleeza ettaala tagiteeka ku kikondo waggulu?" 
Mark4:22 Kubanga buli kintu kyonna ekikolebwa mu kyama kaakano, ekiseera kirituuka ne kiragibwa mu lwatu." 
Mark4:23 Alina amatu agawulira awulire. 
Mark4:24 Naye mwegendereze ebyo bye mbayigiriza. 
Mark4:25 Alina aliweebwa na buli atalina aliggyibwako n’ebyo by’alina.” 
Mark4:26 Awo Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Obwakabaka bwa Katonda bufaanaanyirizibwa n’omusizi asiga ensigo mu ttaka." 
Mark4:27 Ekiro yeebaka, n’emisana ne yeekolera by’ayagala, mu kiseera ekyo kyonna ensigo ziba zimera, naye ate nga takimanyi." 
Mark4:28 Ku bwalyo ettaka lireeta ekibala. Ensigo zisooka kusindika bulimi bwazo okuva mu ttaka, amatabi ne gajjako ebirimba by’eŋŋaano." 
Mark4:29 Eŋŋaano bw’eyengera omusizi ayanguwa mangu n’akwata akayuuyo, kubanga amakungula gatuuse.”" 
Mark4:30 Awo Yesu n’ayongera n’abagamba nti, “Obwakabaka bwa Katonda tunaabugeraageranya na ki? Oba tukozese lugero ki okubunnyonnyola?" 
Mark4:31 Bufaananyizibwa n’akasigo aka kaladaali! Kubanga newaakubadde katono nnyo okusinga ensigo zonna ez’oku nsi," 
Mark4:32 naye kavaamu omuti omunene nga gulina amatabi amanene, ennyonyi ez’omu bbanga mwe ziyinza okuzimba ebisu byazo.”" 
Mark4:33 Yesu n’abuulira abantu ekigambo kya Katonda ng’akozesa engero nnyingi ezifaanana ng’ezo, nga bwe baasobolanga okuwulira." 
Mark4:34 Yesu bwe yabanga ayigiriza ebibiina yakozesanga engero, naye bwe yaddanga ebbali n’abayigirizwa be n’abannyonnyola amakulu agali mu ngero ezo." 
Mark4:35 Ku lunaku olwo obudde nga buwungedde Yesu n’agamba abayigirizwa be nti, “Tuwunguke tulage emitala.”" 
Mark4:36 N’aleka awo ekibiina, abayigirizwa be ne balinnya mu lyato Yesu mwe yali ne bagenda naye. Abantu abamu ne babagobera mu maato agaabwe." 
Mark4:37 Amangwago omuyaga mungi nnyo ne gukunta n’amayengo amagulumivu ne geeyiwa mu lyato ne libulako katono okujjula amazzi. 
Mark4:38 Yesu yali agalamidde emabega mu lyato nga yeezizise omutto yeebase. Awo abayigirizwa be ne bamuzuukusa nga bagamba nti, “Omuyigiriza, ggwe tofaayo nga ffenna tugenda okusaanawo?”" 
Mark4:39 N’azuukuka n’aboggolera omuyaga n’agamba ennyanja nti, “Tteeka, sirika.” Omuyaga ne gusirika n’ennyanja n’eteekera ddala." 
Mark4:40 N’ababuuza nti, “Lwaki mutidde? Temunnaba kubeera na kukkiriza?”" 
Mark4:41 Ne batya nnyo, ne beebuuza nti, “Ono ye ani, embuyaga n’ennyanja gwe bigondera?”" 
Mark5:1 Awo Yesu n’abayigirizwa be ne batuuka emitala w’ennyanja mu nsi y’Abageresene. 
Mark5:2 Yesu bwe yali yaakava mu lyato omuntu eyaliko omwoyo omubi n’ajja gy’ali ng’ava mu malaalo. 
Mark5:3 Omuntu ono yasulanga mu malaalo era yali alaluse nnyo nga tewakyali na muntu asobola kumusiba. 
Mark5:4 Emirundi mingi baagezangako okumussa ku mpingu n’okusiba amagulu ge n’enjegere naye byonna ng’abikutulakutula. Ne wataba na muntu w’amaanyi ayinza kumusiba kumunyweza. 
Mark5:5 Naye bulijjo yatambulanga emisana n’ekiro mu malaalo ne mu nsozi. Yawowoggananga nga bw’akaaba era nga bwe yeesalaasala n’amayinja. 
Mark5:6 Awo bwe yalengera Yesu ng’akyali walako ku nnyanja n’adduka n’agenda eryato we lyagoba, n’asinza Yesu." 
Mark5:7 N’aleekaana nnyo nti, “Onjagaza ki, ggwe Yesu, Omwana wa Katonda, Ali Waggulu Ennyo? Nkwegayirira, olw’ekisa kya Katonda, tombonyaabonya.”" 
Mark5:8 Kubanga Yesu yali alagidde omwoyo omubi okuva ku musajja. 
Mark5:9 Awo Yesu n’amubuuza nti, “Erinnya lyo ggw’ani?” N’addamu nti, “Erinnya lyange nze Ligyoni, kubanga tuli bangi.”" 
Mark5:10 N’amwegayirira nnyo aleme okumugoba mu kitundu ekyo. 
Mark5:11 Awo waaliwo eggana ly’embizzi nnyingi nnyo ku lusozi nga zirya. 
Mark5:12 Omwoyo omubi ne gwegayirira Yesu nti, “Tusindike mu mbizzi ziri.”" 
Mark5:13 Yesu n’abakkiriza, ne bava ku musajja ne bayingira mu ggana ly’embizzi. Awo eggana ly’embizzi lyonna ne liserengetera ku kagulungujjo ne lyeyiwa mu nnyanja, embizzi zonna ne zisaanawo." 
Mark5:14 Awo abaali bazirunda ne badduka mangu ne bagenda bategeeze ab’omu kibuga ne mu byalo ebiriraanyeewo. Abantu bangi ne bajja okulaba ebibaddewo. 
Mark5:15 Ekibiina ky’abantu ne kikuŋŋaana awali Yesu, naye bwe baalaba omusajja eyaliko ligyoni ng’ayambadde bulungi era ng’ategeera bulungi, ne batya nnyo." 
Mark5:16 Abo abaaliwo ne babategeeza ebyatuuka ku musajja eyaliko ddayimooni n’ebyatuuka ku mbizzi. 
Mark5:17 Awo abantu ne batandika okwegayirira Yesu abaviire! 
Mark5:18 Yesu bwe yali ng’alinnya mu lyato, omusajja eyali abaddeko baddayimooni n’amwegayirira bagende bonna." 
Mark5:19 Yesu n’atakkiriza, n’amugamba nti, “Ddayo ewammwe mu bantu bo obabuulire ebintu byonna Mukama by’akukoledde era nga bw’akusaasidde.”" 
Mark5:20 Awo omusajja oyo n’agenda ng’atambula mu Dekapoli (ebibuga eby’omu kitundu ekyo) ng’abuulira abantu Katonda bye yali amukoledde byonna. Bonna abaabiwulira ne bawuniikirira nnyo. 
Mark5:21 Awo Yesu n’awunguka mu lyato nate n’atuuka emitala w’ennyanja. Abantu bangi ne bakuŋŋaanira w’ali ku lubalama lw’ennyanja. 
Mark5:22 Omukulu w’ekkuŋŋaaniro erinnya lye Yayiro n’ajja n’agwa w’ali," 
Mark5:23 n’amwegayirira nnyo ng’agamba nti, “Muwala wange abulako katono okufa. Nkwegayiridde jjangu omukwateko omuwonye.”" 
Mark5:24 Awo Yesu n’agenda naye n’ekibiina ky’abantu kinene ne kimugoberera nga bagenda bamunyigiriza.
