Mark5:25 Mu kibiina omwo mwalimu omukazi eyali amaze emyaka kkumi n’ebiri nga mulwadde ekikulukuto ky’omusaayi. 
Mark5:26 Yali yeewuubye mu basawo bangi abaamujanjabanga okumala emyaka egyo gyonna; ne byonna bye yalina nga bimuweddeko, obulwadde ne butawona wabula okweyongera obweyongezi." 
Mark5:27 Yali awulidde ebikwata ku Yesu. Bw’atyo n’ajja nga yeenyigiriza mu kibiina ky’abantu n’atuuka emabega wa Yesu, n’akoma ku kyambalo kye." 
Mark5:28 Kubanga yagamba mu mutima gwe nti, “Ne bwe nnaakoma obukomi ku kyambalo kye nzija kuwona.”" 
Mark5:29 Awo olwakikomako, amangwago ekikulukuto ky’omusaayi ne kikalira n’ategeerera ddala ng’awonye." 
Mark5:30 Amangwago Yesu n’awulira ng’amaanyi agamuvuddemu, n’akyukira ekibiina ky’abantu n’abuuza nti, “Ani akutte ku kyambalo kyange?”" 
Mark5:31 Naye abayigirizwa be ne bamuddamu nti, “Ku bantu abangi bati abakunyigiriza oyinza otya okubuuza nti, ‘Ani ankutteko?’  ”" 
Mark5:32 Naye Yesu ne yeetoolooza amaaso ge mu bonna alabe oyo amukutteko. 
Mark5:33 Awo omukazi bwe yategeera ekituuseewo n’ajja eri Yesu ng’atidde nnyo era ng’akankana, n’agwa awo mu maaso ga Yesu n’amutegeeza amazima gonna." 
Mark5:34 Yesu n’agamba omukazi nti, “Omuwala, okukkiriza kwo kukuwonyezza, genda mirembe obulwadde bwo buwonedde ddala.”" 
Mark5:35 Naye yali akyayogera n’omukazi ababaka ne batuuka nga bava mu maka g’omukulu w’ekuŋŋaaniro, ne babikira Yayiro nti, “Omuwala afudde, noolwekyo tekikyetaagisa kuteganya Muyigiriza.”" 
Mark5:36 Yesu n’awulira ebigambo ebyayogerwa wabula n’agamba omukulu w’ekkuŋŋaaniro nti, “Totya, ggwe kkiriza bukkiriza.”" 
Mark5:37 Awo Yesu n’aziyiza ekibiina kyonna okugenda naye, okuggyako Peetero ne Yakobo ne Yokaana muganda wa Yakobo." 
Mark5:38 Bwe baatuuka mu nju y’omukulu w’ekkuŋŋaaniro, n’alaba okwaziirana ng’abantu bakaaba nga bakuba ebiwoobe." 
Mark5:39 Bwe yayingira mu nju n’agamba abantu nti, “Mwaziiranira ki n’okukuba ebiwoobe? Omwana tafudde naye yeebase bwebasi!”" 
Mark5:40 Awo abantu bonna ne bamusekerera nnyo. Naye n’abagamba bonna bafulume mu nju. N’atwala abazadde b’omwana n’abayigirizwa be abasatu n’ayingira nabo mu kisenge omwana mwe yali. 
Mark5:41 Yesu n’akwata omwana ku mukono n’amugamba nti, “Talisa kumi!” amakulu nti, “Omuwala golokoka!”" 
Mark5:42 Amangwago omuwala eyali aweza emyaka kkumi n’ebiri, n’ayimirira n’atambulatambula. Abaaliwo ne bawuniikirira nnyo." 
Mark5:43 Naye Yesu n’abakuutira nnyo baleme okubuulirako omuntu yenna. Awo n’abalagira bawe omwana ekyokulya. 
Mark6:1 Yesu n’ava mu kitundu ekyo n’abayigirizwa be n’addayo mu kibuga ky’ewaabwe. 
Mark6:2 Olunaku lwa Ssabbiiti bwe lwatuuka n’agenda mu kkuŋŋaaniro okuyigiriza, abantu bangi abaaliwo ne beewuunya nnyo bwe baawulira bw’ayigiriza, ne bawuniikirira ne beebuuza nti, “Bino byonna yabiyigira wa era magezi ga ngeri ki ono ge yaweebwa n’eby’amagero ebyenkanidde wano by’akola?”" 
Mark6:3 Ne beebuuza nti, “Ono si ye mwana w’omubazzi? Maliyamu si ye nnyina, ne baganda be si be ba Yakobo, ne Yose, ne Yuda ne Simooni? Ne bannyina tetubeera nabo kuno?” Ekyo ne kibatawanya mu mutima." 
Mark6:4 Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Nnabbi aweebwa ekitiibwa buli wantu okuggyako mu nsi y’ewaabwe ne mu bantu be ne mu maka ge waabwe.”" 
Mark6:5 Naye teyakolerayo byamagero bingi okuggyako abalwadde abatonotono be yakwatako n’abawonya. 
Mark6:6 N’awuniikirira nnyo okulaba nga tebamukkirizza. Awo n’agenda ng’ayigiriza mu byalo ebiriraanyeewo. 
Mark6:7 Awo Yesu n’ayita abayigirizwa be ekkumi n’ababiri n’abatuma babiri babiri era n’abawa obuyinza okugoba emyoyo emibi ku bantu. 
Mark6:8 N’abakuutira obutatwala kantu konna okuggyako omuggo ogw’okutambuza gwokka nti, “Temutwala mmere wadde akagugu newaakubadde ensimbi mu lukoba." 
Mark6:9 Mwambale engatto naye temutwala kkanzu yakubiri.” 
Mark6:10 N’abagamba nti, “Era buli nnyumba gye munaayingirangamu musulanga omwo okutuusa lwe muliva mu kibuga ekyo." 
Mark6:11 Era bwe mutuukanga mu kifo ne batabaaniriza yadde okubawuliriza, bwe mubanga muvaayo mukunkumuliranga mu kifo omwo enfuufu ey’omu bigere byammwe, okuba akabonero gye bali.”" 
Mark6:12 Awo abayigirizwa ne bagenda nga babuulira buli muntu nti, “Mwenenye.”" 
Mark6:13 Ne bagoba baddayimooni bangi ku bantu, ne basiiga abalwadde amafuta ne babawonya." 
Mark6:14 Awo Kabaka Kerode n’awulira ettutumu lya Yesu, kubanga yali ayogerwako wonna olw’ebyamagero bye yakolanga. Naye Kerode n’alowooza nti Yokaana Omubatiza y’azuukidde, kubanga abantu baayogeranga nti, “Tewali muntu mulala ayinza kukola byamagero nga bino.”" 
Mark6:15 Naye abalala ne balowooza nti, “Eriya.” N’abalala ne bagamba nti, “Nnabbi ng’omu ku bannabbi ab’edda.”" 
Mark6:16 Kerode bwe yabiwulira ye n’agamba nti, “Oyo Yokaana, omusajja gwe natemako omutwe, y’azuukide mu bafu.”" 
Mark6:17 Kubanga Kerode yennyini ye yatuma abaserikale be ne bakwata Yokaana Omubatiza ne bamuggalira mu kkomera, olwa Kerudiya muka muganda we Firipo, Kerode gwe yali awasizza." 
Mark6:18 Yokaana yagamba Kerode nti, “Si kituufu okutwala Kerudiya muka muganda wo Firipo.”" 
Mark6:19 Kerudiya n’ayagala okutta Yokaana yeesasuze, naye nga tayinza." 
Mark6:20 Kubanga Kerode yatyanga Yokaana Omubatiza, ng’amuwa ekitiibwa ng’omuntu wa Katonda ow’amazima era omutukuvu, era ng’amukuuma. Era Kerode bwe yayogeranga ne Yokaana ng’emmeeme ye tetereera, so nga yali ayagala nnyo okuwuliriza by’amugamba." 
Mark6:21 Naye olwali olwo, Kabaka Kerode n’afumba embaga ku lunaku lw’amazaalibwa ge, n’ayita abakungu be n’abakulu b’abaserikale n’abaami bonna abatutumufu mu Ggaliraaya." 
Mark6:22 Awo muwala wa Kerudiya yennyini n’ajja n’azina nnyo, n’asanyusa Kerode n’abagenyi be yali atudde nabo ku mbaga. Awo Kabaka Kerode n’agamba omuwala nti, “Nsaba kyonna ky’oyagala nange nnaakikuwa.”" 
Mark6:23 Era n’ayongera okumulayirira nti, “Kyonna kyonna ky’ononsaba yadde ekitundu ky’obwakabaka bwange nnaakikuwa!”" 
Mark6:24 Awo omuwala n’afuluma ne yeebuuza ku nnyina. Nnyina n’amugamba nti, “Saba omutwe gwa Yokaana Omubatiza!”" 
Mark6:25 Omuwala n’addayo mangu eri kabaka n’amusaba nti, “Njagala ompe kaakano, ku ssowaani, omutwe gwa Yokaana Omubatiza!”" 
Mark6:26 Kino ne kinakuwaza nnyo kabaka, n’anyiikaala nnyo, kyokka olwokubanga yali amaze okulayira n’okweyama ng’abagenyi be bawulira, n’atya okumenya obweyamo bwe." 
Mark6:27 Bw’atyo n’ayita omuserikale we, n’amulagira agende aleete omutwe gwa Yokaana. Omuserikale n’agenda mu kkomera, n’atemako Yokaana omutwe," 
Mark6:28 n’aguleeteera ku lutiba, n’aguwa omuwala n’omuwala n’agutwalira nnyina." 
Mark6:29 Abayigirizwa ba Yokaana bwe baategeera ne bajja ne baggyawo omulambo gwe, ne bagutwala ne baguziika." 
Mark6:30 Awo abatume ne bakomawo awali Yesu ne bamunnyonnyola byonna bye baakola ne bye baayigiriza. 
Mark6:31 N’abagamba nti, “Mujje tugende mu kifo eteri bantu tuwummuleko.” Kubanga baali babuliddwa n’akaseera ak’okuliiramu ku mmere olw’abantu abangi abajjanga gye bali; bano baabanga baakavaawo ate ng’abalala bajja." 
Mark6:32 Bwe batyo ne balinnya mu lyato ne bagenda mu kifo ekiwolerevu eteri bantu. 
Mark6:33 Naye abantu bangi abaava mu bibuga bingi ne babalaba nga bagenda ne bategeera gye baali bagenda ne badduka okwetooloola ku lukalu ne babeesookayo. 
Mark6:34 Yesu bwe yava mu lyato n’alaba ekibiina ky’abantu bangi abaali bakuŋŋaanye n’abasaasira nga bali ng’endiga ezitalina musumba. Awo n’atandika okubayigiriza ebintu bingi. 
Mark6:35 Awo obudde bwe bwawungeera abayigirizwa ne bajja awali Yesu ne bamugamba nti, “Ekifo kino kya ddungu ate n’obudde buwungedde." 
Mark6:36 Abantu basiibule bagende beegulire emmere mu byalo ne mu bibuga ebiriraanye wano.” 
Mark6:37 Naye Yesu n’abaddamu nti, “Mmwe mubawe ekyokulya.” Ne bamubuuza nti, “Tugende tubagulire emmere nga ya dinaali ebikumi bibiri, tugibawe balye?”" 
Mark6:38 Yesu n’ababuuza nti, “Mulina emigaati emeka? Mugende mulabe.” Bwe baamala okwetegereza ne bamugamba nti, “Waliwo emigaati etaano n’ebyennyanja bibiri.”" 
Mark6:39 Awo Yesu n’alagira abantu bonna batuule wansi ku muddo mu bibinja. 
Mark6:40 Awo ne batuula mu bibinja, eby’abantu ataano ataano, awalala kikumi kikumi." 
Mark6:41 Yesu n’atoola emigaati etaano n’ebyennyanja ebibiri n’ayimusa amaaso ge eri eggulu ne yeebaza Katonda. N’amenyaamenya emigaati n’ebyennyanja ebibiri, n’abiwa abayigirizwa be ne bagabula abantu bonna ne babuna." 
Mark6:42 Bonna ne balya ne bakkuta. 
Mark6:43 Ne bakuŋŋaanya obukunkumuka bw’emigaati n’obw’ebyennyanja ebisero kkumi na bibiri. 
Mark6:44 Abasajja abaalya emigaati baali enkumi ttaano. 
Mark6:45 Amangwago Yesu n’alagira abayigirizwa be basaabale mu lyato bawunguke bagende emitala w’ennyanja e Besusayida abasange eyo, ng’amaze okusiibula ebibiina by’abantu." 
Mark6:46 Bwe yamala okubasiibula n’alinnya ku lusozi okusaba. 
Mark6:47 Awo obudde bwe bwawungeera, Yesu ng’asigadde yekka ku lukalu," 
Mark6:48 n’abalengera nga bategana n’eryato kubanga waaliwo omuyaga mungi n’amayengo amagulumivu ebyabafuluma mu maaso gye baali balaga. Awo obudde bwali bunaatera okukya nga ku ssaawa mwenda ez’ekiro, n’ajja gye bali ng’atambulira ku mazzi, n’aba ng’ayagala okubayitako." 
Mark6:49 Naye bwe baamulaba ng’atambulira ku nnyanja ne baleekaana nnyo, bonna, nga batidde, kubanga baalowooza nti muzimu," 
Mark6:50 kubanga bonna baamulaba ne batya. Naye n’ayanguwa okwogera nabo, n’abagamba nti, “Mugume omwoyo. Ye Nze, temutya.”" 
Mark6:51 Awo n’alinnya mu lyato, omuyaga ne gulekeraawo okukunta! Abayigirizwa be ne bawuniikirira nnyo." 
Mark6:52 Tebategeera kyamagero eky’emigaati kubanga emitima gyabwe gyali mikakanyavu. 
Mark6:53 Awo eryato lyabwe bwe lyagoba ku lubalama lw’ennyanja Genesaleeti," 
Mark6:54 ne bavaamu. Abantu bwe balaba Yesu, amangwago ne bamutegeererawo." 
Mark6:55 Ne babuna mu bitundu ebyali biriraanyeewo nga bamuleetera abalwadde nga basituliddwa ku butanda. 
Mark6:56 Wonna wonna gye yagendanga, mu byalo, mu bibuga, mu butale ne ku nguudo ne baleeta abalwadde ne bamwegayirira waakiri bakwateko bukwasi ku lukugiro lw’ekyambalo kye. Era bonna abaakikwatako ne bawona." 
Mark7:1 Awo abafalisaayo n’abannyonnyozi b’amateeka abamu abaali bavudde e Yerusaalemi ne bakuŋŋaanira awali Yesu. 
Mark7:2 Ne balaba abamu ku bayigirizwa be nga balya tebanaabye mu ngalo. 
Mark7:3 Kubanga Abafalisaayo n’Abayudaaya bonna tebaalyanga nga tebasoose kunaaba mu ngalo n’obwegendereza ng’empisa zaabwe bwe zaali. 
Mark7:4 Era bwe baddanga eka nga bava mu katale, ekyo kye baasookanga okukola nga tebannaba kukwata ku kyakulya kyonna. Waliwo n’obulombolombo obulala bwe baagobereranga ng’okulongoosa ensuwa zaabwe, n’ebikopo, n’ebbinika n’essowaani, n’ebirala bingi." 
Mark7:5 Awo Abafalisaayo n’abannyonnyozi b’amateeka ne babuuza Yesu nti, “Lwaki abayigirizwa bo tebagoberera mpisa za bajjajjaffe ez’edda? Kubanga balya nga tebanaabye mu ngalo.”" 
Mark7:6 Yesu n’abaddamu nti, “Bannanfuusi mmwe! Nnabbi Isaaya yaboogerako bulungi ebyobunnabbi bwe yagamba nti, “ ‘Abantu bano banzisaamu ekitiibwa kya ku mimwa, naye emitima gyabwe tegindiiko." 
Mark7:7 Okusinza kwabwe tekuliimu nsa; kubanga bayigiriza bulombolombo bwabwe.’ 
Mark7:8 Muleka ebiragiro ebiva eri Katonda ne mugoberera obulombolombo bw’abantu.” 
Mark7:9 N’abagamba nate nti, “Munyooma ekiragiro kya Katonda, ne muggumiza obulombolombo bwammwe." 
Mark7:10 Musa yagamba nti, ‘Kitaawo ne nnyoko obassangamu ekitiibwa.’ Era n’agamba nti, ‘Omuntu yenna ayogera obubi ku kitaawe oba nnyina anattibwanga.’" 
Mark7:11 Naye mmwe mugamba nti kituufu omuntu okulagajjalira bakadde be nga bali mu kwetaaga n’abagamba bugambi nti, ‘Mmunsonyiwe, kubanga kye nandibawadde ye Korubaani.’ ”" 
Mark7:12 “Omuntu temumukkiriza kubeerako ky’akolera kitaawe oba nnyina. 
Mark7:13 Bwe mutyo munyooma ekigambo kya Katonda mulyoke mutuukirize obulombolombo bwammwe bwe mwaweebwa. N’ebirala bingi ebiri ng’ebyo bye mukola.” 
Mark7:14 Awo Yesu n’ayita ekibiina ky’abantu n’abagamba nti, “Mmwe mwenna, mumpulirize, era mutegeere." 
Mark7:15 Ebintu ebiyingira mu muntu si bye byonoona empisa ze, wabula ebyo ebiva mu mutima gwe bye bizoonoona." 
Mark7:16 (Omuntu alina amatu agawulira awulirize.)” 
Mark7:17 Yesu n’aviira ekibiina n’ayingira mu nnyumba, abayigirizwa be ne bamubuuza amakulu g’ebigambo bye yayogera." 
Mark7:18 N’abaddamu nti, “Nammwe temutegedde? Temutegeera nti buli kintu ekiyingira mu muntu si kye kimwonoona?" 
Mark7:19 Olw’okuba nga tekiyingira mu mutima gwe naye kiyingira mu lubuto lwe ne kiryoka kigenda mu kabuyonjo.” Mu kwogera atyo Yesu yakakasa nga buli kyakulya bwe kiri ekirongoofu. 
Mark7:20 Era n’ayongerako na bino nti, “Ebirowoozo by’omuntu bye bimwonoona." 
Mark7:21 Kubanga mu mutima gw’omuntu mwe muva ebirowoozo ebibi eby’obukaba, n’obubbi, n’obutemu, n’obwenzi," 
Mark7:22 n’okwegomba, n’omutima omubi, n’obukuusa, n’obumenyi bw’amateeka, n’obuggya, n’okusekeeterera, n’obusirusiru." 
Mark7:23 Ebibi bino byonna biva munda mu muntu ne bimwonoona.” 
Mark7:24 Awo Yesu n’alaga mu bitundu by’e Ttuulo, n’atayagala kitegeerekeke nti ali mu bitundu ebyo, naye ne kitasoboka." 
Mark7:25 Omukazi eyalina muwala we ng’aliko omwoyo omubi, olwawulira nga Yesu yaakatuuka, n’ajja eri Yesu, n’agwa ku bigere bye." 
Mark7:26 Omukazi teyali Muyudaaya, yali Musulofoyiniiki, n’amwegayirira agobe dayimooni ku mwana we." 
Mark7:27 Yesu n’agamba omukazi nti, “Omwana asaana asoke akkute, kubanga tekiba kituufu okuddira emmere y’omwana okugisuulira embwa.”" 
Mark7:28 Naye omukazi n’amuddamu nti, “Ekyo bwe kiri, ssebo, naye era n’embwa ezibeera wansi mu mmeeza, ziweebwa ku bukunkumuka obuva ku ssowaani z’abaana.”" 
Mark7:29 Yesu n’amugamba nti, “Olw’ekigambo ekyo, weddireyo eka, kubanga dayimooni avudde ku muwala wo.”" 
Mark7:30 Omukazi bwe yaddayo eka yasanga muwala we agalamidde awo ku kitanda, nga muteefu era nga dayimooni amuvuddeko." 
Mark7:31 Yesu bwe yava mu Ttuulo n’agenda e Sidoni, eyo gye yava n’addayo ku nnyanja ey’e Ggaliraaya ng’ayitira mu “Bibuga Ekkumi” (Dekapoli)." 
Mark7:32 Awo ne bamuleetera omusajja omuggavu w’amatu ate nga tayogera, abantu bonna ne beegayirira Yesu amusseeko emikono gye amuwonye." 
Mark7:33 Yesu n’aggya omusajja mu bantu n’amulaza wabbali, n’assa engalo ze mu matu g’omusajja; n’awanda amalusu, n’agasiiga n’olunwe lwe ku lulimi lw’omusajja." 
Mark7:34 Awo Yesu n’atunula waggulu n’assa ekikkowe, n’alyoka alagira omusajja nti, “Efasa!” ekitegeeza nti, “Gguka.”" 
Mark7:35 Amangwago amatu g’omusajja ne gagguka n’awulira buli kintu era n’ayogera bulungi! 
Mark7:36 Yesu n’akuutira ekibiina baleme kutegeezaako balala ku bigambo ebyo okubisaasaanya, naye bo ne beeyongera okutegeeza." 
Mark7:37 Kye yakola kyali kibayitiriddeko. Ne boogera nga batenda Yesu nti, “Buli ky’akola kya kyewuunyo, aggula n’amatu ga bakiggala n’ayogeza ne bakasiru!”" 
Mark8:1 Mu biseera ebyo, ebibiina ne byeyongera obunene nate, abantu emmere n’ebaggwaako. Yesu n’ayita abayigirizwa be n’abagamba nti," 
Mark8:2 “Abantu bano bankwasa ekisa, kubanga baakamala nange ennaku ssatu, naye tebalina kyakulya." 
Mark8:3 Singa mbasiibula baddeyo ewaabwe nga tebalidde, enjala ejja kubasuula ku kkubo! Ate abamu bava wala.”" 
Mark8:4 Abayigirizwa ne bamubuuza nti, “Emigaati tunaagiggya wa wano mu ddungu eginaamala abantu bano bonna?”" 
Mark8:5 Yesu n’ababuuza nti, “Mulinawo emigaati emeka?” Ne baddamu nti, “Musanvu.”" 
Mark8:6 Awo Yesu n’alagira abantu batuule wansi. N’addira emigaati omusanvu, ne yeebaza Katonda, n’agimenyaamenyamu, n’agiwa abayigirizwa be ne bagitwalira ekibiina ne babagabula." 
Mark8:7 Era baalina wo n’ebyennyanja bitono, nabyo Yesu n’abiwa omukisa n’agamba abayigirizwa be babigabule abantu." 
Mark8:8 Abantu bonna ne balya okutuusa lwe bakkuta, ne bakuŋŋaanya ebyabalema ebisero musanvu ebijjudde." 
Mark8:9 Mu kibiina ekyo mwalimu abantu ng’enkumi nnya. N’abasiibula. 
Mark8:10 Amangwago n’asaabala mu lyato n’abayigirizwa be n’ajja mu kitundu eky’e Dalumanusa. 
Mark8:11 Abafalisaayo ne bajja gy’ali ne batandika okuwakana naye nga banoonya akabonero akava mu ggulu nga bamugezesa. 
Mark8:12 Yesu n’assa ekikkowe, n’abagamba nti, “Lwaki omulembe guno gunoonya akabonero? Ddala ddala mbagamba nti, Tewali kabonero kajja kuweebwa mulembe guno.”" 
Mark8:13 N’abaviira n’asaabala mu lyato n’alaga ku ludda olulala olw’ennyanja. 
Mark8:14 Abayigirizwa beerabira okutwala emigaati egiwera; baalina omugaati gumu gwokka mu lyato. 
Mark8:15 Yesu n’abakuutira nti, “Mwekuume ekizimbulukusa eky’Abafalisaayo n’ekizimbulukusa ekya Kerode.”" 
Mark8:16 Ne boogeraganya bokka ne bokka nti tebalina migaati. 
Mark8:17 Yesu bwe yakimanya n’abagamba nti, “Lwaki mugambagana nti temulina migaati? Era temunnategeera? Emitima gyammwe gikyali mikakanyavu?" 
Mark8:18 Lwaki temulaba, ate nga mulina amaaso? Lwaki temuwulira ate nga mulina amatu? Temujjukira?" 
Mark8:19 Mwerabidde emigaati etaano gye namenyamenyamu okuliisa abantu enkumi ettaano? Ebisero byali bimeka eby’obukunkumuka bye mwakuŋŋaanya?” Ne baddamu nti, “Kkumi na bibiri.”" 
Mark8:20 N’ababuuza nti, “Ate abantu bwe baali enkumi ennya n’emigaati omusanvu, mwakuŋŋaanya ebisero by’obutundutundu bwe baalemwa bimeka?” Ne baddamu nti, “Musanvu.”" 
Mark8:21 N’abagamba nti, “Era temunnategeera?”" 
Mark8:22 Awo bwe baatuuka mu Besusayida, ne wabaawo abantu abaamuleetera omusajja omuzibe w’amaaso, ne bamwegayirira amukwateko." 
Mark8:23 Yesu n’akwata omuzibe w’amaaso ku mukono n’amufulumya ebweru w’akabuga ako. N’awanda amalusu ku maaso g’omusajja n’agakwatako, n’amubuuza nti, “Kaakano waliwo ky’olaba?”" 
Mark8:24 Omusajja n’amagamaga, n’addamu nti, “Yee! Ndaba abantu kyokka balabika ng’emiti egitambula.”" 
Mark8:25 Yesu n’ayongera okukwata ku maaso g’omusajja, omusajja n’azibuka amaaso n’awonera ddala buli kintu n’akiraba bulungi." 
Mark8:26 Yesu n’amutuma mu maka g’ewaabwe ng’amugamba nti, “Toddayo mu kyalo.”" 
Mark8:27 Awo Yesu n’abayigirizwa be, ne bagenda mu bubuga obw’e Kayisaliya ekya Firipo. Naye bwe baali batambula, Yesu n’ababuuza nti, “Abantu bampita ani?”" 
Mark8:28 Abayigirizwa be ne bamuddamu nti, “Yokaana Omubatiza, abalala Eriya, naye abalala nti omu ku bannabbi.”" 
Mark8:29 Kwe kubabuuza nti, “Naye mmwe mumpita ani?” Peetero n’addamu nti, “Ggwe Kristo.”" 
Mark8:30 Naye Yesu n’abakuutira baleme okukibuulirako omuntu yenna! 
Mark8:31 Awo Yesu n’atandika okubabuulira nti, “Kigwanidde Omwana w’Omuntu okubonaabona ennyo, n’okugaanibwa abakadde, ne bakabona abakulu n’abannyonnyozi b’amateeka, n’okuttibwa, n’oluvannyuma lw’ennaku ssatu okuzuukira.”" 
Mark8:32 Yayogera nabo ku nsonga zino zonna mu lwatu, Peetero kyeyava amuzza wabbali n’atandika okumunenya." 
Mark8:33 Yesu n’akyuka n’atunuulira abayigirizwa be, n’alyoka anenya Peetero nti, “Setaani dda ennyuma wange, kubanga tolowooza ku bya Katonda wabula olowooza ku by’abantu.”" 
Mark8:34 Awo Yesu n’ayita ekibiina wamu n’abayigirizwa be, n’abagamba nti, “Obanga waliwo omuntu ayagala okungoberera, asaanidde okwefiiriza asitule omusaalaba gwe alyoke angoberere." 
Mark8:35 Kubanga buli eyeemalira ku bulamu bwe, alibufiirwa. Naye oyo awaayo obulamu bwe ku lwange ne ku lw’Enjiri alibuwonya." 
Mark8:36 Kale omuntu agasibwa ki singa alya ensi yonna, naye n’afiirwa obulamu bwe?" 
Mark8:37 Omuntu ayinza kuweebwa ki, akiwanyise olw’obulamu bwe?" 
Mark8:38 Era buli muntu yenna ankwatirwa ensonyi, n’ebigambo byange ne bimukwasa ensonyi mu mulembe guno ogutali mwesigwa era ogujjudde ebibi, Omwana w’Omuntu alimukwatirwa ensonyi bw’alijja mu kitiibwa kya Kitaawe ne bamalayika abatukuvu.”" 
Mark9:1 Awo Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Ddala ddala mbagamba nti, Abamu ku bantu abali wano tebalifa okuggyako nga bamaze okulaba obwakabaka bwa Katonda nga bujja n’amaanyi.”" 
Mark9:2 Bwe waayitawo ennaku mukaaga Yesu n’atwala Peetero ne Yakobo ne Yokaana n’abakulembera ne bagenda ku ntikko y’olusozi oluwanvu ne babeera eyo bokka. Amangwago n’afuusibwa nga balaba," 
Mark9:3 ebyambalo bye ne byeruka nnyo, nga tewali muntu ku nsi asobola kubyoza kubituusa awo!" 
Mark9:4 Awo Eriya ne Musa ne babalabikira ne batandika okwogera ne Yesu! 
Mark9:5 Peetero n’agamba Yesu nti, “Labbi, kirungi tubeere wano, tubazimbire ensiisira ssatu, emu nga yiyo, n’endala nga ya Musa, n’endala nga ya Eriya.”" 
Mark9:6 Yayogera atyo olw’okutya okungi okwabajjira. 
Mark9:7 Awo ne walabika ekire, ne kibasaanikira ne muvaamu eddoboozi ne ligamba nti, “Ono ye Mwana wange omwagalwa. Mumuwulirirenga.”" 
Mark9:8 Amangwago okugenda okukyusa amaaso gaabwe nga tewali muntu mulala okuggyako Yesu eyaliwo yekka nabo. 
Mark9:9 Bwe baali baserengeta olusozi, Yesu n’abakuutira ekyo kye balabye obutakyogerangako okutuusa ng’Omwana w’Omuntu amaze okuzuukira mu bafu." 
Mark9:10 Bwe batyo nabo ne bakikuuma nga kya kyama, naye ne beebuuzaganya ku by’okufa n’okuzuukira kwe." 
Mark9:11 Awo ne bamubuuza nti, “Lwaki abannyonnyozi b’amateeka bagamba nti Eriya asaanira asooke okujja.”" 
Mark9:12 Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Weewaawo Eriya y’ateekwa okusooka okujja alongoose ebintu byonna. Lwaki kyawandiikibwa ku Mwana w’Omuntu nti ateekwa okubonaabona ennyo n’okunyoomebwa?" 
Mark9:13 Naye mbagamba nti, Ddala ddala Eriya yajja! Naye yayisibwa bubi nnyo, nga bwe baayagala, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa ku ye.”" 
Mark9:14 Yesu n’abayigirizwa bali abasatu bwe bakka eri bannaabwe okuva ku lusozi, ne basanga ekibiina kinene nga kyetoolodde bannaabwe, abannyonnyozi b’amateeka nga bawakana nabo." 
Mark9:15 Amangwago ekibiina kyonna bwe kyamulaba, ne badduka ne bagenda gy’ali ne bamwaniriza." 
Mark9:16 Yesu n’ababuuza nti, “Kiki kye muwakana nabo?”" 
Mark9:17 Omu ku basajja abaali mu kibiina ne yeesowolayo n’agamba nti, “Omuyigiriza, naleese wano omwana wange omuwonye. Tayinza kwogera aliko omwoyo omubi." 
Mark9:18 Era buli lwe gumulumba gumusuula wansi, n’abimba ejjovu ku mimwa n’aluma amannyo, olwo yenna n’akakanyala. Nsabye abayigirizwa bo bagumugobeko, naye ne balemwa.”" 
Mark9:19 Yesu n’agamba nti, “Mmwe, omulembe ogutakkiriza ndituusa ddi okubeera nammwe? Mbagumiikirize kutuusa ddi? Mumundeetere wano.”" 
Mark9:20 Ne bamumuleetera. Omwoyo bwe gwamulaba ne gusikambula omulenzi, ne gumusuula wansi, nga bwe yeevulungula nga bw’abimba n’ejjovu ku mimwa." 
Mark9:21 Yesu n’abuuza kitaawe w’omwana nti, “Kino kimaze bbanga ki?” Kitaawe n’addamu nti, “Okuviira ddala mu buto." 
Mark9:22 Oluusi gumusuula mu muliro oluusi mu mazzi nga gwagala okumutta. Obanga olina ky’osobola okutukolera, tusaasire.”" 
Mark9:23 Yesu n’amuddamu nti, “Obanga osobola! Buli kimu kisoboka eri oyo akkiriza.”" 
Mark9:24 Amangwago Kitaawe w’omwana n’ayogerera waggulu nti, “Nzikiriza, naye nnyamba okukkiriza kwange kweyogereko!”" 
Mark9:25 Yesu bwe yalaba ng’ekibiina kyeyongera obunene, n’aboggolera dayimooni nti, “Ggwe omwoyo omubi ogutayogera era omuggavu gw’amatu nkulagira muveeko, era tomuddiranga.”" 
Mark9:26 Awo omwoyo ne guwowoggana nnyo, ne gumusikambula nnyo, ne gumuvaako n’aba ng’afudde, bangi ne balowooza nti afudde." 
Mark9:27 Naye Yesu n’amukwata ku mukono n’amuyimiriza. 
Mark9:28 Awo Yesu bwe yayingira mu nnyumba abayigirizwa be, ne bamubuuza mu kyama nti, “Lwaki ffe tetwasobodde kumugoba?”" 
Mark9:29 N’addamu nti, “Ogw’engeri eno teguyinza kugenda awatali kusaba.”" 
Mark9:30 Bwe baava mu bitundu ebyo ne bayita mu Ggaliraaya. Yesu yali tayagala muntu yenna kumanya. 
Mark9:31 Kubanga yali ayigiriza abayigirizwa ng’abagamba nti, “Omwana w’Omuntu, ajja kuliibwamu olukwe era ajja kuweebwayo mu mikono gy’abantu abalimutta era nga wayise ennaku ssatu alizuukira.”" 
Mark9:32 Wabula tebaategeera bye yayogera ate ne batya okumubuuza. 
Mark9:33 Awo ne batuuka e Kaperunawumu. Bwe baali mu nnyumba, n’ababuuza nti, “Mubadde muwakana ku ki mu kkubo?”" 
Mark9:34 Naye ne basirika kubanga mu kkubo baawakanira asinga ekitiibwa mu bo! 
Mark9:35 Awo bwe yatuula n’ayita ekkumi n’ababiri, n’abagamba nti, “Omuntu yenna bw’ayagala okuba oweekitiibwa okusinga banne, asaana yeetoowaze era abe omuweereza w’abalala.”" 
Mark9:36 N’addira omwana omuto n’amussa wakati waabwe, n’amusitula mu mikono gye n’abagamba nti," 
Mark9:37 “Buli asembeza omwana omuto ng’ono mu linnya lyange, aba asembezezza nze. N’oyo asembeza nze aba tasembezezza nze nzekka, wabula aba asembezezza n’oyo eyantuma.”" 
Mark9:38 Yokaana n’amugamba nti, “Omuyigiriza, twalaba omuntu ng’agoba baddayimooni mu linnya lyo, ne tumuziyiza kubanga tayita naffe.”" 
Mark9:39 Naye Yesu n’amuddamu nti, “Temumuziyizanga, kubanga tewali muntu n’omu akola ebikolwa eby’amaanyi mu linnya lyange ate amangwago n’anjogerako bibi." 
Mark9:40 Kubanga buli atatuvuganya aba akolera wamu naffe. 
Mark9:41 Buli abawa eggiraasi y’amazzi okunywako mu linnya lyange kubanga muli bantu ba Kristo, ddala ddala mbagamba nti talirema kuweebwa mpeera.”" 
Mark9:42 “Na buli alyesittaza omu ku bato bano abanzikiriza, ekyandisinze, kwe kumusiba ejjinja ery’olubengo olunene, n’asuulibwa mu nnyanja." 
Mark9:43 Obanga omukono gwo gukwesittaza, gutemeko! Kisinga okuyingira mu bulamu ng’ogongobadde okusinga okuba n’emikono ebiri n’olaga mu ggeyeena," 
Mark9:44 mu muliro ogutazikira. 
Mark9:45 Era obanga ekigere kyo kikwesittaza, kitemeko; okuba omulema n’oyingira mu bulamu kisinga okuba n’ebigere ebibiri n’osuulibwa mu ggeyeena" 
Mark9:46 envunyu gye zitafa mu muliro ogutazikira. 
Mark9:47 Era obanga eriiso lyo likwesittaza, liggyeemu! Kisinga okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda ng’oli wa liiso limu okusinga okubeera n’amaaso go gombi," 
Mark9:48 n’osuulibwa mu ggeyeena, “envunyu gye zitafa n’omuliro gye gutazikira." 
Mark9:49 Buli muntu aliyisibwa mu muliro, ng’emmere bwerungibwamu omunnyo.”" 
Mark9:50 “Omunnyo mulungi, naye bwe guggwaamu ensa, guzzibwamu gutya obuka bwagwo? Noolwekyo mube n’omunnyo mu mmwe era mubeerenga n’emirembe buli muntu ne munne.”" 
Mark10:1 Awo n’agolokoka n’ava eyo n’alaga mu kitundu kya Buyudaaya okusukka emitala wa Yoludaani. Ebibiina ne bimuguberera era naye n’abayigiriza nga bwe yakolanga bulijjo. 
Mark10:2 Abamu ku Bafalisaayo ne bajja ne bamubuuza balyoke bamukwase, nga babuuza nti, “Kikkirizibwa omusajja okugoba mukazi we?”" 
Mark10:3 Yesu n’addamu nti, “Musa yagamba atya ku nsonga eyo?”" 
Mark10:4 Ne bamuddamu nti, “Musa yawa omusajja olukusa okuwandiikira mukyala we ebbaluwa emugoba.”" 
Mark10:5 Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Olw’obukakanyavu bw’emitima gyammwe, kyeyava abawandiikira etteeka lino." 
Mark10:6 Naye okuva ku lubereberye yabatonda omusajja n’omukazi. 
Mark10:7 Omusajja ky’anaavanga aleka kitaawe ne nnyina, n’agenda n’agattibwa ne mukazi we." 
Mark10:8 Olwo nga tebakyali babiri, wabula nga bafuuse omubiri gumu." 
Mark10:9 Noolwekyo Katonda be yagatta awamu, omuntu tabaawukanyanga.”" 
Mark10:10 Bwe baali mu nnyumba, abayigirizwa be, ne bongera okumubuuza ku nsonga eyo." 
Mark10:11 Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Omusajja bw’agobanga mukazi we n’awasa omukazi omulala, aba ayenze." 
Mark10:12 N’omukazi bw’ayawukananga ne bba n’afumbirwa omusajja omulala naye aba ayenze.” 
Mark10:13 Awo Yesu ne bamuleetera abaana abato abakwateko, naye abayigirizwa be ne bajunga abaabaleeta." 
Mark10:14 Kyokka Yesu bwe yabiraba n’anyiigira nnyo abayigirizwa be, n’abagamba nti, “Abaana mubaleke bajje gye ndi, temubagaana kubanga abali nga bano, be bannannyini bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
Mark10:15 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti omuntu yenna atakkiriza bwakabaka bwa Katonda ng’omwana omuto, tagenda kubuyingira n’akatono.”" 
Mark10:16 Awo n’asitula abaana n’abassaako emikono gye, n’abawa omukisa." 
Mark10:17 Awo Yesu bwe yali ng’atambula, omusajja n’ajja gy’ali ng’adduka, n’amufukaamirira n’amubuuza nti, “Omuyigiriza omulungi, nsaanidde kukola ki okufuna obulamu obutaggwaawo?”" 
Mark10:18 Yesu n’amuddamu nti, “Ompitira ki omulungi? Tewali mulungi n’omu wabula Katonda yekka." 
Mark10:19 Amateeka gano ogamanyi. ‘Tottanga, toyendanga, tobbanga, towaayirizanga, kitaawo ne nnyoko obassangamu ekitiibwa.’ ”" 
Mark10:20 N’amuddamu nti, “Omuyigiriza, ebyo byonna simenyangako na kimu okuva mu buvubuka bwange.”" 
Mark10:21 Yesu n’amutunuulira enkaliriza, n’amwagala. N’amugamba nti, “Waliwo ekintu kimu kyokka ekikubulako, era kye kino: genda otunde ebintu byonna by’olina, ensimbi z’onoggyamu ozigabire abaavu, oliba n’obugagga mu ggulu, olyoke ojje ongoberere.”" 
Mark10:22 Bwe yawulira ebigambo ebyo n’anyiikaala, n’agenda ng’anakuwadde, kubanga yali mugagga nnyo." 
Mark10:23 Yesu n’amutunuulira ng’agenda, n’alyoka akyukira abayigirizwa be, n’abagamba nti, “Nga kizibu nnyo abagagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda!”" 
Mark10:24 Kino ne kibeewuunyisa nnyo. Yesu n’ayongera n’abagamba nti, “Abaana abaagalwa, nga kizibu abo abeesiga obugagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda!" 
Mark10:25 Kyangu eŋŋamira okuyita mu nnyindo y’empiso okusinga omugagga okuyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda.” 
Mark10:26 Ne beewuunya nnyo nga bwe beebuuzaganya nti, “Olwo kale ani ayinza okulokolebwa!”" 
Mark10:27 Yesu n’abatunuulira enkaliriza n’abaddamu nti, “Eri abantu tekiyinzika. Naye eri Katonda, buli kintu kyonna kisoboka.”" 
Mark10:28 Awo Peetero n’agamba Yesu nti, “Tweresa byonna ne tukugoberera.”" 
Mark10:29 Yesu n’amuddamu nti, “Njagala okubakakasiza ddala nti, Tewali muntu n’omu eyali yeeresezza ekintu kyonna, ng’amaka, abooluganda, bannyina, nnyina, kitaawe, abaana be, oba ettaka n’amayumba olw’okunjagala n’okubuulira Enjiri," 
Mark10:30 ataliddizibwawo emirundi kikumi mu mulembe guno amaka, abooluganda, bannyina, nnyina, abaana, ettaka awamu n’okuyigganyizibwa! Ebyo byonna biriba bibye ku nsi kuno, ate ne mu nsi egenda okujja afunemu obulamu obutaliggwaawo." 
Mark10:31 Naye bangi aboolubereberye baliba abooluvannyuma, n’ab’oluvannyuma baliba aboolubereberye.”" 
Mark10:32 Awo bwe baali nga bali mu kkubo, nga bagenda e Yerusaalemi, Yesu ng’akulembeddemu, abayigirizwa be ne bamuvaako emabega nga bamugoberera naye nga bajjudde okutya n’okweraliikirira. Yesu n’abazza wa bbali, n’abannyonnyola byonna ebyali bijja okumutuukako nga batuuse mu Yerusaalemi." 
Mark10:33 N’ababuulira nti, “Bwe tunaatuuka eyo, Omwana w’Omuntu aliweebwayo, atwalibwe mu maaso ga bakabona abakulu n’abannyonnyozi b’amateeka. Bajja kumusalira omusango ogw’okufa era balimuwaayo eri Abamawanga bamusalire ekibonerezo eky’okufa." 
Mark10:34 Bajja kumuduulira bamuwandire n’amalusu bamukube embooko era bamutte, naye nga wayiseewo ennaku ssatu alizuukira.”" 
Mark10:35 Awo Yakobo ne Yokaana, batabani ba Zebbedaayo ne bajja eri Yesu ne boogera naye mpola mu kyama nti. “Omuyigiriza, waliwo ekintu kye tukusaba otukolere.”" 
Mark10:36 N’ababuuza nti, “Kiki ekyo?”" 
Mark10:37 Ne bamuddamu nti, “Tusaba mu bwakabaka bwo tutuule ku ntebe eziriraanye eyiyo, omu atuule ku mukono gwo ogwa ddyo n’omulala ku gwa kkono?”" 
Mark10:38 Naye Yesu n’abaddamu nti, “Kye musaba temukitegeera! Musobola okunywa ku kikompe eky’okubonaabona kye ŋŋenda okunywako? Oba okubatizibwa mu kubonaabona nga bwe ŋŋenda okubatizibwa?”" 
Mark10:39 Ne bamuddamu nti, “Tusobola.” Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Okunywa ku kikompe kyange mugenda kukinywako era mulibatizibwa ne mu kubatizibwa kwange." 
Mark10:40 Naye sirina buyinza kubatuuza ku ntebe eziriraanye eyange. Enteekateeka eyo yamala dda okukolebwa.” 
Mark10:41 Abayigirizwa bali ekkumi bwe baategeera Yakobo ne Yokaana kye baasaba, ne babanyiigira nnyo." 
Mark10:42 Yesu n’abayita n’abagamba nti, “Mumanyi ng’abakulembeze b’abamawanga, n’abakulu baabwe bakuluusanya abantu," 
Mark10:43 naye mu mmwe si bwe kiri bwe kityo. Yenna ayagala okuba omukulembeze mu mmwe, asaanira abeerenga muweereza wa banne." 
Mark10:44 Ne buli ayagala okuba omwami mu mmwe, asaana abeere muddu wa banne bonna." 
Mark10:45 N’Omwana w’Omuntu, teyajja ku nsi kuweerezebwa, wabula okuweereza abalala, era n’okuwaayo obulamu bwe ng’omutango okununula abangi.”" 
Mark10:46 Awo Yesu n’abayigirizwa be ne batuuka mu Yeriko. Oluvannyuma bwe baali bava mu kibuga ekibiina kinene ne kibagoberera. Waaliwo omusajja omuzibe w’amaaso, erinnya lye Battimaayo (mutabani wa Timaayo) eyasabirizanga, eyali atudde ku mabbali g’oluguudo." 
Mark10:47 Awo Battimaayo bwe yategeera nga Yesu Omunnazaaleesi ajja okuyita we yali, n’atandika okuleekaana nti, “Yesu, Omwana wa Dawudi, onsaasire!”" 
Mark10:48 Abamu ku bantu abaali mu kibiina ne bamuboggolera nti, “Sirika! Totuleekaanira!” Naye ye ne yeeyongera bweyongezi okukoowoola ng’addiŋŋana nti, “Ayi Omwana wa Dawudi, onsaasire!”" 
Mark10:49 Yesu n’ayimirira n’ayogera nti, “Mumuyite.” Ne bayita omuzibe w’amaaso nti, “Guma omwoyo, situka akuyita!”" 
Mark10:50 Battimaayo n’asuula eri ekikooti kye, n’asituka mangu n’ajja eri Yesu." 
Mark10:51 Yesu n’amubuuza nti, “Oyagala nkukolere ki?” Omuzibe w’amaaso n’addamu nti, “Ayi Omuyigiriza, njagala nsobole okulaba!”" 
Mark10:52 Awo Yesu n’amugamba nti, “Ggenda, okukkiriza kwo kukuwonyezza.” Amangwago omusajja n’azibuka amaaso, n’agoberera Yesu." 
Mark11:1 Awo Yesu n’abayigirizwa be, bwe baali basemberedde Besufaage ne Besaniya ebiriraanye Yerusaalemi, nga batuuse ku lusozi olwa Zeyituuni, Yesu n’atuma abayigirizwa be babiri babasooke mu maaso." 
Mark11:2 N’abalagira nti, “Mugende mu kyalo ekituli mu maaso, bwe munaaba mwakakituukamu mujja kulaba omwana gw’endogoyi oguteebagalwangako nga gusibiddwa awo. Mugusumulule mugundeetere wano." 
Mark11:3 Era omuntu yenna bw’ababuuza gye mugutwala, mumuddamu nti, ‘Mukama waffe y’agwetaaga, era tujja kugukomyawo mangu.’ ”" 
Mark11:4 Abaatumibwa ne bagenda, ne balaba omwana gw’endogoyi nga guyimiridde ku luguudo, naye nga gusibiddwa ku muguwa wabweru w’ennyumba. Bwe baali bagusumulula," 
Mark11:5 abamu ku bantu abaali bayimiridde awo ne bababuuza nti, “Abange, omwana gw’endogoyi, musumulula gwa ki?”" 
Mark11:6 Abayigirizwa ne baddamu nga Yesu bwe yabagamba, ne balyoka babakkiriza okugutwala." 
Mark11:7 Omwana gw’endogoyi ne baguleetera Yesu. Abayigirizwa be ne baddira ebyambalo byabwe ne babyaliira ku mugongo gwayo, Yesu n’agwebagala." 
Mark11:8 Awo abantu bangi abaali mu kibiina ne baaliira engoye zaabwe mu luguudo mwe yali agenda okuyita, abalala ne bamenya amatabi g’emiti mu nnimiro ezaali okumpi, nago ne bagaalira mu luguudo." 
Mark11:9 Abaali mu maaso ge n’abaali emabega we, bonna ne baleekaanira waggulu nti: “Ozaana!” “Atenderezebwe oyo ajja mu linnya lya Mukama! ”" 
Mark11:10 “Atenderezebwe olw’okukomyawo obwakabaka bwa jjajjaffe Dawudi n’okubuwa omukisa!” “Ozaana! Ayi ali waggulu ennyo!” 
Mark11:11 Awo Yesu n’atuuka mu Yerusaalemi, n’ayingira mu Yeekaalu. N’atunula, ne yeetoolooza amaaso wonna, naye obudde bwali buyise, n’afuluma n’agenda e Besaniya n’abayigirizwa be ekkumi n’ababiri." 
Mark11:12 Enkeera bwe baali bava e Besaniya, Yesu n’alumwa enjala." 
Mark11:13 N’alengera omutiini, nga guddugazza bulungi amalagala, n’agendayo alabe obanga anaasangako ebibala. Yagenda okugutuukako nga kuliko makoola meereere, kubanga si kye kyali ekiseera kyagwo okubaako ebibala." 
Mark11:14 Awo Yesu n’agamba omuti nti, “Omuntu yenna alemenga okuddayo okulya ekibala kyo!” Abayigirizwa be ne bamuwulira ng’akyogera." 
Mark11:15 Bwe baatuuka mu Yerusaalemi n’ayingira mu Yeekaalu, n’atandika okugobamu abaali batundiramu n’abaali baguliramu, n’avuunika emmeeza z’abaali bawaanyisa ensimbi, n’avuunika n’entebe z’abatunzi b’amayiba." 
Mark11:16 Era n’ataganya muntu kuyisa kintu kyonna. 
Mark11:17 N’abayigiriza ng’agamba nti, “Tekyawandiikabwa nti, ‘Ennyumba yange eneebanga nnyumba ya kusabiramu amawanga?’ Naye mmwe mugifudde mpuku y’abanyazi.”" 
Mark11:18 Bakabona abakulu n’abannyonnyozi b’amateeka bwe baakiwulira, ne batandika okusala amagezi balabe bwe bayinza okumuzikiriza. Baali bamutya engeri ekibiina kyonna bwe kyali kyewuunya okuyigiriza kwe." 
Mark11:19 Obudde bwe bwawungeera Yesu n’abayigirizwa be ne bafuluma mu kibuga. 
Mark11:20 Awo enkeera mu makya abayigirizwa be ne balaba omuti omutiini Yesu gwe yakolimira nga gukaze okuviira ddala ku kikolo! 
Mark11:21 Peetero n’ajjukira n’agamba Yesu nti, “Omuyigiriza, laba omutiini gwe wakolimira gukaze!”" 
Mark11:22 Yesu n’agamba abayigirizwa be nti, “Mukkiririze mu Katonda." 
Mark11:23 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti buli aligamba olusozi luno nti, ‘Siguka ogwe mu nnyanja,’ n’atabuusabuusa mu mutima gwe, naye n’aba n’okukkiriza, ky’ayogedde kirituukirira." 
Mark11:24 Noolwekyo mbagamba nti buli kye munaasabanga, mukkirize nti mukiweereddwa, era kinaabanga bwe kityo gye muli." 
Mark11:25 Bwe mubanga mugenda okusaba musonyiwenga omuntu yenna gwe mulinako ensonga, ne Kitammwe ali mu ggulu alyoke abasonyiwe ebyonoono byammwe." 
Mark11:26 Naye bwe mutaasonyiwenga, ne Kitammwe ali mu ggulu talibasonyiwa byonoono byammwe.”" 
Mark11:27 Yesu n’abayigirizwa be bwe baakomawo mu Yerusaalemi yali atambulatambula mu Yeekaalu, bakabona abakulu n’abannyonnyozi b’amateeka n’abakulembeze b’Abayudaaya ne bajja gy’ali" 
Mark11:28 ne bamubuuza nti, “Buyinza ki obukukoza bino? Era ani yakuwa obuyinza okukola bino?”" 
Mark11:29 Naye Yesu n’abaddamu nti, “Bwe munaamala okunziramu ekibuuzo kyange kimu, nange n’ababuulira eyampa obuyinza obwo!" 
Mark11:30 Okubatiza kwa Yokaana kwava mu ggulu oba kwava eri bantu? Munziremu!” 
Mark11:31 Ne bakubaganya ebirowoozo bokka na bokka nti, “Bwe tuddamu nti, ‘Kwava mu ggulu,’ ajja kutubuuza nti, ‘Kale, lwaki temwamukkiriza?’" 
Mark11:32 Naye, ate bwe tuddamu nti, ‘Kwava eri bantu.’ ” Baali batya ekibiina ky’abantu. Kubanga buli muntu yalowooza Yokaana okuba nnabbi." 
Mark11:33 Ne baddamu Yesu nti, “Tetumanyi.” Awo Yesu n’abaddamu nti, “Nange sijja kubabuulira obuyinza obunkoza ebintu ebyo gye mbuggya.”" 
Mark12:1 Awo Yesu n’atandika okwogera nabo mu ngero, ng’agamba nti, “Waaliwo omusajja eyalima ennimiro y’emizabbibu, n’ateeka olukomera okugyetooloola, n’ateekamu essogolero, n’azimbamu n’omunaala, n’agifuniramu abalimi abaagipangisa, n’agenda olugendo." 
Mark12:2 Ekiseera ky’amakungula bwe kyatuuka, n’abatumira omuddu okufuna ebibala okuva mu nnimiro ey’emizabbibu." 
Mark12:3 Naye bwe yatuuka ku nnimiro abalimi ne bamukuba ne bamusindika n’addayo ngalo nsa. 
Mark12:4 Nannyini nnimiro n’atuma omuddu we omulala, oyo ne bamukuba olubale, ne bamuswaza." 
Mark12:5 Omubaka omulala gwe yatuma baamutta bussi, ate abalala be yazzaako okutuma, abamu baabakuba n’abalala ne babatta." 
Mark12:6 “Yali asigazzaawo omu yekka ow’okutuma, ye mutabani we omwagalwa. Bw’atyo n’amutuma gye bali ng’agamba nti, ‘Bajja kussaamu mutabani wange ekitiibwa.’" 
Mark12:7 “Naye abalimi abo ne bateesa bokka na bokka nti, Ono ye musika, mujje tumutte ebyobusika tubyesigalize!" 
Mark12:8 Awo ne bamukwata ne bamutta omulambo gwe ne bagusuula ebweru w’ennimiro y’emizabbibu. 
Mark12:9 “Mulowooza nannyini nnimiro alikola atya? Agenda kujja, abalimi abo bonna abazikirize, ennimiro ye agipangiseemu abalimi abalala." 
Mark12:10 Temusomangako byawandiikibwa nti, “ ‘Ejjinja abazimbi lye baagaana, lye lifuuse ejjinja ekkulu ery’oku nsonda." 
Mark12:11 Ekyo Mukama ye yakikola era kitwewuunyisa nnyo okukiraba.’ ” 
Mark12:12 Abakulembeze b’Abayudaaya ne bamanya ng’olugero lwali lukwata ku bo, olwo ne banoonya engeri gye bayinza okumukwata, naye ne batya ekibiina. Ne bamuviira ne bagenda." 
Mark12:13 Ne bamuweereza abamu ku Bafalisaayo n’Abakerodiyaani boogere, bagezeeko okumutega mu bigambo." 
Mark12:14 Awo ne bajja gy’ali ne bamugamba nti, “Omuyigiriza, tumanyi ng’oyogera mazima era tolina gw’otya. Toffaayo ku nfaanana y’abantu, wabula amazima ameereere, era oyigiriza ekkubo lya Katonda. Kituufu okuwa Kayisaali omusolo oba tetugumuwa?”" 
Mark12:15 Naye Yesu n’ategeera obunnanfuusi bwabwe n’abagamba nti, “Lwaki munkema. Mundeetere ensimbi ngirabe.”" 
Mark12:16 Ne bagimuleetera, n’ababuuza nti, “Ekifaananyi kino n’ebiwandiiko ebiri ku nsimbi kuno by’ani?” Ne bamuddamu nti, “Bya Kayisaali.”" 
Mark12:17 N’abagamba nti, “Kale ebintu bya Kayisaali mubiwenga Kayisaali n’ebya Katonda, mubiwenga Katonda!” Ne bamwewuunya nnyo." 
Mark12:18 Awo Abasaddukaayo abagamba nti tewali kuzuukira, ne bamubuuza nti," 
Mark12:19 “Omuyigiriza, Musa yatuwa etteeka erigamba nti omusajja omufumbo bw’afanga nga tazadde baana, muganda w’omufu awasenga nnamwandu wa muganda we oyo alyoke amuzaalire abaana." 
Mark12:20 Waaliwo abooluganda musanvu, mukulu waabwe n’awasa, Oluvannyuma n’afa nga tazadde baana." 
Mark12:21 Muto w’omufu kwe kuwasa nnamwandu wa mukulu we, waayitawo akabanga katono naye n’afa, nga naye tazadde mwana. Muganda w’omufu amuddako n’awasa nnamwandu oyo, naye n’atazaala." 
Mark12:22 Bonna omusanvu ne bafa ne baggwaawo. Oluvannyuma n’omukazi naye n’afa. 
Mark12:23 Kale, mu kuzuukira kw’abafu omukazi oyo aliba muka ani, kubanga bonna yabafumbirwako?”" 
Mark12:24 Yesu n’abaddamu nti, “Ekibaleetedde okukyama bwe butamanya byawandiikibwa, n’obutategeera maanyi ga Katonda." 
Mark12:25 Kubanga bwe balizuukira mu bafu tebagenda kufumbiriganwa, kubanga bonna baliba nga bamalayika bwe bali mu ggulu." 
Mark12:26 Ate ebifa ku kuzuukira kw’abafu, temusomanga mu kitabo Musa bwe yali ku kisaka Katonda n’amugamba nti, ‘Nze Katonda wa Ibulayimu era Katonda wa Isaaka era Katonda wa Yakobo?’" 
Mark12:27 Katonda si Katonda w’abafu, wabula ow’abalamu. Mukyamye nnyo.”" 
Mark12:28 Awo omu ku bannyonnyozi b’amateeka eyali ayimiridde awo ng’awuliriza bye baali beebuuza, n’ategeera nga Yesu azzeemu bulungi. Naye n’amubuuzaayo nti, “Mu mateeka gonna, erisingamu obukulu lye liruwa?”" 
Mark12:29 Yesu n’amuddamu nti, “Ery’olubereberye lye lino nti, ‘Wulira, Isirayiri! Mukama Katonda waffe, Mukama ali omu yekka." 
Mark12:30 Era yagala Katonda wo n’omutima gwo gwonna n’omwoyo gwo gwonna, n’amagezi go gonna, n’amaanyi go gonna.’" 
Mark12:31 N’eryokubiri lye lino nti, ‘Oyagalanga muliraanwa wo nga bwe weeyagala wekka.’ Tewaliiwo mateeka malala gasinga ago bukulu.”" 
Mark12:32 Omunnyonnyozi w’amateeka n’agamba nti, “Omuyigiriza ekigambo ky’oyogedde kya mazima bw’ogambye nti waliwo Katonda omu yekka era teriiyo mulala." 
Mark12:33 Era mmanyi nga kikulu nnyo okumwagala n’omutima gwaffe gwonna, n’okutegeera kwaffe n’amaanyi gaffe, n’okwagala muliraanwa wo nga bwe weeyagala wekka, era ng’ekyo kikulu okusinga ebiweebwayo ebyokebwa ne ssaddaaka.”" 
Mark12:34 Yesu bwe yalaba ng’omusajja azzeemu n’amagezi n’amugamba nti, “Toli wala n’obwakabaka bwa Katonda.” Okuva ku ekyo ne watabaawo muntu n’omu eyayaŋŋanga okwongera okumubuuza ebibuuzo ebirala." 
Mark12:35 Bwe waayitawo akabanga, Yesu yali ayigiriza mu Yeekaalu, n’ababuuza nti, “Lwaki abannyonnyozi b’amateeka bagamba nti Kristo Mwana wa Dawudi?" 
Mark12:36 Kubanga Mwoyo Mutukuvu bwe yali ali ku Dawudi, Dawudi yennyini yagamba ku bwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu nti, “ ‘Mukama yagamba Mukama wange nti, “Tuulira wano ku mukono gwange ogwa ddyo, okutuusa lwe nditeeka abalabe bo wansi w’ebigere byo.” ’" 
Mark12:37 Dawudi yennyini amuyita Mukama we, ayinza atya ate okuba Omwana we?” Ekibiina kyalimu abantu bangi, ne bamuwuliriza n’essanyu." 
Mark12:38 Awo Yesu n’ayigiriza ng’agamba nti, “Mwekuume abannyonnyozi b’amateeka, kubanga baagala nnyo okwambala ne batambulatambula mu butale ng’abantu babalamusa." 
Mark12:39 Baagala nnyo okutuula mu bifo ebisinga obulungi mu makuŋŋaaniro, n’okutuula mu bifo eby’ekitiibwa ku mbaga." 
Mark12:40 Kyokka, banyagako bannamwandu ebintu byabwe, ne beeraga nga basaba esaala empanvu ennyo. Ekibonerezo kyabwe kyekiriva kibeera ekinene ddala.”" 
Mark12:41 Awo Yesu bwe yatuula okwolekera eggwanika ly’ensimbi, n’alaba engeri ekibiina ky’abantu gye bateekamu ensimbi mu ggwanika. Abagagga bangi baali bateekamu ensimbi nnyingi." 
Mark12:42 Awo nnamwandu eyali omwavu n’ajja n’ateekamu ebitundu bibiri, ye kodulante." 
Mark12:43 Yesu n’ayita abayigirizwa be, n’abagamba nti, “Ddala ddala mbagamba nti nnamwandu oyo omwavu awaddeyo nnyo okusinga bonna bali abatadde mu ggwanika." 
Mark12:44 Kubanga bonna bataddemu ku bibafikkiridde, naye ate nnamwandu ono mu kwetaaga kwe ataddemu kyonna ky’abadde nakyo, ekibadde kijja okumuyamba obulamu bwe bwonna.”" 
Mark13:1 Awo Yesu bwe yali ng’ava mu Yeekaalu omu ku bayigirizwa be n’amugamba nti, “Omuyigiriza, laba, amayinja ago, n’ebizimbe ebyo.”" 
Mark13:2 Yesu n’amuddamu nti, “Ebizembe ebyo eby’ekitalo obiraba? Ne bwe kiriba ki tewaliba jjinja na limu wano eririsigala ku linnaalyo.”" 
Mark13:3 Awo Yesu bwe yali ng’atudde awo ku lusozi olwa Zeyituuni, okwolekera yeekaalu, Peetero ne Yakobo ne Yokaana ne Andereya ne bamubuuza mu kyama, ne bamubuuza nti," 
Mark13:4 “Tutegeeze, ebintu byonna we birituukirira, era n’akabonero akalibaawo ng’ebyo byonna bigenda okutuukirira.”" 
Mark13:5 Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Mwekuume omuntu yenna tababuzaabuzanga." 
Mark13:6 Bangi abalijja mu linnya lyange nga bagamba nti, ‘Nze nzuuyo,’ era balibuzaabuza bangi." 
Mark13:7 Naye bwe muliwulira entalo, n’eŋŋambo ez’entalo, temutyanga. Kyetaaga ebyo byonna okubaawo naye enkomerero eriba tennatuuka." 
Mark13:8 Kubanga amawanga galirwanagana, n’obwakabaka bulirwana n’obwakabaka, era musisi aliyita mu bifo bingi, n’enjala nnyingi erigwa. Okulumwa ng’okw’okuzaala kuliba kutandika butandisi.”" 
Mark13:9 “Mwekuume mmwe. Balibawaayo mu mbuga z’amateeka ne mu makuŋŋaaniro, mulikubibwa, muliyimirira mu maaso ga bakabaka ne bagavana. Muliyimirira ku lwange, okubeera abajulirwa gye bali." 
Mark13:10 Era Enjiri kigigwanira okumala okubuulirwa amawanga gonna. 
Mark13:11 Bwe balibakwata ne babawaayo, temweraliikiriranga kya kuwoza. Kye munaaweebwanga okwogera mu kiseera ekyo kye munaayogeranga kubanga si mmwe muliba mwogera wabula Mwoyo Mutukuvu y’aliba ayogerera mu mmwe.”" 
Mark13:12 “Owooluganda aliwaayo muganda we okuttibwa, ne kitaawe w’omwana aliwaayo omwana we. Abaana balijeemera bazadde baabwe ne babatta." 
Mark13:13 Mulikyayibwa abantu bonna, olw’erinnya lyange, naye oyo aligumiikiriza okutuusa ku nkomerero y’alirokolebwa.”" 
Mark13:14 “Bwe mulabanga ekintu eky’omuzizo ekizikiriza, nga kiyimiridde mu kifo we kitasaanira (asoma bino, weetegereze) abali mu Buyudaaya baddukiranga ku nsozi." 
Mark13:15 N’oyo alibeera waggulu ku nnyumba takkanga wadde okuyingira okubaako ky’atwala okuva mu nnyumba ye. 
Mark13:16 N’oyo alibeera mu nnimiro, taddanga kutwala bintu bye, wadde okukima yo olugoye lwe." 
Mark13:17 Naye ziribasanga abaliba embuto n’abaliba bayonsa mu nnaku ezo. 
Mark13:18 Naye musabe ekiseera ekyo kireme kuba kya butiti. 
Mark13:19 Kubanga ekiseera ekyo kiriba kya kubonyaabonyezebwa okutabeerangawo kasookedde Katonda atonda eggulu n’ensi, n’okutuusa kaakano n’emirembe egigenda okujja." 
Mark13:20 “Era singa Mukama teyakendeeza ku nnaku ezo, tewandiwonyeewo muntu yenna, naye olw’abalonde be, ennaku ezo yazikendeezaako." 
Mark13:21 Era omuntu yenna singa abagamba nti, ‘Mulabe, Kristo wuuli,’ temumukkirizanga." 
Mark13:22 Kubanga bakristo ab’obulimba balijja, ne bannabbi ab’obulimba nabo balijja ne bakola eby’amagero n’ebyewuunyo, nga bagenderera okulimba n’abalonde ba Katonda." 
Mark13:23 Naye mwekuume! Kubanga mbalabudde ng’ebintu bino byonna tebinnabaawo. 
Mark13:24 “Ennaku ez’entiisa eyo nga ziweddeko, “ ‘enjuba eriggyako ekizikiza, era n’omwezi teguliyaka," 
Mark13:25 era, emmunyeenye zirikunkumuka, n’aboobuyinza ab’omu bbanga balikankana.’ ”" 
Mark13:26 “Olwo muliraba Omwana w’Omuntu ng’ajjira ku bire n’amaanyi mangi n’ekitiibwa kinene," 
Mark13:27 Era alituma bamalayika okukuŋŋaanya abalonde be okuva eri empewo ennya, n’okuva ensalo z’ensi gye zikoma okutuuka ensalo z’eggulu gye zikoma.”" 
Mark13:28 “Muyigire ku lugero lw’omutiini. Amatabi gaagwo bwe gatandika okutojjera, nga mumanya nti ebiseera eby’ebbugumu binaatera okutuuka." 
Mark13:29 Noolwekyo nammwe bwe muliraba ebintu ebyo nga bibaawo, nga mumanya nti ekiseera kiri kumpi, era kisemberedde ddala ku luggi." 
Mark13:30 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti omulembe guno tegugenda kuggwaako okutuusa ng’ebintu byonna bimaze okubaawo. 
Mark13:31 Eggulu n’ensi biriggwaawo, naye ebigambo byange biribeerera emirembe n’emirembe.”" 
Mark13:32 “Naye eby’olunaku olwo oba essaawa tewali n’omu abimanyi, newaakubadde bamalayika mu ggulu wadde Omwana, okuggyako Kitaffe." 
Mark13:33 Mwekuume, mutunule kubanga temumanyi kiseera we kirituukira." 
Mark13:34 Ng’omusajja eyatambula olugendo n’ategekera abaddu be, buli omu n’amuwa obuyinza ng’omulimu gwe bwe guli, n’alagira omuggazi w’oluggi atunule alindirire.”" 
Mark13:35 “Noolwekyo mubeere beetegefu kubanga temumanyi ssemaka wakomerawo oba kawungeezi, oba mu ttumbi, oba ng’enkoko zikookolima, oba ng’obudde bukya," 
Mark13:36 si kulwa ng’akomawo nga temumanyiridde, n’abasanga nga mwebase." 
Mark13:37 Kye mbagamba mmwe, kye ŋŋamba buli muntu, mwekuume.”" 
Mark14:1 Embaga ey’Okuyitako, kwe baliira emigaati egitali mizimbulukuse, yali ebuzaayo ennaku bbiri etuuke. Bakabona abakulu n’abannyonnyozi b’amateeka ne basala olukwe engeri gye banaakwata Yesu bamutte." 
Mark14:2 Ne bagamba nti, “Si mu kiseera ky’embaga y’Okuyitako, kubanga abantu bayinza okuleetawo akeegugungo.”" 
Mark14:3 Mu kiseera ekyo Yesu ng’ali Besaniya mu nnyumba y’omusajja eyali amanyiddwa nga Simooni Omugenge, ng’atudde, omukazi n’ayingira ng’alina eccupa, eyalimu amafuta ag’akaloosa ag’omuwendo omungi. N’ayasa eccupa n’asiiga amafuta ku mutwe gwa Yesu." 
Mark14:4 Abamu ku abo abaaliwo ne basunguwalira nnyo ekikolwa ekyo, nga beebuuza nti, “Amafuta ago gafudde ki?" 
Mark14:5 Wakiri singa gatundiddwa dinaali ezisukka mu bikumi ebisatu, ne ziweebwa abaavu!” Ne bamwemulugunyiza." 
Mark14:6 Naye Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Omukazi mumuleke. Lwaki mumuteganya? Ankoledde ekikolwa kirungi." 
Mark14:7 Abaavu muli nabo bulijjo, era muyinza okubakolera obulungi buli we mwagalidde, naye Nze sijja kubeera nammwe bulijjo." 
Mark14:8 Akoze ky’asobola, omubiri gwange agusiigiddewo amafuta ag’akaloosa nga bukyali, ng’aguteekateeka okuziikibwa." 
Mark14:9 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti buli kifo kyonna Enjiri gy’eneebuulirwanga mu nsi yonna, ekikolwa ky’omukazi ono kinajjukirwanga era kinaayongerwangako okumujjukiranga.”" 
Mark14:10 Awo Yuda Isukalyoti, omu ku bayigirizwa ba Yesu ekkumi n’ababiri, n’agenda eri bakabona abakulu alabe bw’anaalyamu Yesu olukwe amubawe." 
Mark14:11 Bakabona abakulu bwe baakiwulira ne basanyuka nnyo, ne bamusuubiza okumuwa ensimbi. Bw’atyo Yuda n’atandika okunoonyereza engeri entuufu w’anaaweerayo Yesu." 
Mark14:12 Awo ku lunaku olusooka olw’embaga y’Abayudaaya kwe baliira emigaati egitali mizimbulukuse, nga bawaayo omwana gw’endiga ogw’Okuyitako nga ssaddaaka, abayigirizwa be ne bamubuuza nti, “Oyagala tukutegekere wa gy’onooliira Embaga ey’Okuyitako.”" 
Mark14:13 N’atuma babiri ku bayigirizwa be, n’abagamba nti, “Mugende mu kibuga munaasanga omusajja eyeetisse ensuwa y’amazzi, mumugoberere." 
Mark14:14 Muyingire mu nnyumba mw’anaayingira, mubuuze nnyinimu nti, ‘Ekisenge nze n’abayigirizwa bange mwe tunaalira Embaga ey’Okuyitako kiri ludda wa?’" 
Mark14:15 Ajja kubalaga ekisenge ekinene ekya waggulu, ekiwedde okulongoosa n’okutegeka. Muteekereteekere omwo ekijjulo kyaffe.”" 
Mark14:16 Awo abayigirizwa ababiri ne bagenda mu kibuga, ne basanga byonna nga Yesu bwe yabibagamba, ne bateekateeka Okuyitako." 
Mark14:17 Obudde bwe bwawungeera n’atuuka n’abayigirizwa be ekkumi n’ababiri. 
Mark14:18 Bwe baali batudde nga balya, Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Ddala ddala mbagamba nti omu ku mmwe alya nange anandyamu olukwe.”" 
Mark14:19 Ennaku n’ebakwata nnyo, ne batandika okumubuuza kinnoomu nti, “Ddala ye nze?”" 
Mark14:20 N’abagamba nti, “Omu ku mmwe ekkumi n’ababiri, akoza nange mu kibya." 
Mark14:21 Omwana w’Omuntu agenda ng’Ebyawandiikibwa bwe biri. Naye zimusanze alya mu Mwana w’Omuntu olukwe. Kyandibadde kirungi singa omuntu oyo teyazaalibwa.” 
Mark14:22 Awo bwe baali balya, Yesu n’addira omugaati, ne yeebaza, n’agumenyaamenyamu, n’agabira abayigirizwa be, n’abagamba nti, “Mutoole mulye, guno gwe mubiri gwange.”" 
Mark14:23 Ate n’addira ekikompe ne yeebaza n’akibawa; bonna ne banywa. 
Mark14:24 N’abagamba nti, “Guno musaayi gwange ogw’endagaano, oguyiika ku lw’abangi." 
Mark14:25 Ddala ddala mbagamba nti sigenda kuddayo kunywa ku kibala kya muzabbibu okutuusa ku lunaku luli lwe ndikinywa nga kisingawo obulungi mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda.” 
Mark14:26 Awo ne bayimbayo oluyimba, ne bafuluma ne bagenda ku lusozi olwa Zeyituuni." 
Mark14:27 Yesu n’abagamba nti, “Buli omu ku mmwe ajja kunjabulira, kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, “ ‘Ndikuba omusumba, endiga ne zisaasaana.’" 
Mark14:28 Naye bwe ndimala okuzuukizibwa, ndibakulembera okugenda e Ggaliraaya.”" 
Mark14:29 Peetero n’amugamba nti, “Abalala bonna ne bwe banaakwabulira, nze siikwabulire!”" 
Mark14:30 Yesu n’amugamba nti, “Ddala ddala nkugamba nti ekiro kya leero, enkoko eneeba tennakookolima mirundi ebiri, onooneegaana emirundi esatu.”" 
Mark14:31 Peetero n’akiggumiza nnyo ng’agamba nti, “Oba kufiira wamu naawe n’afa, naye sijja kukwegaana n’akamu kokka.” N’abalala bonna ne beerayirira bwe batyo." 
Mark14:32 Awo Yesu n’abayigirizwa be ne batuuka mu kifo ekiyitibwa Gesusemane, n’agamba abayigirizwa be nti, “Mugira mutuula wano, ŋŋende nsabe.”" 
Mark14:33 N’atwala Peetero, ne Yakobo ne Yokaana; n’atandika okweraliikirira n’okuteganyizibwa mu mutima." 
Mark14:34 N’abagamba nti, “Omwoyo gwange guliko ennaku nnyingi nnyo zaagala na kunzita, kale mubeere wano mukuume.”" 
Mark14:35 Ne yeeyongerako mu maaso katono, n’agwa wansi n’asaba obanga kisoboka, essaawa eyo, ereme kutuuka." 
Mark14:36 N’asaba nti, “Aba, Kitange, ebintu byonna bisoboka gy’oli. Nzigyako ekikompe kino. Naye si nga Nze bwe njagala, wabula nga ggwe bw’oyagala.”" 
Mark14:37 N’akomawo gye bali, n’abasanga nga beebase. N’agamba Peetero nti, “Simooni! Weebase? Tosobodde kutunulako nange wadde essaawa emu?" 
Mark14:38 Mutunule musabe, muleme kukemebwa. Omwoyo gwagala, naye omubiri munafu.”" 
Mark14:39 Ate n’abaleka awo n’addayo, n’asaba ebigambo bye bimu na biri bye yasaba olubereberye." 
Mark14:40 N’akomawo we bali, n’abasanga nga beebase, kubanga amaaso gaabwe gaali gakambira. Ne batamanya kya kumuddamu." 
Mark14:41 Bwe yadda gye bali omulundi ogwokusatu n’abagamba nti, “Kale mwebakire ddala. Kinaamala, laba ekiseera kituuse Omwana w’Omuntu aweebweyo mu mikono gy’abalina ebibi." 
Mark14:42 Musituke! Tugende, laba andyamu olukwe anaatera okutuuka.”" 
Mark14:43 Yesu yali akyayogera, amangwago Yuda (omu ku batume be ekkumi n’ababiri) n’ajja ng’ali n’ekibiina kinene, ekyava ewa bakabona abakulu, n’abakulembeze b’Abayudaaya, nga balina ebitala era nga bakutte emiggo." 
Mark14:44 Yuda yali abagambye nti, “Gwe nnanywegera, ye wuuyo mumukwate, mumutwale nga mumunywezezza.”" 
Mark14:45 Awo baali baakatuuka Yuda n’alaga eri Yesu, bwe yamutuukako n’agamba nti, “Omuyigiriza!” N’amugwa mu kifuba." 
Mark14:46 Ne bavumbagira Yesu ne bamukwata, ne bamunyweza." 
Mark14:47 Naye omu ku baali bayimiridde awo n’asowolayo ekitala n’asalako okutu kw’omuddu wa Kabona Asinga Obukulu. 
Mark14:48 Yesu n’ababuuza nti, “Lwaki munzijjidde ng’omumenyi w’amateeka, n’ebitala n’emiggo okunkwata?" 
Mark14:49 Mbadde nammwe ennaku nnyingi mu yeekaalu nga njigiriza, naye temwankwata. Naye kino kikoleddwa ebyawandiikibwa bituukirire.”" 
Mark14:50 Bonna ne bamwabulira ne badduka. 
Mark14:51 Naye waaliwo omulenzi omuvubuka eyali agoberera ng’avaako ennyuma, nga yeebikkiridde olugoye, lumu lwokka, ne baagezaako okumukwata," 
Mark14:52 n’abeesumattulako, ne basigaza olugoye n’adduka bwereere." 
Mark14:53 Awo Yesu n’atwalibwa eri Kabona Asinga Obukulu, bakabona abakulu n’abakulembeze b’Abayudaaya n’abannyonnyozi b’amateeka." 
Mark14:54 Peetero n’agoberera nga yeesuddeko akabanga, n’ayita mu luggya lwa Kabona Asinga Obukulu, n’atuula ku kyoto n’abaweereza we baali bootera omuliro." 
Mark14:55 Bakabona abakulu, n’Abasaddukaayo bonna, baali banoonya obujulizi kwe banaasinziira okutta Yesu, naye ne bubabula." 
Mark14:56 Bangi baayogera eby’obulimba ku ye, naye obujulizi bwabwe nga bukoonagana bukoonaganyi." 
Mark14:57 Abamu ku bo ne bamuwaayiriza nga bagamba nti," 
Mark14:58 “Twamuwulira ng’ayogera nti, ‘Ndizikiriza Yeekaalu eno eyazimbibwa n’emikono gy’abantu, naye oluvannyuma lw’ennaku ssatu ndizzaawo endala etazimbiddwa na mikono gy’abantu.’ ”" 
Mark14:59 Naye era n’olwo ebigambo byabwe tebyatereera bulungi. 
Mark14:60 Awo Kabona Asinga Obukulu n’ayimirira, n’abuuza Yesu nti, “Tolina ky’oddamu ku bino bye bakwogerako?”" 
Mark14:61 Yesu n’atamuddamu kintu. Ate Kabona Asinga Obukulu n’amubuuza nti, “Ggwe Kristo, Omwana w’oyo atenderezebwa?”" 
Mark14:62 Yesu n’addamu nti, “Ye Nze, era mugenda kulaba Omwana w’Omuntu ng’atudde ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogwa Katonda Ayinzabyonna, ng’akomawo mu bire eby’eggulu.”" 
Mark14:63 Awo Kabona Asinga Obukulu n’ayuza ebyambalo bye, n’agamba nti, “Ate twetaagira ki abajulizi?" 
Mark14:64 Muwulidde obuvvoozi. Musala mutya omusango guno?” Bonna ne bamusalira gwa kufa. 
Mark14:65 Abamu ne batandika okumuwandulira amalusu, ne bamusiba kantuntunu ku maaso, ne bamukuba empi mu maaso, nga bwe bamuduulira nga bagamba nti, “Lagula.” N’abaserikale nabo ne bamukuba ebikonde nga bamufulumya." 
Mark14:66 Peetero yali ali wabweru mu luggya, omu ku bawala abaweereza ba Kabona Asinga Obukulu n’ajja." 
Mark14:67 Bwe yalaba Peetero n’amwetegereza ng’ayota omuliro, n’amugamba nti, “Ggwe, wali ne Yesu, Omunnazaaleesi.”" 
Mark14:68 Peetero ne yeegaana ng’agamba nti, “Simanyi wadde okutegeera by’oyogerako!” N’afuluma n’alaga ebweru mu kisasi, enkoko n’ekookolima." 
Mark14:69 Omuwala oli n’alengera Peetero, n’ategeeza banne abaali bayimiridde awo nti, “Ono ali omu ku bo.”" 
Mark14:70 Peetero n’ayongera okwegaana. Bwe waayitawo akabanga, abantu abalala abaali bayimiridde awo ne bagamba Peetero nti, “Ddala ddala oli omu ku bo, kubanga oli Mugaliraaya!”" 
Mark14:71 Peetero n’atandika, okukolima n’okulayira nga bw’agamba nti, “Omusajja ono gwe mwogerako, simumanyi.”" 
Mark14:72 Amangwago enkoko n’ekookolima omulundi ogwokubiri, Peetero n’ajjukira ebigambo Yesu bye yali amugambye nti, “Enkoko eneeba tennakookolima mirundi ebiri, onoonneegaana emirundi esatu.” Awo Peetero n’atulika n’akaaba amaziga." 
Mark15:1 Amangwago mu makya olukiiko lwa bakabona abakulu, n’abakulembeze b’Abayudaaya, n’abannyonnyozi b’amateeka lwe Lukiiko Olukulu lwonna, ne bakuŋŋaana ne basiba Yesu, ne bamuweereza ewa Piraato." 
Mark15:2 Piraato n’abuuza Yesu nti, “Ggwe Kabaka w’Abayudaaya?” Yesu n’amuddamu nti, “Oyogedde.”" 
Mark15:3 Awo bakabona abakulu ne bamulumiriza ebintu bingi. 
Mark15:4 Naye Piraato n’addamu n’amubuuza nti, “Lwaki toliiko ky’oddamu? Laba bakulumiriza ebintu bingi.”" 
Mark15:5 Naye Yesu n’asirika busirisi, era Piraato n’amwewuunya nnyo." 
Mark15:6 Ku buli mbaga, Piraato yabateeranga omusibe omu gwe baabanga bamusabye." 
Mark15:7 Omu ku basibe mu kiseera ekyo yali ayitibwa Balaba, eyali asibiddwa ne bajeemu banne olw’okutta abantu nga bakola obwegugungo." 
Mark15:8 Awo Piraato n’agenda eri ekibiina n’ababuuza nga bwe yateranga okukola. 
Mark15:9 N’ababuuza nti, “Mwandyagadde mbasumululire kabaka w’Abayudaaya?”" 
Mark15:10 Kubanga yamanya nga bakabona abakulu bamuwaddeyo lwa buggya. 
Mark15:11 Naye bakabona abakulu ne bafukuutirira ekibiina babateere Balaba sso ssi Yesu. 
Mark15:12 Naye Piraato n’addamu n’ababuuza nti, “Omuntu ono gwe muyita kabaka w’Abayudaaya mwandyagadde mmukole ntya?”" 
Mark15:13 Ne bawowoggana nti, “Mukomerere!”" 
Mark15:14 Piraato n’ababuuza nti, “Lwaki? Azziza musango ki?” Naye bo ne beeyongera bweyongezi okuleekaana nti, “Mukomerere.”" 
Mark15:15 Awo Piraato okusanyusa ekibiina, n’abasumululira Balaba. N’awaayo Yesu akomererwe ng’amaze okumukuba." 
Mark15:16 Awo Abaserikale ne batwala Yesu mu luggya lw’olubiri, oluyitibwa Pulayitoliyo, ne bayita bannaabwe bonna abakuuma olubiri, ne bakuŋŋaana." 
Mark15:17 Ne bamwambaza ekyambalo ekya ffulungu, ne bakola engule mu maggwa ne bagissa ku mutwe gwe." 
Mark15:18 Ne balyoka bamulamusa nga bwe bagamba nti, “Mirembe! Kabaka w’Abayudaaya!”" 
Mark15:19 Ne bamukuba omuggo ku mutwe, ne bamuwandulira amalusu, ne bamufukaamirira nga bwe bamuvuunamira." 
Mark15:20 Bwe baamala okumuduulira, ne bamwambulamu ekyambalo ekya ffulungu ne bamwambaza engoye ze, ne bamutwala okumukomerera." 
Mark15:21 Bwe baali bagenda ne basanga omusajja erinnya lye Simooni ow’e Kuleene, kitaawe wa Alegezanda ne Luufo eyali ava mu kyalo, ne bamuwaliriza yeetikke omusaalaba gwa Yesu." 
Mark15:22 Awo ne batwala Yesu ne bamutuusa mu kifo ekiyitibwa Gologoosa, amakulu gaakyo nti Ekifo ky’Ekiwanga." 
Mark15:23 Ne baddira wayini atabuddwamu envumbo ne bamuwa anyweko, naye n’amugaana." 
Mark15:24 Awo ne bamukomerera ku musaalaba. Ne bagabana ebyambalo bye nga babikubira akalulu. 
Mark15:25 Baamukomerera ku ssaawa ssatu ez’enkya. 
Mark15:26 Ne batimba ekipande waggulu w’omutwe gwa Yesu, okwawandiikibwa nti, “Kabaka w’Abayudaaya.”" 
Mark15:27 Waaliwo abanyazi babiri abaakomererwa awamu naye, omu ku ludda lwa Yesu olwa ddyo, n’omulala ku kkono." 
Mark15:28 Bwe kityo Ekyawandiikibwa ne kituukirira ekigamba nti, “Yabalirwa wamu n’abamenyi b’amateeka.”" 
Mark15:29 Awo abaali bayitawo, ne bakoteka ku mitwe gyabwe nga bamuduulira, nga bwe bagamba nti, “Mumulaba! Wagamba okumenya Yeekaalu n’okugizimbira ennaku ssatu," 
Mark15:30 weerokole, okke wansi okuva ku musaalaba.”" 
Mark15:31 Bakabona abakulu n’abawandiisi nabo baali bayimiridde awo nga baduulira Yesu, nga bagamba nti, “Yalokola balala, naye ye tasobola kwerokola!" 
Mark15:32 Ggwe! Kristo, Kabaka wa Isirayiri! Kale kka ove ku musaalaba naffe tunaakukkiriza!” N’abanyazi ababiri abaakomererwa naye, nabo ne bamuvuma." 
Mark15:33 Okuva ku ssaawa mukaaga ez’omu ttuntu okutuukira ddala ku ssaawa mwenda ez’olweggulo, ekizikiza ne kikwata ensi yonna." 
Mark15:34 Awo Yesu n’akoowoola n’eddoboozi eddene nti, “Eroi, Eroi, lama, sabakusaani?” Amakulu nti, “Katonda wange, Katonda wange, Lwaki onjabulidde?”" 
Mark15:35 Abamu ku bantu abaali bayimiridde awo bwe baamuwulira ne bagamba nti, “Ayita Eriya.”" 
Mark15:36 Awo ne wabaawo eyadduka n’addira ekyangwe n’akijjuza wayini omukaatuufu, n’akisonseka ku luti, n’akiwanika eri Yesu anyweko, nga bw’agamba nti, “Mumuleke, ka tulabe obanga Eriya anajja n’amuwannulayo!”" 
Mark15:37 Awo Yesu n’akoowoola n’eddoboozi ddene, n’awaayo obulamu bwe." 
Mark15:38 Eggigi ery’omu Yeekaalu ne liyulikamu wabiri okuviira ddala waggulu okutuuka wansi. 
Mark15:39 Omuserikale Omuruumi eyakuliranga ekibinja ky’abaserikale ekikumi eyali ayimiridde okwolekera omusaalaba gwa Yesu, bwe yalaba enfa gye yafaamu, n’agamba nti, “Ddala ddala, omusajja ono abadde Mwana wa Katonda!”" 
Mark15:40 Waaliwo abakazi abaali bayimiridde awo nga beesuddeko akabanga nga balengera, okwali Maliyamu Magudaleene, ne Saalome ne Maliyamu nnyina Yakobo omuto ne Yose." 
Mark15:41 Abo baayitanga naye mu Ggaliraaya era nga bamuweereza, n’abalala bangi abajja naye e Yerusaalemi." 
Mark15:42 Awo bwe bwawungeera, kubanga lunaku lwa kuteekateeka, olunaku olukulembera Ssabbiiti," 
Mark15:43 Yusufu ow’e Alimasaya, nga mukungu mu Lukiiko Olukulu olw’Abayudaaya, naye eyali alindirira obwakabaka bwa Katonda, n’aba muvumu n’agenda eri Piraato okusabayo omulambo gwa Yesu." 
Mark15:44 Piraato ne yeewuunya nnyo okuba nti Yesu yafudde dda. N’atumya omuserikale Omuruumi eyali akulembera banne ekikumi, n’amubuuza obanga Yesu yafudde dda." 
Mark15:45 Bwe yakikakasa okuva eri omuserikale, Piraato n’awa Yusufu omulambo." 
Mark15:46 Awo Yusufu n’agula olugoye olwa linena, n’amuggya ku musaalaba, n’amuzinga mu lugoye olwa linena, n’amuteeka mu ntaana eyali etemeddwa mu lwazi, n’ayiringisa ejjinja n’aggalawo omulyango gw’entaana." 
Mark15:47 Maliyamu Magudaleene ne Maliyamu nnyina Yose baaliwo era baalaba Yesu we yateekebwa. 
Mark16:1 Oluvannyuma lwa Ssabbiiti, Maliyamu Magudaleene, ne Saalome ne Maliyamu nnyina Yakobo, ne bagula ebyakaloosa eby’okusiiga omulambo gwa Yesu." 
Mark16:2 Mu makya nnyo ku lunaku olusooka olwa wiiki ng’enjuba yaakavaayo, ne bagenda nabyo ku ntaana." 
Mark16:3 Awo ne bagenda nga bwe beebuuzaganya gye banaggya omuntu anaabayiringisiza ejjinja eddene lityo okuliggya ku mulyango gw’entaana. 
Mark16:4 Naye bwe baatuukawo, ne balaba ng’ejjinja lyayiringisiddwa. Ejjinja lyali ddene nnyo." 
Mark16:5 Bwe baayingira mu ntaana, ne balaba omusajja omuvubuka, ng’ayambadde engoye enjeru, ng’atudde ku ludda olwa ddyo! Ne bawuniikirira nnyo!" 
Mark16:6 Naye n’abagamba nti, “Temutya. Munoonya Yesu, Omunnazaaleesi eyakomererwa. Wano taliiwo! Azuukidde. Mulabe, omulambo gwe we gwali gugalamiziddwa." 
Mark16:7 Kale mugende mutegeeze abayigirizwa be, ne Peetero, ebigambo bino nti, ‘Yesu abakulembeddemu okugenda e Ggaliraaya. Eyo gye mulimulabira nga bwe yabagamba.’ ”" 
Mark16:8 Awo abakazi abo ne badduka emisinde mingi okuva ku ntaana, nga batidde nnyo, nga bwe bakankana, ne batabaako n’omu gwe bategeeza olw’okutya." 
Mark16:9 Ku lunaku olusooka olwa wiiki, Yesu kwe yazuukirira, n’asooka okulabikira Maliyamu Magudaleene, omukazi gwe yagobako baddayimooni omusanvu." 
Mark16:10 Maliyamu n’agenda eri abayigirizwa, n’abasanga nga bakaaba era nga bakungubaga." 
Mark16:11 N’ababuulira nti Yesu amulabyeko era mulamu! Naye ne batamukkiriza! 
Mark16:12 Oluvannyuma lw’ebyo, Yesu ng’ali mu kifaananyi kirala n’alabikira abayigirizwa babiri bwe baali nga batambula mu kkubo nga bagenda mu kyalo." 
Mark16:13 Oluvannyuma nabo ne bagenda ne bategeeza abalala, naye nabo tebaakikkiriza." 
Mark16:14 Oluvannyuma Yesu n’alabikira abayigirizwa ekkumi n’omu bwe baali nga balya. N’abanenya olw’obutakkiriza bwabwe, n’olw’obukakanyavu bw’emitima gyabwe kubanga tebakkiriza abo abaali bamulabyeko ng’amaze okuzuukira." 
Mark16:15 N’abagamba nti, “Mugende mu nsi yonna mubuulire Enjiri eri abantu bonna." 
Mark16:16 Abo bonna abakkiriza ne babatizibwa balirokolebwa, naye abo abatakkiriza balisalirwa omusango ne gubasinga." 
Mark16:17 Era abo abakkiriza baligoba baddayimooni ku bantu mu linnya lyange, era balyogera ennimi empya." 
Mark16:18 Banaakwatanga ku misota, era bwe banaanywanga ekintu kyonna ekyobutwa tekiibakolengako kabi, era banasanga emikono gyabwe ku balwadde ne babawonya.”" 
Mark16:19 Awo Mukama waffe Yesu bwe yamala okwogera nabo, n’atwalibwa mu ggulu n’atuula ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogwa Katonda." 
Mark16:20 Abayigirizwa ne bagenda buli wantu nga babuulira; era Mukama n’abeeranga nabo, n’anywezanga buli kye baayogeranga mu bubaka bwabwe, ng’abakozesanga eby’amagero." 
Luke1:1 Abantu bangi bagezezzaako okuwandiika ebyafaayo ebyatuukirizibwa mu ffe," 
Luke1:2 ng’abo abaasooka edda bwe baabitubuulira, nga be baali abajulirwa era abaweereza b’Ekigambo okuviira ddala ku lubereberye." 
Luke1:3 Bwe ntyo bwe mmaze okukakasiza ddala buli kintu n’obwegendereza okuva ku by’olubereberye okutuukira ddala ku byasembayo, ne ndaba nga kirungi okukuwandiikira ggwe Teefiro ow’ekitiibwa ennyo, ndyoke mbikuwandiikire nga bwe byaliraanagana." 
Luke1:4 Olyoke omanye amazima g’ebyo bye wayigirizibwa. 
Luke1:5 Awo mu biro Kabaka Kerode we yafugira Obuyudaaya, waaliwo kabona erinnya lye Zaakaliya, nga wa mu kitongole kya Abiya, nga mukyala we naye yali wa mu kika kya Alooni, erinnya lye Erisabesi." 
Luke1:6 Abantu abo bombi baali batuukirivu mu maaso ga Katonda, era nga batambulira mu mateeka ga Katonda gonna, ne mu biragiro bya Mukama, nga tebaliiko kya kunenyezebwa." 
Luke1:7 Bombi baali bakaddiye nnyo, era tebaalina mwana, kubanga Erisabesi yali mugumba." 
Luke1:8 Awo lwali lumu, Zaakaliya bwe yali ng’ali ku mulimu gwe ogw’obwakabona mu maaso ga Katonda, kubanga kye kyali ekiseera eky’oluwalo lwe," 
Luke1:9 n’alondebwa okwoteza obubaane mu yeekaalu ya Mukama, ng’emirimu gy’obwakabona bwe gyabanga." 
Luke1:10 Mu ssaawa eyo ey’okwoteza obubaane ekibiina kyonna eky’abantu baali bakuŋŋaanidde mu luggya lwa Yeekaalu. 
Luke1:11 Awo malayika wa Mukama n’alabikira Zaakaliya, n’ayimirira ku luuyi olwa ddyo olw’ekyoto okwoterezebwa obubaane!" 
Luke1:12 Zaakaliya n’atya nnyo bwe yalaba malayika, entiisa n’emukwata." 
Luke1:13 Naye malayika n’amugamba nti, “Totya Zaakaliya! Kubanga okusaba kwo kuwuliddwa, era mukazi wo Erisabesi ajja kukuzaalira omwana wabulenzi. Olimutuuma erinnya Yokaana." 
Luke1:14 Mwembi mulisanyuka nnyo ne mujaguza. Era bangi abalibasanyukirako olw’okuzaalibwa kwe. 
Luke1:15 Kubanga aliba mukulu mu maaso ga Katonda. Talinywa mwenge wadde ekitamiiza kyonna. Era alijjuzibwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu ng’akyali mu lubuto lwa nnyina. 
Luke1:16 Era alireetera abaana ba Isirayiri bangi okudda eri Mukama Katonda waabwe. 
Luke1:17 Aliweerereza mu mwoyo ne mu maanyi aga nnabbi Eriya, n’akyusa emitima gy’aba kitaabwe okudda eri abaana baabwe, n’okukyusa emitima gy’abajeemu okudda eri amagezi g’abatuukirivu alyoke ateeketeeke abantu okulindirira Mukama.”" 
Luke1:18 Zaakaliya n’agamba malayika nti, “Ekyo nnaakimanya ntya? Kubanga nze ndi mukadde, ne mukazi wange naye akaddiya nnyo.”" 
Luke1:19 Malayika n’amugamba nti, “Nze Gabulyeri ayimirira mu maaso ga Katonda, era y’antumye okwogera naawe n’okukuleetera amawulire gano." 
Luke1:20 Naye olw’okuba nga tokkirizza bigambo byange, ojja kuziba omumwa, era togenda kuddamu kwogera okutuusa ng’ebintu ebyo bimaze okubaawo. Kubanga ebigambo byange byonna birimala kutuukirira mu kiseera kyabyo.”" 
Luke1:21 Abantu abaali balindirira ebweru wa Yeekaalu okulaba Zaakaliya ne beewuunya nnyo ekyamulwisaayo ennyo bw’atyo. 
Luke1:22 Oluvannyuma ennyo bwe yavaayo, yali tasobola kwogera nabo, ne bategeera nga mu Yeekaalu afuniddeyo okwolesebwa. N’asigala ng’azibye omumwa naye ng’abategeeza mu bubonero." 
Luke1:23 N’abeera mu Yeekaalu okutuusa ennaku ze ez’oluwalo lwe zaggwaako n’alyoka addayo eka. 
Luke1:24 Ennaku ezo bwe zaayitawo, mukazi we Erisabesi n’aba olubuto, ne yeekwekera ebbanga lya myezi etaano." 
Luke1:25 N’agamba nti, “Mukama nga wa kisa kingi, kubanga anziggyeeko ensonyi olw’obutaba na mwana.”" 
Luke1:26 Awo mu mwezi ogw’omukaaga, Katonda n’atuma malayika Gabulyeri mu kibuga Nazaaleesi eky’omu Ggaliraaya" 
Luke1:27 eri omuwala erinnya lye Maliyamu, nga tamanyi musajja, eyali ayogerezebwa omusajja erinnya lye Yusufu, ow’omu lulyo lwa Dawudi." 
Luke1:28 Awo Gabulyeri n’alabikira Maliyamu n’amulamusa nti, “Mirembe! Ggwe aweereddwa omukisa! Mukama ali naawe!”" 
Luke1:29 Maliyamu n’atya, n’abulwa n’ekyokwogera, ng’okulamusa okwo kumutabudde, nga n’amakulu gaakwo tagategeera." 
Luke1:30 Awo malayika n’amugamba nti, “Totya, Maliyamu, kubanga olabye ekisa mu maaso ga Katonda." 
Luke1:31 Kubanga, laba, olibeera olubuto, olizaala omwana wabulenzi era olimutuuma erinnya, Yesu." 
Luke1:32 Agenda kuba mukulu, wa kitiibwa, era aliyitibwa Omwana w’Oyo Ali Waggulu Ennyo, era Mukama Katonda alimuwa entebe ey’obwakabaka eya jjajjaawe Dawudi." 
Luke1:33 Alifuga ennyumba ya Yakobo emirembe gyonna, era n’obwakabaka bwe tebulikoma.”" 
Luke1:34 Awo Maliyamu n’abuuza malayika nti, “Ekyo kiriba kitya? Kubanga simanyi musajja.”" 
Luke1:35 Malayika n’amuddamu nti, “Mwoyo Mutukuvu alikukkako, n’amaanyi g’Oyo Ali Waggulu Ennyo galikubuutikira, n’omwana alizaalibwa aliba mutukuvu, Omwana wa Katonda." 
Luke1:36 Laba, muganda wo Erisabesi eyayitibwanga omugumba, kati ali lubuto lwa myezi mukaaga mu bukadde bwe." 
Luke1:37 Kubanga buli kigambo kiyinzika eri Katonda.” 
Luke1:38 Maliyamu n’addamu nti, “Nze ndi muweereza wa Mukama, kibe ku nze nga bw’ogambye.” Malayika n’ava w’ali, n’agenda." 
Luke1:39 Awo mu biro ebyo, Maliyamu n’ayanguwa okugenda mu nsi ya Buyudaaya ey’ensozi, mu kibuga kyayo." 
Luke1:40 N’ayingira mu nnyumba ya Zaakaliya n’alamusa Erisabesi. 
Luke1:41 Naye Maliyamu bwe yalamusa Erisabesi, omwana eyali mu lubuto lwa Erisabesi n’abuukabuuka era n’ajjuzibwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Luke1:42 Erisabesi n’alyoka ayogerera mu ddoboozi ery’omwanguka nti, “Oweereddwa omukisa, ggwe mu bakazi, era n’omwana ali mu lubuto lwo aweereddwa omukisa." 
Luke1:43 Nga nfunye ekitiibwa kinene ggwe nnyina wa Mukama wange okujja okunkyalira! 
Luke1:44 Kubanga bw’oyingidde n’onnamusa, omwana ali mu lubuto lwange oluwulidde ku ddoboozi lyo ne yeekyusakyusa olw’essanyu!" 
Luke1:45 Oweereddwa omukisa bw’okkirizza nti ebintu ebyo Mukama bya kwogeddeko birituukirizibwa.” 
Luke1:46 Maliyamu n’agamba nti," 
Luke1:47 “Emmeeme yange etendereza Mukama. N’omwoyo gwange gusanyukidde Katonda omulokozi wange," 
Luke1:48 Kubanga alabye obuwombeefu bw’omuweereza we. Kubanga laba, okuva kaakano, ab’emirembe gyonna banaampitanga eyaweebwa omukisa." 
Luke1:49 Kubanga Owaamaanyi ankoledde ebikulu; N’erinnya lye ttukuvu. 
Luke1:50 N’okusaasira kwe kwa mirembe na mirembe eri abo abamutya. 
Luke1:51 Akoze eby’amaanyi n’omukono gwe. Asaasaanyizza ab’emitima egy’amalala. 
Luke1:52 Awanudde abafuzi ku ntebe zaabwe ez’obwakabaka n’agulumiza abawombeefu. 
Luke1:53 Abali mu kwetaaga abakkusizza ebirungi. Naye abagagga n’abagoba nga tabawaddeeyo kantu. 
Luke1:54 Adduukiridde omuweereza we Isirayiri, n’ajjukira okusaasira," 
Luke1:55 nga bwe yayogera ne bajjajjaffe, eri Ibulayimu n’ezzadde lye emirembe gyonna.”" 
Luke1:56 Maliyamu n’amala ewa Erisabesi muganda we, ng’emyezi esatu, n’alyoka addayo ewuwe." 
Luke1:57 Awo ekiseera kya Erisabesi eky’okuzaala ne kituuka, n’azaala omwana wabulenzi." 
Luke1:58 Baliraanwa ba Erisabesi n’ab’ekika kye ne bawulira nga Mukama bw’amulaze ekisa, ne basanyukira wamu naye." 
Luke1:59 Awo omwana bwe yaweza ennaku omunaana, ne bajja okumukomola, bonna nga balowooza nti ajja kutuumibwa erinnya lya kitaawe Zaakaliya." 
Luke1:60 Naye Erisabesi n’abagamba nti, “Nedda, ajja kutuumibwa Yokaana.”" 
Luke1:61 Ne bamuwakanya nga bagamba nti, “Mu kika kyo kyonna tetuwulirangayo yatuumibwa linnya eryo.”" 
Luke1:62 Ne babuuza kitaawe w’omwana erinnya ly’ayagala atuumibwe. 
Luke1:63 N’abasaba eky’okuwandiikako, n’awandiikako nti, “Erinnya lye ye Yokaana!” Bonna ne beewuunya nnyo!" 
Luke1:64 Amangwago akamwa ka Zaakaliya ne kagguka, n’olulimi lwe ne lusumulukuka, n’atandika okwogera n’okutendereza Katonda." 
Luke1:65 Abantu bonna ab’omu kitundu ekyo ne batya nnyo, era ebigambo ebyo ne bibuna mu nsi yonna ey’e Buyudaaya ey’ensozi." 
Luke1:66 Buli eyawulira ebigambo ebyo n’abirowoozaako nnyo mu mutima gwe, ne yeebuuza nti, “Naye omwana ono bw’alikula aliba atya?” Kubanga awatali kubuusabuusa, omukono gwa Mukama gwali wamu naye." 
Luke1:67 Awo Zaakaliya kitaawe, n’ajjula Mwoyo Mutukuvu n’awa obunnabbi nti," 
Luke1:68 “Atenderezebwe Mukama Katonda wa Isirayiri, kubanga akyalidde abantu be, era abanunudde." 
Luke1:69 Yatuyimusiriza obuyinza obw’obulokozi, mu nnyumba y’omuddu we Dawudi." 
Luke1:70 Nga bwe yasuubiriza mu bigambo bya bannabbi be abatukuvu ab’edda ennyo," 
Luke1:71 Okulokolebwa mu balabe baffe, n’okuva mu mukono gw’abo bonna abatukyawa," 
Luke1:72 okulaga bajjajjaffe ekisa, n’ajjukira n’endagaano ye entukuvu," 
Luke1:73 ekirayiro kye yalayirira jjajjaffe Ibulayimu," 
Luke1:74 okukituukiriza, n’okulokolebwa okuva mu mukono gw’abalabe baffe awatali kutya, tulyoke tuweereze mu maaso ge," 
Luke1:75 mu butukuvu ne mu butuukirivu ennaku zonna ez’obulamu bwaffe. 
Luke1:76 “Naawe, mwana wange, oliyitibwa nnabbi w’Oyo Ali Waggulu Ennyo; kubanga gw’olikulembera Mukama okumuteekerateekera amakubo ge." 
Luke1:77 Okumanyisa abantu be obulokozi, obw’okusonyiyibwa ebibi byabwe." 
Luke1:78 Byonna birituukirira olw’ekisa kya Katonda waffe ekingi. Emmambya esala eritukyalira okuva mu ggulu," 
Luke1:79 okwakira abo abatudde mu kizikiza ne mu kisiikirize eky’okufa, okuluŋŋamya ebigere byaffe mu kkubo ery’emirembe.”" 
Luke1:80 Omwana n’akula n’ayongerwako amaanyi mu mwoyo, n’abeera mu malungu okutuusa ku lunaku lwe yayolesebwa eri Isirayiri." 
Luke2:1 Awo olwatuuka mu biseera ebyo, Kayisaali Agusito n’ayisa etteeka abantu bonna beewandiisa." 
Luke2:2 Okubala kuno kwe kwasooka okubaawo ku mulembe gwa Kuleniyo nga ye gavana w’Obusuuli. 
Luke2:3 Bonna ne bagenda okwewandiisa, buli muntu mu kibuga ky’ewaabwe." 
Luke2:4 Awo Yusufu n’ava e Nazaaleesi eky’e Ggaliraaya, n’agenda mu kibuga kya Dawudi ekiyitibwa Besirekemu eky’e Buyudaaya, kubanga yali wa mu kika kya Dawudi," 
Luke2:5 yeewandiise ne Maliyamu eyali olubuto, oyo gwe yali ayogereza." 
Luke2:6 Naye bwe baali bali eyo ekiseera kya Maliyamu eky’okuzaala ne kituuka. 
Luke2:7 N’azaala omwana we omubereberye omulenzi, n’amubikka mu bugoye, n’amuzazika mu lutiba ente mwe ziriira, kubanga tebaafuna kifo mu nnyumba y’abagenyi." 
Luke2:8 Mu kiro ekyo waaliwo abasumba abaali mu kitundu ekyo kye kimu ku ttale nga bakuuma endiga zaabwe. 
Luke2:9 Awo malayika wa Mukama n’abalabikira, ne waakaayakana n’ekitiibwa kya Mukama, ne batya nnyo." 
Luke2:10 Malayika n’abagumya nti, “Temutya, kubanga mbaleetedde amawulire amalungi ag’essanyu eringi, era nga ga bantu bonna." 
Luke2:11 Kubanga Omulokozi, ye Kristo Mukama waffe azaaliddwa leero mu kibuga kya Dawudi." 
Luke2:12 Ku kino kwe munaamutegeerera: Mujja kulaba omwana omuwere, ng’abikkiddwa mu ngoye, ng’azazikiddwa mu lutiba lw’ente.”" 
Luke2:13 Amangwago eggye lya bamalayika ab’omu ggulu ne beegatta ne malayika oyo ne batendereza Katonda nga bagamba nti," 
Luke2:14 “Ekitiibwa kibe eri Katonda Ali Waggulu ennyo. N’emirembe gibe mu nsi eri abantu Katonda b’asiima.” 
Luke2:15 Awo bamalayika bwe baamala okuddayo mu ggulu, abasumba ne bateesa nti, “Tugende e Besirekemu tulabe kino ekibaddewo, Mukama ky’atutegeezezza.”" 
Luke2:16 Ne bayanguwa ne bagenda, ne balaba Maliyamu ne Yusufu, n’omwana omuwere ng’azazikiddwa mu lutiba lw’ente." 
Luke2:17 Awo abasumba ne bategeeza bye baalabye, n’ebya bategeezeddwa ebikwata ku mwana oyo." 
Luke2:18 Bonna abaawulira ebigambo by’abasumba ne beewuunya nnyo. 
Luke2:19 Naye Maliyamu n’akuumanga ebigambo ebyo mu mutima gwe era ng’abirowoozaako nnyo. 
Luke2:20 Awo abasumba ne baddayo gye balundira ebisibo byabwe, nga bagulumiza era nga batendereza Katonda, olw’ebyo byonna bye baawulira era ne bye baalaba nga bwe baali bategeezeddwa." 
Luke2:21 Olunaku olw’omunaana olw’okukomolerwako bwe lwatuuka, n’atuumibwa erinnya YESU, malayika lye yayogera nga Yesu tannaba kuba mu lubuto lwa nnyina." 
Luke2:22 Awo ekiseera bwe kyatuuka Maliyamu okugenda mu Yeekaalu atukuzibwe, ng’amateeka ga Musa bwe galagira ne batwala Yesu e Yerusaalemi okumuwaayo eri Mukama." 
Luke2:23 Kubanga mu mateeka ago, Katonda yalagira nti, “Omwana omubereberye bw’anaabanga omulenzi, anaaweebwangayo eri Mukama.”" 
Luke2:24 Era mu kiseera kye kimu bakadde ba Yesu ne bawaayo ssaddaaka amateeka nga bwe galagira okuwaayo amayiba abiri oba enjiibwa bbiri. 
Luke2:25 Ku lunaku olwo, waaliwo omusajja erinnya lye Simyoni, eyabeeranga mu Yerusaalemi, nga mutuukirivu, ng’atya Katonda, era ng’ajjudde Mwoyo Mutukuvu, ng’alindirira okusanyusibwa kwa Isirayiri." 
Luke2:26 Kubanga yali abikkuliddwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu nti tagenda kufa nga tannalaba ku Kristo, Omulokozi." 
Luke2:27 Mwoyo Mutukuvu n’amuluŋŋamya okujja mu Yeekaalu. Maliyamu ne Yusufu bwe baaleeta Omwana Yesu okumuwaayo eri Mukama ng’amateeka bwe galagira, ne Simyoni naye yaliwo." 
Luke2:28 Simyoni n’ajja n’asitula Omwana mu mikono gye, n’atendereza Katonda ng’agamba nti," 
Luke2:29 “Mukama wange, kaakano osiibule omuweereza wo mirembe, ng’ekigambo kyo bwe kigamba." 
Luke2:30 Kubanga amaaso gange galabye Obulokozi bwo," 
Luke2:31 bwe wateekateeka mu maaso g’abantu bonna," 
Luke2:32 okuba Omusana ogw’okwakira amawanga. N’okuleetera abantu bo Abayisirayiri ekitiibwa!” 
Luke2:33 Kitaawe w’omwana ne nnyina ne beewuunya ebigambo ebyayogerwa ku Yesu. 
Luke2:34 Awo Simyoni n’abasabira omukisa. N’alyoka n’agamba Maliyamu nti, “Omwana ono bangi mu Isirayiri tebagenda kumukkiriza, era alireetera bangi okugwa n’abalala ne bayimusibwa." 
Luke2:35 Era naawe ennaku eri ng’ekitala erikufumita omutima, n’ebirowoozo by’omu mitima gy’abantu birimanyibwa.”" 
Luke2:36 Waaliwo nnabbi omukazi, ayitibwa Ana, muwala wa Fanweri, ow’omu kika kya Aseri, era nga mukadde nnyo, eyafumbirwa nga muwala muto n’amala ne bba emyaka musanvu gyokka, bba n’afa," 
Luke2:37 n’asigala nga nnamwandu. Mu kiseera kino yali yaakamala emyaka kinaana mu ena, era teyavanga mu Yeekaalu ng’asiiba n’okwegayiriranga Katonda emisana n’ekiro." 
Luke2:38 Awo Ana mu kiseera ekyo yali ayimiridde okumpi ne Maliyamu ne Yusufu, naye n’atandika okutendereza Katonda ng’amwogerako eri abo bonna abaali balindirira okununulibwa kwa Yerusaalemi." 
Luke2:39 Awo bakadde ba Yesu bwe baamala okutuukiriza byonna ng’amateeka ga Mukama bwe galagira, ne baddayo e Nazaaleesi eky’omu Ggaliraaya." 
Luke2:40 Omwana n’akula, n’aba w’amaanyi, n’ajjuzibwa amagezi n’ekisa kya Katonda kyali ku ye." 
Luke2:41 Bakadde ba Yesu buli mwaka bagendanga mu Yerusaalemi ku Mbaga y’Okuyitako. 
Luke2:42 Awo Yesu bwe yaweza emyaka kkumi n’ebiri egy’obukulu n’ayambuka e Yerusaalemi ne bakadde be ku mbaga, nga empisa yaabwe bwe yali." 
Luke2:43 Awo embaga ng’ewedde, ne bakyusa okuddayo ewaabwe, naye omulenzi Yesu n’asigala mu Yerusaalemi, naye bazadde be ne batakimanya."
