Romans3:22 Obutuukirivu bwa Katonda butuweebwa olw’okukkiriza Yesu Kristo. Katonda tasosola. 
Romans3:23 Ffenna twayonoona era tetusaanira kitiibwa kya Katonda. 
Romans3:24 Kyokka twaweebwa obutuukirivu bwa buwa olw’ekisa kye ekiri mu kununulibwa okuli mu Yesu Kristo; 
Romans3:25 Katonda yaweereza Kristo okuba omutango, bwe tukkiriza Kristo olw’omusaayi gwe yayiwa. Alaga obutuukirivu bwe mu kugumiikiriza ebibi ebyakolebwa edda, be bantu abaayonoona mu biseera biri eby’edda." 
Romans3:26 Kino kiraga Katonda bw’alaga okwaniriza kw’alina eri abantu mu biro bino, bwe baba n’okukkiriza mu Yesu." 
Romans3:27 Kale lwaki twenyumiriza? Tewali nsonga etwenyumirizisa. Lwa kuba nga twagoberera amateeka? Nedda, lwa kukkiriza." 
Romans3:28 Noolwekyo omuntu aweebwa obutuukirivu lwa kukkiriza so si lwa kugoberera mateeka. 
Romans3:29 Oba Katonda wa Bayudaaya bokka? Si ye Katonda w’amawanga amalala gonna? Weewaawo nabo Katonda waabwe. 
Romans3:30 Kubanga ye Katonda omu awa obutuukirivu abaakomolebwa, n’abo abataakomolebwa olw’okukkiriza kwabwe." 
Romans3:31 Kale amateeka tugaggyewo olw’okukkiriza? Kikafuuwe. Tunyweza manyweze. 
Romans4:1 Kale kiki kye tunaayogera ku jjajjaffe Ibulayimu ku bikwata ku by’omubiri? 
Romans4:2 Singa Ibulayimu yaweebwa obutuukirivu lwa bikolwa, yandyenyumirizza, naye si eri Katonda." 
Romans4:3 Ebyawandiikibwa bitugamba bitya? Ibulayimu yakkiriza Katonda ne kimubalirwa okuba obutuukirivu. 
Romans4:4 Omuntu bw’akola omulimu, asasulwa empeera ye. Empeera gy’aweebwa, teba kirabo." 
Romans4:5 Katonda tayinza kukusembeza olw’ebikolwa byo. Katonda asembeza aboonoonyi olw’okukkiriza kwe balina mu ye. 
Romans4:6 Kabaka Dawudi naye yayogera kye kimu ku muntu ono Katonda gw’awa obutuukirivu obutavudde mu bikolwa bye ng’agamba nti: 
Romans4:7 “Baweereddwa omukisa, abasonyiyiddwa ebyonoono byabwe, ne baggyibwako ebibi byabwe." 
Romans4:8 Aweereddwa omukisa omuntu, Mukama gw’atalibalira kibi.”" 
Romans4:9 Kale omukisa guno, gw’abakomole bokka oba n’abatali bakomole? Ebyawandiikibwa bitugamba nti okukkiriza kwa Ibulayimu kwamubalirwa okuba obutuukirivu." 
Romans4:10 Kale, kwamubalirwa kutya? Ng’akomolebbwa oba nga tannakomolebwa? Nedda si ng’akomolebbwa naye nga tannakomolebwa." 
Romans4:11 Akabonero ke yafuna ak’okukomolebwa, ye nvumbo ku butuukirivu olw’okukkiriza kwe, nga tannakomolebwa, alyoke abeere jjajja w’abo bonna abakkiriza nga si bakomole, nabo balyoke babalirwe obutuukirivu." 
Romans4:12 Ate era ye jjajja w’abantu bonna, abakomole, era abatambulira mu kkubo ery’okukkiriza, jjajjaffe Ibulayimu kwe yalina nga tannakomolebwa." 
Romans4:13 Ibulayimu n’ezzadde lye tebaaweebwa kisuubizo eky’okulya ensi yonna, ng’omugabo gwe, lwa kukwata mateeka. Katonda, ensi yagimusuubiza lwa butuukirivu obwamuweebwa olw’okukkiriza." 
Romans4:14 Kale obanga baweebwa obusika lw’amateeka, okukkiriza kuba tekugasa, era nga n’ekisuubizo tekirina makulu." 
Romans4:15 Katonda anyiiga Amateeka ge bwe gatagonderwa. Naye bwe wataba mateeka, tewaba mateeka ga kujeemera." 
Romans4:16 Noolwekyo ekisuubizo kijja lwa kukkiriza, kiryoke kiweebwe lwa kisa, eri ezzadde lyonna, so si ezzadde erigondera amateeka lyokka naye n’eri ezzadde erya Ibulayimu olw’okukkiriza; era oyo ye jjajjaffe ffenna." 
Romans4:17 Kyawandiikibwa nti, “Nkufudde jjajja w’amawanga amangi.” Ye jjajjaffe mu maaso g’oyo gwe yakkiriza, Katonda azuukiza abafu, era alaba ebitaliiwo ng’ebiriwo, era atonda ebintu ebiggya." 
Romans4:18 Katonda yasuubiza Ibulayimu abazzukulu bangi. Ne bwe kyalabika ng’ekitasoboka, Ibulayimu yalina okukkiriza mu Katonda, n’oluvannyuma n’abeera jjajja w’amawanga mangi, okusinziira ku ekyo ekyayogerwa nti, “Ezadde lyo bwe liriba.”" 
Romans4:19 Teyatendewererwa mu kukkiriza, newaakubadde nga yali wa myaka nga kikumi, nga n’omubiri gwe munafu nnyo, ate nga ne Saala mugumba." 
Romans4:20 Teyabuusabuusa kisuubizo kya Katonda mu butakkiriza, naye yaweebwa amaanyi lwa kukkiriza; n’agulumiza Katonda." 
Romans4:21 Yakakasiza ddala nti Katonda kye yasuubiza asobola okukituukiriza," 
Romans4:22 era bwe kityo ne kimubalirwa okuba obutuukirivu. 
Romans4:23 Naye tekyawandiikibwa ku lulwe yekka nti, “Kyamubalirwa okuba obutuukirivu;”" 
Romans4:24 naye era naffe, abakkiririza mu oyo eyazuukiza Yesu Mukama waffe mu bafu." 
Romans4:25 Kristo yaweebwayo okuttibwa olw’ebibi byaffe, n’azuukizibwa tulyoke tuweebwe obutuukirivu." 
Romans5:1 Kale nga bwe twaweebwa obutuukirivu olw’okukkiriza tulina emirembe ne Katonda, mu Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo," 
Romans5:2 era olw’okukkiriza mu Kristo tufunye ekisa kya Katonda mwe tubeera, era mwe twenyumiririza, nga tusuubira ekitiibwa kya Katonda." 
Romans5:3 Tetukoma ku ekyo kyokka, naye twenyumiririza ne mu kubonaabona, nga tumanyi ng’okubonaabona kutuyigiriza okugumiikiriza." 
Romans5:4 Era okugumiikiriza kututuusa ku mbala ennungi, n’embala ennungi ne zitutuusa ku ssuubi." 
Romans5:5 Era essuubi teritukwasa nsonyi kubanga Katonda atuwadde Mwoyo Mutukuvu ajjuza emitima gyaffe okwagala kwe. 
Romans5:6 Bwe twali tukyali banafu wakati mu bibi, Kristo yatufiirira ffe aboonoonyi." 
Romans5:7 Kizibu okufiirira omuntu omutuukirivu. Oboolyawo omuntu ayinza okwewaayo okufa ku lw’omuntu omulungi. 
Romans5:8 Kyokka Katonda alaga okwagala kwe gye tuli mu ngeri eno: bwe twali tukyali boonoonyi, Kristo n’atufiirira." 
Romans5:9 Kale obanga twaweebwa obutuukirivu olw’omusaayi gwe, alitulokola okuva mu busungu bwa Katonda." 
Romans5:10 Kale obanga bwe twali tukyali balabe ba Katonda twatabaganyizibwa naye mu kufa kw’Omwana we, bwe tutabagana naye tetulisingawo nnyo okulokolebwa olw’obulamu bwe?" 
Romans5:11 So si ekyo kyokka, twenyumiririza mu Katonda, kubanga Katonda yaweereza Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, mwe twatabaganyizibwa." 
Romans5:12 Ekibi kyajja mu nsi olw’omuntu omu, ne kireeta okufa mu nsi. Mu ngeri y’emu olw’okuba nga bonna baayonoona, bonna balifa." 
Romans5:13 Ekibi kyaliwo mu nsi ng’amateeka tegannabaawo. Kyokka Katonda teyagamba nti be balina okuvunaanyizibwa olw’ebibi byabwe, kubanga Amateeka gaali tegannabeerawo." 
Romans5:14 Kyokka okufa kwali kukyafuga okuva ku Adamu okutuusa ku Musa, nga kutwaliramu n’abo abataayonoona mu ngeri Adamu gye yayonoonamu. Mu ngeri endala, Adamu ali mu kifaananyi kya Kristo eyajja oluvannyuma." 
Romans5:15 Naye Katonda wa kisa nnyo, kubanga ekirabo kye yali agenda okutuwa, kyali kya njawulo ku kibi kya Adamu. Okwonoona kw’omuntu omu, Adamu, kwaleetera bangi okufa, kyokka ekisa kya Katonda n’ekirabo ekiri mu kisa ky’omuntu omu Yesu Kristo kyasukkirira nnyo ne kibuna mu bantu bangi." 
Romans5:16 Waliwo enjawulo nnene wakati w’ekibi kya Adamu n’ekirabo kya Katonda. Ekibi ekimu kyatuweesa ekibonerezo. Kyokka ekirabo kya Katonda kyatukkirizisa gy’ali, newaakubadde nga twonoona emirundi mingi." 
Romans5:17 Obanga olw’okwonoona kw’omuntu omu okufa kwabuna, abaliweebwa ekisa kya Katonda n’ekirabo eky’obutuukirivu, tebalisinga nnyo okufugira mu bulamu olw’omuntu omu Yesu Kristo?" 
Romans5:18 Kale ng’abantu bonna bwe baasalirwa omusango olw’ekibi ekimu, bwe kityo n’olw’ekikolwa ekimu eky’obutuukirivu abantu bonna mwe baaweerwa obutuukirivu ne bafuna obulamu." 
Romans5:19 Obujeemu bw’omuntu omu bwafuula abangi okuba aboonoonyi. Bwe butyo n’obuwulize bw’omuntu omu Yesu, bulifuula bangi okuba abatuukirivu." 
Romans5:20 Amateeka gaatekebwawo, amaanyi g’ekibi galyoke galabisibwe. Kyokka ekibi bwe kyeyongera, ekisa kya Katonda kyo ne kyeyongera nnyo okusingawo." 
Romans5:21 Ng’ekibi bwe kyafugira mu kufa, n’ekisa kya Katonda kifugira mu butuukirivu ne kitutuusa mu bulamu obutaggwaawo mu Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe." 
Romans6:1 Kale tunaagamba tutya? Tweyongere okwonoona, olwo ekisa kya Katonda kiryoke kyeyongere?" 
Romans6:2 Kikafuuwe, kubanga ffe abaafa eri ekibi tuyinza tutya okweyongera okukikola?" 
Romans6:3 Oba temumanyi nga bonna bwe baabatizibwa mu Yesu Kristo, baafiira wamu naye?" 
Romans6:4 Bwe twabatizibwa twaziikibwa wamu ne Kristo. Nga Kristo bwe yazuukizibwa okuva mu bafu olw’ekitiibwa kya Kitaawe, naffe twafuna obulamu obuggya, era bwe tutyo tutambulirenga mu bulamu obwo obuggya." 
Romans6:5 Obanga twegatta wamu naye mu kifaananyi eky’okufa kwe, bwe tutyo bwe tulyegattira awamu naye mu kuzuukira kwe." 
Romans6:6 Tumanyi kino nti omuntu waffe ow’edda yakomererwa wamu naye ku musaalaba, omubiri gw’ekibi guleme kuba gwa mugaso, tuleme kuddamu kuba baddu ba kibi." 
Romans6:7 Omuntu bw’afa aba takyafugibwa kibi. 
Romans6:8 Naye obanga twafiira wamu ne Kristo, tukkiriza nga tuliba balamu wamu naye" 
Romans6:9 Tumanyi nti, nga Kristo bwe yazuukizibwa mu bafu, takyafa nate, okufa tekukyamufuga." 
Romans6:10 Okufa kwe yafa eri ekibi, yafa omulundi gumu, naye kaakano mulamu era mulamu ku bwa Katonda." 
Romans6:11 Bwe mutyo nammwe mwerowoozenga okuba abaafiira ddala eri ekibi, naye abalamu eri Katonda mu Kristo Yesu." 
Romans6:12 Noolwekyo ekibi kiremenga okufuga omubiri gwammwe ogufa, nga mugondera okwegomba kwagwo." 
Romans6:13 Temuwangayo bitundu byammwe eby’omubiri okukozesebwa ebitali bya butuukirivu eri ekibi, naye mweweereyo ddala eri Katonda, ng’abantu abalamu abaava mu bafu. Ebitundu byammwe eby’omubiri gwammwe bikozesebwe eby’obutuukirivu eri Katonda." 
Romans6:14 Temukkiriza kibi kwongera kubafuga, kubanga temukyafugibwa mateeka, wabula ekisa kya Katonda." 
Romans6:15 Kale tukole tutya? Kale tukole ekibi kubanga tetufugibwa mateeka wabula ekisa kya Katonda? Kikafuuwe. 
Romans6:16 Temumanyi nga muba baddu b’oyo gwe muwulira? Muyinza okuba abaddu b’ekibi ne kibaleetera okufa, oba muyinza okuba abaddu abawulira Katonda n’abawa obutuukirivu." 
Romans6:17 Kyokka Katonda yeebazibwe kubanga mwabanga baddu ba kibi, naye bwe mwagondera okuyigiriza kwe mwayigirizibwa n’omutima gwammwe gwonna, ne mukugondera." 
Romans6:18 Noolwekyo mwasumululwa okuva mu kibi, ne mufuuka baddu ba butuukirivu abasanyusa Katonda." 
Romans6:19 Njogera nga nkozesa olulimi olwa bulijjo kubanga mukyali banafu. Nga bwe mwawangayo ebitundu byammwe eby’omubiri okuba abaddu b’ebirowoozo eby’obugwagwa, ne mweyongeranga okukola ebitali bya butuukirivu, bwe mutyo muweeyo ebitundu byammwe eby’omubiri okuba abaddu b’obutuukirivu, nga mweweerayo ddala eri Katonda, mube batukuvu." 
Romans6:20 Bwe mwali abaddu b’ekibi, temwafugibwanga butuukirivu." 
Romans6:21 Kale mwagasibwa ki mu kukola ebintu ebyo, ebibaleetera ensonyi? Enkomerero yaabyo kufa." 
Romans6:22 Naye kaakano obanga mwasumululwa mu kibi, ne mufuuka baddu ba Katonda, ebivaamu bibatuusa ku kutukuzibwa, n’enkomerero bwe bulamu obutaggwaawo." 
Romans6:23 Empeera y’ekibi kwe kufa, naye ekirabo kya Katonda, bwe bulamu obutaggwaawo mu Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe." 
Romans7:1 Temumanyi abooluganda, kubanga njogera eri abamanyi amateeka, ng’amateeka gafuga oyo yekka akyali omulamu?" 
Romans7:2 Ka mbawe ekyokulabirako: mu mateeka omukazi omufumbo, asigala nga wa bba, bba bw’aba ng’akyali mulamu. Naye bba bw’afa, omukazi oyo ng’asumuluddwa mu tteeka eribagatta." 
Romans7:3 Noolwekyo omukazi oyo bwe yeegatta n’omusajja omulala, bba ng’akyali mulamu, omukazi oyo anaayitibwanga mwenzi. Naye bba bw’afanga, olwo omukazi omufumbo anaabanga asumuluddwa mu tteeka, era taabenga mwenzi bw’anaafumbirwanga omusajja omulala." 
Romans7:4 Nammwe baganda bange mwafa eri amateeka, muli ba mubiri gwa Kristo. Mwegatta ku Kristo eyazuukizibwa okuva mu bafu, tulyoke tubale ebibala ebisanyusa Katonda." 
Romans7:5 Kubanga bwe twali tukyafugibwa omubiri, okwegomba kw’ebibi kwakoleranga mu bitundu byaffe eby’omubiri olw’amateeka, era enkomerero kwali kufa." 
Romans7:6 Naye kaakano tetukyafugibwa mateeka. Tuli bafu eri ebyo ebyali bitusibye, era tebitulinaako buyinza. Noolwekyo tuyinza okuweereza Katonda mu ngeri empya eya Mwoyo Mutukuvu, so si mu nkola enkadde ey’amateeka." 
Romans7:7 Kale tunaayogera ki? Amateeka kye kibi? Kikafuuwe. Singa tewaali mateeka, sanditegedde kibi. N’okwegomba kw’omubiri sandikutegeeredde ddala singa amateeka tegaagamba nti, “Teweegombanga.”" 
Romans7:8 Ekibi kyeyambisa etteeka lino, ne kindeetera okwegomba okwa buli ngeri. Noolwekyo awatali mateeka, ekibi kiba kifu." 
Romans7:9 Edda nali mulamu awatali mateeka, naye etteeka bwe lyajja, ekibi ne kiramuka, n’okufa ne nfa." 
Romans7:10 Era ne nkizuula ng’etteeka eryali liteekwa okumpa obulamu, lye lyandetera okufa." 
Romans7:11 Ekibi kyeyambisa ekiragiro ekyo ne kinnimba, era ne kinzita." 
Romans7:12 Noolwekyo amateeka matukuvu, era n’ekiragiro kitukuvu, kiruŋŋamya era kirungi." 
Romans7:13 Kale ekirungi gye ndi, ate kye kyafuuka okufa? Nedda. Ekibi kye kyakozesa ekiragiro ekirungi kiryoke kinzite. Noolwekyo tulaba ekibi bwe kiri, ekibi ddala." 
Romans7:14 Tumanyi ng’amateeka mwoyo, naye nze omuntu obuntu, natundibwa ng’omuddu nfugibwe ekibi." 
Romans7:15 Kubanga kye nkola sikimanyi. Kye njagala si kye nkola, naye kye nkyawa kye nkola." 
Romans7:16 Newaakubadde nga nkola kye mmanyi nga kikyamu, nzikiriza ng’amateeka malungi." 
Romans7:17 Noolwekyo si nze nkola ebintu ebyo ebibi, wabula ekibi ekiri mu nze." 
Romans7:18 Mmanyi nga mu nze, temuli kalungi n’akamu. Ne bwe njagala okukola ekirungi, tewali kirungi kye nkola." 
Romans7:19 Ekirungi kye njagala okukola si kye nkola, naye ekibi kye saagala kye nkola." 
Romans7:20 Naye obanga kye saagala kye nkola, si nze mba nkikola, wabula ekibi ekibeera mu nze." 
Romans7:21 Noolwekyo nzudde mu mateeka nga bwe njagala okukola ebirungi, ekibi kimbeera kumpi." 
Romans7:22 Mu nze mu muntu ow’omunda njagala nnyo okugondera amateeka ga Katonda. 
Romans7:23 Naye mu mubiri gwange gwonna, ndaba amateeka ag’enjawulo nga gawakana n’etteeka lya Katonda amagezi gange ge limanyi. Ekyo kinfuula omusibe w’amateeka ag’ekibi, ekikolera mu mubiri gwange." 
Romans7:24 Nga ndi muntu munaku! Ani alindokola mu mubiri guno ogugenda okufa? 
Romans7:25 Kyokka Katonda yeebazibwe mu Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe. Nze kennyini mu birowoozo byange, ndi muddu w’amateeka ga Katonda era gwe mpeereza, newaakubadde ng’okwegomba kwange okw’omubiri, mpeereza etteeka ly’ekibi." 
Romans8:1 Noolwekyo abo abali mu Kristo Yesu, tebaliiko musango; abo abatagoberera kwegomba okw’omubiri wabula ne bagoberera Omwoyo." 
Romans8:2 Kubanga etteeka ery’Omwoyo aleeta obulamu mu Kristo Yesu, lyannunula okuva mu tteeka ly’ekibi n’okufa." 
Romans8:3 Amateeka ga Musa kye gataayinza kukola, olw’okunafuyizibwa omubiri, Katonda yakikola mu Mwana we yennyini bwe yamutuma mu kifaananyi ky’omubiri ogw’ekibi, n’asalira ekibi omusango mu mubiri." 
Romans8:4 Ekyo kyabaawo, eby’obutuukirivu mu mateeka biryoke bituukirire mu ffe bwe tugondera Omwoyo, ffe abatatambulira mu mubiri naye abatambulira mu Mwoyo." 
Romans8:5 Abo abalowooleza mu mubiri balowooza bintu bya mubiri, naye abalowooleza mu Mwoyo balowooza bya Mwoyo." 
Romans8:6 Okulowooleza mu by’omubiri kwe kufa, naye okufugibwa Omwoyo bwe bulamu n’emirembe." 
Romans8:7 Kubanga okulowooza eby’omubiri kya bulabe eri Katonda. Ebirowoozo eby’omubiri tebiyinza kuwulira mateeka ga Katonda. 
Romans8:8 N’abo abafugibwa omubiri tebayinza kusanyusa Katonda. 
Romans8:9 Naye mmwe temufugibwa mubiri wabula mufugibwa Mwoyo, kubanga Omwoyo wa Katonda abeera mu mmwe. Era omuntu yenna bw’ataba na Mwoyo wa Kristo, oyo si wa Kristo." 
Romans8:10 Era obanga Kristo ali mu mmwe, omubiri gwammwe mufu olw’ekibi, ate ng’omwoyo gwammwe mulamu olw’obutuukirivu." 
Romans8:11 Era obanga Omwoyo w’oyo eyazuukiza Yesu okuva mu bafu abeera mu mmwe, oyo eyazuukiza Kristo mu bafu, alifuula emibiri gyammwe egifa okuba emiramu ku bw’Omwoyo we abeera mu mmwe." 
Romans8:12 Noolwekyo abooluganda tulina ebbanja, so si eri omubiri okugondera bye gutulagira." 
Romans8:13 Kubanga bwe munaagobereranga omubiri, mugenda kufa. Naye bwe munnatta ebikolwa eby’omubiri, muliba balamu," 
Romans8:14 kubanga abo bonna abakulemberwa Omwoyo wa Katonda be baana ba Katonda. 
Romans8:15 Temwaweebwa mwoyo gwa buddu ate mutye, wabula mwaweebwa Omwoyo eyabafuula abaana, era ku bw’oyo tumukoowoola nti, “ Aba, Kitaffe.”" 
Romans8:16 Omwoyo yennyini akakasiza wamu n’omwoyo waffe nga bwe tuli abaana ba Katonda. 
Romans8:17 Kale nga bwe tuli abaana, tuli basika ba Katonda, era tulisikira wamu ne Kristo, bwe tubonaabonera awamu naye, tulyoke tuweerwe wamu naye ekitiibwa." 
Romans8:18 Okubonaabona kwe tubonaabona kaakano kutono nnyo bwe kugeraageranyizibwa n’ekitiibwa ekiritubikulirwa. 
Romans8:19 Ebitonde birindirira n’essuubi lingi ekiseera abaana ba Katonda lwe baliragibwa. 
Romans8:20 Kubanga ebitonde tebyafugibwa butaliimu nga byeyagalidde, wabula ku bw’oyo eyabifugisa, mu kusuubira." 
Romans8:21 Ebitonde birifuulibwa bya ddembe okuva mu kufugibwa okuvunda ne bigabanira wamu n’abaana ba Katonda ekitiibwa eky’okuba mu ddembe. 
Romans8:22 Tumanyi ng’ebitonde byonna bisinda era ne birumwa ng’omukazi alumwa okuzaala bw’abeera. 
Romans8:23 Naye ate si ekyo kyokka, era naffe abalina ebibala ebibereberye eby’Omwoyo, naffe tusinda munda yaffe nga tulindirira okufuuka abaana, kwe kununulibwa kw’emibiri gyaffe." 
Romans8:24 Twalokolebwa lwa ssuubi eryo. Naye essuubi erirabibwa si ssuubi; kubanga ani asuubira ky’alabako? 
Romans8:25 Naye bwe tusuubira kye tutalabako, tukirindirira n’okugumiikiriza." 
Romans8:26 N’Omwoyo bw’atyo atubeera mu bunafu bwaffe. Tetumanyi kusaba nga bwe kitugwanira, naye Omwoyo yennyini atwegayiririra n’okusinda okutayogerekeka." 
Romans8:27 Oyo akebera emitima, amanyi Omwoyo ky’alowooza, kubanga yeegayiririra abatukuvu ng’okusiima kwa Katonda bwe kuli." 
Romans8:28 Era tumanyi nga eri abo abaagala Katonda, era abo abayitibwa ng’okuteesa kwe bwe kuli, ebintu byonna bibatuukako olw’obulungi." 
Romans8:29 Kubanga abo be yamanya olubereberye, yabalonda okufaananyizibwa mu kifaananyi ky’Omwana we, ye abeerenga omubereberye mu booluganda abangi." 
Romans8:30 Abo be yalonda, n’okubayita yabayita, n’abo be yayita, yabawa obutuukirivu, n’abo be yawa obutuukirivu yabagulumiza." 
Romans8:31 Kale tunaagamba ki ku bintu bino? Katonda bw’abeera ku lwaffe, ani asobola okutulwanyisa?" 
Romans8:32 Oyo ataasaasira Mwana we ye, naye n’amuwaayo ku lwaffe ffenna, talituwa buwi bintu byonna awamu naye?" 
Romans8:33 Ani aliroopa abalonde ba Katonda? Katonda y’awa obutuukirivu. 
Romans8:34 Ani alibasalira omusango? Kristo Yesu yafa, kyokka okusinga byonna yazuukizibwa, era ali ku mukono ogwa ddyo ogwa Katonda, ng’atwegayiririra." 
Romans8:35 Ani alitwawukanya n’okwagala kwa Kristo? Kubonaabona, oba bulumi, oba kuyigganyizibwa, oba njala, oba kuba bwerere, oba kabi, oba kitala?" 
Romans8:36 Kyawandiikibwa nti: “Ku lulwo tutiisibwatiisibwa n’okuttibwa obudde okuziba, era tubalibwa ng’endiga ez’okusalibwa.”" 
Romans8:37 Naye mu bino byonna tuwangudde n’okukirawo ku bw’oyo eyatwagala. 
Romans8:38 Kubanga nkakasiza ddala nga newaakubadde okufa, wadde obulamu, wadde bamalayika, wadde abafuzi, wadde ebiriwo, wadde ebigenda okujja, wadde amaanyi," 
Romans8:39 wadde obugulumivu, wadde okukka wansi, wadde ekitonde ekirala kyonna, tewali kiriyinza kutwawukanya n’okwagala kwa Katonda okuli mu Kristo Yesu Mukama waffe." 
Romans9:1 Njogera amazima mu Kristo, sirimba, omwoyo gwange nga gunkakasa mu Mwoyo Mutukuvu," 
Romans9:2 nga ndimunakuwavu nnyo era nga nnumwa mu mutima. 
Romans9:3 Nnali njagala nze mwene nkolimirwe Katonda era njawukanyizibwe ku Kristo olwa baganda bange, bwe tuli ab’omu mubiri," 
Romans9:4 be Bayisirayiri, abantu ba Katonda abalonde. Katonda yabalaga ekitiibwa kye, n’akola nabo endagaano, n’abawa n’amateeka ge. Yeekaalu yagibawa, n’abawa n’ebyasuubizibwa." 
Romans9:5 Balina bajjajjaabwe abamanyiddwa, Kristo be yasibukamu mu mubiri. Nsaba Katonda afuga byonna atenderezebwenga emirembe gyonna, Amiina." 
Romans9:6 Naye si kuba nti Katonda yalemwa okutuukiriza kye yasuubiza. Si bonna ab’omu Isirayiri nti bantu ba Katonda ddala. 
Romans9:7 Ate so si nti ly’ezzadde lya Ibulayimu bonna balyoke babeere abaana, naye ekisuubizo kyali ku Isaaka bwe kyagambibwa nti, “Mu Isaaka mwe ndituukiririza ebyo byonna bye nakusuubiza.”" 
Romans9:8 Kino kitegeeza nti abaana ab’omubiri si be baana ba Katonda, wabula abo ab’okusuubiza be babalibwa okuba ezzadde lya Ibulayimu." 
Romans9:9 Kubanga ekigambo ky’okusuubiza kye kino nti, “Mu kiseera nga kino Saala alizaala omwana owoobulenzi.”" 
Romans9:10 Ate si ekyo kyokka, naye ne Isaaka jjajjaffe yalina Lebbeeka eyali olubuto." 
Romans9:11 Naye ng’abalongo tebannazaalibwa, era nga tebannabaako kye bakola kyonna ekirungi oba ekibi, okusiima kwa Katonda nga bwe kuli," 
Romans9:12 si lwa bikolwa wabula ku bw’oyo eyabayita, kyategeezebwa Lebbeeka nti, “Omukulu y’aliba omuweereza w’omuto.”" 
Romans9:13 Era nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Yakobo namwagala, naye Esawu namukyawa.”" 
Romans9:14 Kale tunaagamba ki? Ddala ddala Katonda talina bwenkanya? Kikafuuwe. 
Romans9:15 Agamba Musa nti, “Ndisaasira oyo gwe ndisaasira, era ndikwatirwa ekisa oyo gwe ndikwatirwa ekisa.”" 
Romans9:16 Noolwekyo tekiva ku ebyo omuntu by’ayagala newaakubadde by’akola, wabula ku kusaasira kwa Katonda." 
Romans9:17 Ebyawandiikibwa kyebyava byogera ku Falaawo nti, “Kyennava nkuyimusa, ndyoke njolese amaanyi gange mu ggwe, erinnya lyange liryoke litegeezebwe mu nsi zonna.”" 
Romans9:18 Noolwekyo Katonda asaasira oyo gw’ayagala okusaasira, ate n’akakanyaza omutima gw’oyo gw’ayagala okukakanyaza." 
Romans9:19 Omu akyayinza okumbuuza nti, Lwaki Katonda atunenya, obanga y’atuleetera okukola nga bw’asiima?" 
Romans9:20 Naye ggwe omuntu obuntu, ggwe ani addamu ng’owakanya Katonda? Ekibumbe kiyinza okubuuza eyakibumba nti, “Lwaki wammumba bw’oti?”" 
Romans9:21 Oba omubumbi talina buyinza ku bbumba, okubumbamu ekibya eky’omugaso, oba okubumbamu ekitali kya mugaso?" 
Romans9:22 Katonda yayagala okulaga obusungu bwe, n’amaanyi ge eri abo bonna abaali basaanira okuzikirizibwa, kyokka n’abalaga obugumiikiriza." 
Romans9:23 Ekyo yakikola alyoke amanyise obugagga bw’ekitiibwa kye, eri abo bonna be yeerondera okugabanira awamu ekitiibwa kye." 
Romans9:24 Naffe yatuyita, si Bayudaaya bokka naye n’Abaamawanga." 
Romans9:25 Ne mu Koseya agamba nti, “Abataali bantu bange ndibayita abantu bange, Ne gwe nnali ssaagala, ndimwagala.”" 
Romans9:26 Mu kifo omwo mwe baayitirwa nti, “Temuli bantu bange, mwe baliyitirwa abaana ba Katonda omulamu.”" 
Romans9:27 Isaaya ayogera eri Isirayiri mu ddoboozi ery’omwanguka nti, “Omuwendo gw’abaana ba Isirayiri ne bwe gulyenkana ng’omusenyu gw’ennyanja, ekitundu ekirisigalawo kye kirirokolebwa." 
Romans9:28 Kubanga Mukama alisalawo era alituukiriza mangu ekyo kye yagamba okukola ku nsi.” 
Romans9:29 Era nga Isaaya bwe yayogera edda nti, “Singa Mukama ow’Eggye teyatulekerawo zzadde, twandifuuse nga Sodomu, era twandifaananye nga Ggomola.”" 
Romans9:30 Kale tunaagamba ki? Tugambe nti Abaamawanga abataagobereranga butuukirivu, baafuna obutuukirivu, bwe butuukirivu obuva mu kukkiriza," 
Romans9:31 naye Isirayiri mu kugobereranga amateeka ag’obutuukirivu, teyafuna butuukirivu obwo?" 
Romans9:32 Lwaki? Ekyo baalema okukituukako kubanga tebaagoberera butuukirivu mu kukkiriza wabula mu bikolwa. Beesittala ku jjinja eryo eryesittalwako," 
Romans9:33 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Laba, nteeka mu Sayuuni ejjinja eryesittalwako n’olwazi olulibasuula. Oyo amukkiriza taliswazibwa.”" 
Romans10:1 Abooluganda, kye njagala mu mutima gwange era kye nsabira Abayisirayiri eri Katonda, kwe kulokolebwa." 
Romans10:2 Kubanga nkakasa nga balina obunyiikivu eri Katonda, naye si mu kutegeera." 
Romans10:3 Mu butamanya butuukirivu bwa Katonda, bagezaako okwenoonyeza obutuukirivu, nga bagondera amateeka mu kifo ky’okugondera obutuukirivu bwa Katonda." 
Romans10:4 Kristo atuwa amakulu amajjuvu, buli amukkiriza n’amuwa obutuukirivu." 
Romans10:5 Musa awandiika ku butuukirivu obuva mu mateeka nti, “Omuntu alikola ebintu ebyo aliba mulamu mu byo.”" 
Romans10:6 Naye okukkiriza okuva mu butuukirivu, kugamba nti, “Toyogeranga mu mutima gwo nti, ‘Ani alirinnya mu ggulu?’ (kwe kuggya Kristo mu ggulu)" 
Romans10:7 newaakubadde okugamba nti, ‘Ani alikka emagombe?’ (kwe kuggya Kristo mu bafu.)”" 
Romans10:8 Abo bonna abalina okukkiriza mu Kristo bagamba nti, “Ekigambo kiri kumpi naawe, kiri mu kamwa ko era kiri mu mutima gwo,” kye kigambo eky’okukkiriza kye tubuulira." 
Romans10:9 Bw’oyatula n’akamwa ko nti, Yesu ye Mukama, n’okkiriza n’omutima gwo nga Katonda yamuzuukiza mu bafu, olokoka." 
Romans10:10 Kubanga omuntu akkiriza na mutima gwe n’aweebwa obutuukirivu, era ayatula na kamwa ke n’alokoka." 
Romans10:11 Kubanga Ebyawandiikibwa bigamba nti, “Buli amukkiriza taliswazibwa.”" 
Romans10:12 Tewali njawulo wakati wa Muyudaaya na Muyonaani, kubanga Mukama waabwe y’omu era ayanukula abo bonna abamukoowoola." 
Romans10:13 Buli alikoowoola erinnya lya Mukama alirokoka. 
Romans10:14 Kale balikoowoola batya oyo gwe batakkiririzaamu? Era balikkiriza batya oyo gwe batawulirangako? Era baliwulira batya awatali abuulira? 
Romans10:15 Era balibuulira batya nga tebatumiddwa? Ekyawandiikibwa nga bwe kigamba nti, “Ebigere by’abo abategeeza amawulire amalungi, nga birungi.”" 
Romans10:16 Naye si bonna abaagondera Enjiri. Isaaya agamba nti, “Mukama, waliwo akkirizza obubaka bwaffe?”" 
Romans10:17 Noolwekyo okukkiriza kujja olw’okuwulira ekigambo kya Kristo. 
Romans10:18 Naye mulowooza Abayisirayiri tebaawulira? Weewaawo baawulira. Ebyawandiikibwa bigamba nti, “Eddoboozi lyabwe lyabuna mu nsi zonna, n’ebigambo byabwe byatuuka ku nkomerero z’ensi.”" 
Romans10:19 Abayisirayiri baabitegeera oba tebaabitegeera? Bw’ati Musa bw’addamu ekibuuzo ekyo: “Ndibaleetera okukwatirwa obuggya abatali ggwanga, ne mbasunguwaza olw’eggwanga eritalina kutegeera.”" 
Romans10:20 Ne Isaaya yali muvumu bwe yagamba nti, “Nazuulibwa abo abatannoonya, ne ndabika eri abo abatambuulirizaako.”" 
Romans10:21 Naye eri Isirayiri agamba nti, “Olunaku lwonna nalumala nga ngolodde emikono gyange eri eggwanga ekkakanyavu era abantu abeewaggula.”" 
Romans11:1 Kale ka mbuuze: Katonda yeegoberako ddala abantu be? Kikafuuwe. Kubanga nange ndi Muyisirayiri, era muzzukulu wa Ibulayimu, ow’omu kika kya Benyamini." 
Romans11:2 Katonda tasuulanga bantu be, be yalonda okuva ku lubereberye. Oba temumanyi ekyawandiikibwa ekyogera ku Eriya bwe yeegayirira Katonda nga yeemulugunya olwa Isirayiri?" 
Romans11:3 Yagamba nti, “Mukama, basse bannabbi bo ne bamenyaamenya n’ebyoto byo. Nze nzekka nze nsigaddewo, ate bannoonya okunzita.”" 
Romans11:4 Naye Katonda yamuddamu atya? Yamugamba nti: “Neesigalizzaawo abasajja kasanvu abatafukaamirira Baali.” 
Romans11:5 Era bwe kityo ne mu biro bino waliwo ekitundu ekyasigalawo abaalondebwamu olw’ekisa. 
Romans11:6 Naye obanga lwa kisa, si lwa bikolwa nate, kubanga ekisa kyandibadde tekikyali kisa." 
Romans11:7 Kale tugambe ki? Abayisirayiri baalemwa okufuna kye baali banoonya, wabula be yalondamu be baakifuna, abalala ne bakakanyazibwa, emitima," 
Romans11:8 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Katonda yabawa omwoyo ogw’okubongoota, n’aleetera amaaso gaabwe obutalaba, n’amatu gaabwe obutawulira okutuusa leero.”" 
Romans11:9 Ne Dawudi yagamba nti, “Leka ekijjulo kyabwe kibafuukire omutego, era ekitimba, eky’okubatega era empeera ebasaanira." 
Romans11:10 Amaaso gaabwe ka gabeeko ekifu, baleme okulaba. Era batambule nga bakootakoota emirembe n’emirembe.”" 
Romans11:11 Kale ka mbuuze, kyebaava beesittala balyoke bagwe? Kikafuuwe. Naye olw’okwonoona kwabwe, obulokozi kyebwava bujja eri Abaamawanga, Abayudaaya balyoke bakwatibwe obuggya." 
Romans11:12 Kale obanga okwonoona kwabwe kutegeeza bugagga eri ensi, n’okulemwa kwabwe nga kutegeeza bugagga eri Abaamawanga, okuganyulwa kwabwe tekulisingawo!" 
Romans11:13 Kaakano njogera gye muli Abaamawanga, nga bwe ndi omutume eri Abaamawanga, ngulumiza obuweereza bwange," 
Romans11:14 singa kisoboka nkwase baganda bange obuggya abamu ku bo basobole okulokolebwa. 
Romans11:15 Kubanga obanga okugobebwa kwabwe kwe kutabaganya ensi, okusembezebwa kwabwe kulitegeeza ki, bwe kutaliwa bafu bulamu?" 
Romans11:16 Kale kaakano obanga ekitole ky’eŋŋano ekandiddwa ne kiweebwayo ng’ekibala ekibereberye kitukuvu, n’eŋŋaano yonna ntukuvu; era obanga ekikolo kitukuvu, n’amatabi matukuvu." 
Romans11:17 Naye obanga amatabi agamu gaawogolebwa, ate nga ggwe eyali omuzeyituuni ogw’omu nsiko wasimbibwa ku kikolo kyagwo, n’ogabana ku bugimu bw’ekikolo ky’omuzeyituuni," 
Romans11:18 teweenyumiririzanga ku matabi ago; naye bwe weenyumirizanga, jjukira nga si gwe owaniridde ekikolo, naye ekikolo kye kikuwaniridde." 
Romans11:19 Oyinza okwogera nti, “Amatabi gaawogolwako, ndyoke nsimbibweko.”" 
Romans11:20 Ky’oyogedde kiba kituufu. Weewaawo gaawogolwako lwa butakkiriza, kyokka ggwe onywedde lwa kukkiriza. Teweenyumirizanga, naye otyanga." 
Romans11:21 Kuba obanga Katonda teyasaasira matabi ga buzaaliranwa, nammwe ayinza obutabasaasira." 
Romans11:22 Kale mufumiitirize ku kisa n’obukambwe bwa Katonda. Aba mukambwe eri abo abaagwa, naye n’aba wa kisa eri ggwe, bwe weeyongera okunywerera mu kisa kye, kubanga naawe bw’otonywere oliwogolwako." 
Romans11:23 Era n’abo oluvannyuma bwe balikkiriza, balizzibwako ku nduli kubanga Katonda ayinza okubazaako kuli." 
Romans11:24 Kuba obanga ggwe mu buzaaliranwa bwo gwe eyawogolwa ku muzeyituuni, wazzibwa ku muzeyituuni ogutali gwa buzaaliranwa bo, abo ab’obuzaaliranwa tebalisinga nnyo okuzzibwa ku muzeyituuni gwabwe bo?" 
Romans11:25 Kubanga ssaagala mmwe abooluganda obutamanya kyama kino nga mwelowooza okuba ab’amagezi, ng’abamu ku Bayisirayiri bwe baakakanyaza emitima gyabwe, okutuusa mmwe Abaamawanga, lwe muliyingira." 
Romans11:26 N’oluvannyuma Isirayiri yenna alirokolebwa, ng’Ekyawandiikibwa bwe kigamba nti, “Omulokozi aliva mu Sayuuni, era aliggyawo obutatya Katonda mu bazzukulu ba Yakobo." 
Romans11:27 Era eyo ye ndagaano yange nabo, bwe ndibaggyako ebibi byabwe.”" 
Romans11:28 Mu njiri balabe ku lwammwe, naye mu kulondebwa baagalwa olwa bajjajjaabwe." 
Romans11:29 Kubanga Katonda bw’agabira abantu ebirabo oba bw’abayita, teyejjusa." 
Romans11:30 Kuba nga mmwe edda bwe mwajeemera Katonda, kyokka kaakano nga musaasiddwa olw’obujeemu bw’Abayudaaya," 
Romans11:31 bwe batyo nabo kaakano bajeemu, eri ekyo ekyali okusaasira gye muli, balyoke basaasirwe." 
Romans11:32 Kubanga Katonda yaleka abantu bonna mu bujeemu alyoke abakwatirwe ekisa. 
Romans11:33 Kale nga Katonda wa kitalo, ng’amagezi ge mangi n’okutegeera kwe kungi era n’obugagga bungi; ensala ye ey’emisango nga tekeberekeka, n’amakubo ge tegekkaanyizika." 
Romans11:34 “Kubanga ani ayinza okutegeera okulowooza kwa Mukama? Oba ani ayinza okumuluŋŋamya?” 
Romans11:35 “Oba ani eyali asoose okumuwa ekintu, alyoke amuddizeewo?”" 
Romans11:36 Kubanga byonna biva gy’ali, era biyita mu ye era bidda gy’ali. Ekitiibwa kibe gy’ali emirembe gyonna. Amiina." 
Romans12:1 Noolwekyo abooluganda mbeegayirira olw’okusaasira kwa Katonda, muwengayo emibiri gyammwe nga ssaddaaka ennamu entukuvu esanyusa Katonda, kwe kuweereza kwammwe okw’omwoyo." 
Romans12:2 So temwefaananyirizanga ba mirembe gino, naye mukyusibwe olw’okudda obuggya mu birowoozo byammwe okukakasibwa okusiimibwa kwa Katonda, okusanyusa era okw’amazima." 
Romans12:3 Kubanga njogera olw’ekisa kye naweebwa, eri buli muntu mu mmwe, obuteerowooza okusinga ekyo ky’asaanidde okulowooza, naye okulowoozanga nga yeegendereza, nga Katonda bwe yagabira buli muntu ekigera ky’okukkiriza." 
Romans12:4 Kubanga nga bwe tulina ebitundu ebingi mu mubiri ogumu, ebitundu ebyo byonna bikola emirimu gya njawulo." 
Romans12:5 Noolwekyo nga bwe tuli omubiri ogumu mu Kristo, buli muntu kitundu ku mubiri ogumu ogwo." 
Romans12:6 Tulina ebirabo, ng’ekisa kye tulina bwe kyatuweebwa mu ngeri ey’enjawulo, oba bunnabbi, ng’ekigera ky’okukkiriza bwe kiri," 
Romans12:7 oba buweereza, mu buweereza, oba omu okuyigiriza, mu kuyigiriza;" 
Romans12:8 oba omulala okugumya banne mu kubazzaamu amaanyi, oba omulala mu kugaba, oba omulala, okufuga n’obunyiikivu, n’omulala okulaga ekisa nga musanyufu." 
Romans12:9 Mube n’okwagala okutaliimu bukuusa. Mukyawenga ekibi, munywererenga ku kirungi," 
Romans12:10 nga mwagalana mu kwagala okw’abooluganda, nga muwaŋŋana ekitiibwa," 
Romans12:11 mu kunyiikira so si mu kugayaala. Musanyukirenga mu mwoyo nga muweereza Mukama," 
Romans12:12 nga musanyukira mu kusuubira, nga mugumiikiriza mu kubonaabona era nga munyiikira mu kusaba." 
Romans12:13 Mufengayo ku byetaago by’abantu ba Katonda, era mwanirizenga abagenyi." 
Romans12:14 Musabirenga ababayigganya; mubasabirenga so temubakolimiranga. 
Romans12:15 Musanyukirenga wamu n’abo abasanyuka, era mukaabirenga wamu n’abo abakaaba." 
Romans12:16 Buli muntu abeerenga mu mirembe muntu ne munne, nga temwegulumiza naye nga muba bakkakkamu. Temwekulumbazanga." 
Romans12:17 Temusasulanga kibi olw’ekibi, naye mukolenga birungi byereere eri bonna." 
Romans12:18 Mukolenga kyonna ekisoboka okutabagana n’abantu bonna; 
Romans12:19 abaagalwa, temuwalananga ggwanga, era ekiruyi mukirekere Katonda, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Okuwoolera eggwanga kwange, nze ndisasula,” bw’ayogera Mukama." 
Romans12:20 “Noolwekyo omulabe wo bw’alumwanga enjala, muliisenga; bw’alumwanga ennyonta muwenga ekyokunywa, bw’okola bw’otyo olimukumira amanda g’omuliro ku mutwe gwe.”" 
Romans12:21 Towangulwanga kibi, naye wangulanga ekibi ng’okola obulungi." 
Romans13:1 Buli muntu awulirenga abafuzi, kubanga tewali buyinza butava eri Katonda, era n’abafuzi abaliwo Katonda ye yabalonda." 
Romans13:2 Noolwekyo abawakanya abafuzi, bawakanya buyinza bwa Katonda. Era baba bawakanya kiragiro kye, bwe batyo ne beereetako bokka omusango." 
Romans13:3 Kubanga abafuzi baba tebalwanyisa bikolwa birungi naye ebibi. Oyagala obutakangibwa wa buyinza, kola bulungi osiimibwe," 
Romans13:4 kubanga muweereza wa Katonda ku lw’obulungi bwo. Naye bw’onookolanga ekibi, osaanidde otye kubanga ekitala ky’alina si kya bwereere, kubanga muweereza wa Katonda awoolera eggwanga eri oyo akola ekibi." 
Romans13:5 Noolwekyo kibagwanira okuba abawulize, si lwa busungu bwokka, naye n’olw’okumanya nga kye kituufu." 
Romans13:6 Era kyemuva muwa omusolo kubanga abakozi abo baweereza ba Katonda nga banyiikirira emirimu gyabwe. 
Romans13:7 Abantu bonna basasulenga ebibabanjibwa; musasulenga emisolo eri abo be muteekwa okuwa omusolo, n’ow’empooza mumuwenga empooza; n’oyo ateekwa okutiibwa mumutyenga, n’oyo ateekwa okuweebwa ekitiibwa mumuwenga ekitiibwa." 
Romans13:8 Temubeeranga na bbanja lyonna eri omuntu yenna, wabula okwagalananga; kubanga ayagala muntu munne ng’atuukiriza amateeka." 
Romans13:9 Kubanga amateeka gano nti, “Toyendanga, tottanga, tobbanga, teweegombanga,” n’etteeka eddala, ligattiddwa mu kino nti, “Yagalanga muliraanwa wo nga bwe weeyagala wekka.”" 
Romans13:10 Ayagala muliraanwa we tamukola bubi; noolwekyo okwagala kyekuva kutuukiriza amateeka. 
Romans13:11 Mumanye nga kino kye kiseera, era essaawa etuuse mugolokoke okuva mu tulo, kubanga kaakano obulokozi bwaffe buli kumpi okusinga ne we twakkiririza." 
Romans13:12 Ekiro kiyise, obudde bunaatera okukya, noolwekyo tweyambulemu ebikolwa eby’ekizikiza, twambale ebyokulwanyisa eby’omusana." 
Romans13:13 Tutambulenga ng’ab’omu musana, so si mu binyumu ne mu kutamiira, ne mu bwenzi n’obukaba, ne mu kuyombagana n’obuggya," 
Romans13:14 naye twambale Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo so tetuwanga mubiri bbanga kukola ng’okwegomba kwagwo bwe kuli. 
Romans14:1 Mwanirizenga omunafu mu kukkiriza, nga temumusalira musango." 
Romans14:2 Wabaawo omuntu omu akkiririza mu kulya ebintu byonna, nga so ye omunafu akoma ku nva kwokka." 
Romans14:3 Omuntu asalawo okubaako ky’alya tanyoomanga atakirya, n’oyo atalya kintu alemenga kusalira musango oyo akirya kubanga Katonda yamusembeza." 
Romans14:4 Ggwe ani asalira omusango omuweereza w’omuntu omulala? Mukama we y’amanya oba atuukiriza emirimu gye oba tagituukiriza. Naye aligituukiriza kubanga Mukama we alimusobozesa. 
Romans14:5 Omuntu omu agulumiza olunaku olumu okusinga olulala, naye omulala n’alowooza nti ennaku zonna zenkanankana. Noolwekyo buli muntu anywererenga ku ky’alowooza bwe kiba nga kye kituufu." 
Romans14:6 Akuza olunaku aba alukuza eri Mukama. Oyo alya aba alya ku bwa Mukama, kubanga aba agulumiza Katonda. N’oyo atalya aba talya ku bwa Mukama, era aba agulumiza Katonda." 
Romans14:7 Kubanga tewali n’omu ku ffe abeera omulamu ku bubwe yekka, era tewali n’omu afa ku lulwe." 
Romans14:8 Kubanga bwe tuba abalamu, tuba balamu ku bwa Mukama, oba bwe tufa, tufa ku bwa Mukama. Kale nno bwe tuba abalamu oba bwe tufa, tuli ba Mukama." 
Romans14:9 Kubanga ekyo Kristo kye yafiira ate n’abeera omulamu, alyoke abeere Mukama w’abo abaafa era n’abalamu." 
Romans14:10 Kale ggwe lwaki osalira muganda wo omusango? Oba lwaki onyooma muganda wo? Kubanga ffenna tuliyimirira mu maaso g’entebe ya Katonda, ey’okulamula." 
Romans14:11 Kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, “ ‘Nga bwe ndi omulamu,’ bw’ayogera Mukama, ‘buli vviivi lirinfukaamirira era na buli lulimi lulyatula Katonda.’ ”" 
Romans14:12 Noolwekyo buli omu ku ffe alyennyonnyolako eri Katonda. 
Romans14:13 Noolwekyo tetusaliragananga misango. Tumalirire obuteesittaza waluganda wadde okumutega okugwa mu kibi. 
Romans14:14 Mmanyi era nkakasiza ddala mu Mukama waffe Yesu, nga tewali kya muzizo ku bwakyo, wabula kya muzizo eri oyo akirowooza nga kya muzizo." 
Romans14:15 Kubanga obanga muganda wo anakuwala olw’ekyo ky’olya, oba tokyatambulira mu kwagala; tolyanga kintu kyonna ky’omanyi nga kinaakyamya omuntu oyo Kristo gwe yafiirira." 
Romans14:16 Ekirungi ekiri mu mmwe kireme okuvumibwa. 
Romans14:17 Kubanga obwakabaka bwa Katonda si kulya na kunywa, wabula butuukirivu na mirembe, na ssanyu mu Mwoyo Omutukuvu." 
Romans14:18 Kubanga aweereza Kristo mu ebyo asanyusa nnyo Katonda era asiimibwa abantu. 
Romans14:19 Noolwekyo tunyiikirirenga eby’emirembe, n’eby’okuzimbagana ffekka ne ffekka." 
Romans14:20 Toyonoonanga mulimu gwa Katonda olw’emmere. Ebintu byonna birongoofu, naye ekibi kwe kulya ekyo ekireetera omulala okwesittala." 
Romans14:21 Kirungi obutalya nnyama newaakubadde okunywa wayini newaakubadde ekintu kyonna ekyesittaza muganda wo. 
Romans14:22 Ky’okkiririzaamu mu kulya kikuume nga kya kyama ne Katonda. Alina omukisa ateesalira musango kumusinga mu ekyo ky’alowooza nga kituufu. 
Romans14:23 Naye oyo abuusabuusa bw’alya, omusango gumaze okumusinga, kubanga talya lwa kukkiriza, era na buli ekitava mu kukkiriza kiba kibi." 
Romans15:1 Ffe abanywevu kitugwanidde okwetikkanga obunafu bw’abo abatali banywevu, so si okwesanyusa ffekka." 
Romans15:2 Buli omu ku ffe asanyusenga muliraanwa we mu bulungi olw’okumuzimba mu kukkiriza. 
Romans15:3 Kubanga ne Kristo teyeesanyusa yekka, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Ebivume by’abo abaakuvuma byagwa ku nze.”" 
Romans15:4 Kubanga ebyawandiikibwa byonna edda, byawandiikibwa kutuyigiriza, tulyoke tugumiikirizenga era tuzzibwemu amaanyi, ate tube n’essuubi." 
Romans15:5 Kaakano Katonda w’okugumiikiriza era azaamu amaanyi, abawe okulowoozanga obumu buli omu eri munne mu Kristo Yesu," 
Romans15:6 mu mwoyo gumu n’eddoboozi limu mulyoke mugulumizenga Katonda, Kitaawe wa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
Romans15:7 Noolwekyo mwanirizaganenga, nga Kristo bwe yabaaniriza olw’ekitiibwa kya Katonda." 
Romans15:8 Kubanga njogera nti Kristo yafuuka muweereza w’abakomole olw’amazima ga Katonda alyoke anyweze ebisuubizo bya bajjajjaffe 
Romans15:9 n’Abaamawanga balyoke bagulumize Katonda olw’okusaasira kwe, nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Kyendiva nkutendereza mu Baamawanga, era ne ntendereza erinnya lyo.”" 
Romans15:10 Era n’ayongera n’agamba nti: “Mmwe Abaamawanga musanyukirenga wamu n’abantu be.” 
Romans15:11 Era nate nti, “Abaamawanga mwenna, mutendereze Mukama, era abantu bonna bamutenderezenga.”" 
Romans15:12 Ne Nnabbi Isaaya agamba nate nti, “Walibaawo muzzukulu wa Yese alijja era alisituka okufuga Abaamawanga, era mu ye mwe muliba essuubi lyabwe.”" 
Romans15:13 Kaakano Katonda w’okusuubira, abajjuze essanyu lyonna n’emirembe mu kukkiriza, mulyoke mweyongerenga mu ssuubi ery’amaanyi aga Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Romans15:14 Era matidde baganda bange, nze kennyini, nga nammwe bennyini mujjudde obulungi, nga mujjudde okutegeera kwonna, era nga muyinza okubuuliriragana." 
Romans15:15 Naye mu bitundu ebimu eby’ebbaluwa eno nabawandiikira n’obuvumu nga mbajjukiza olw’ekisa ekyampebwa okuva eri Katonda," 
Romans15:16 kubanga nze ndi muweereza wa Kristo Yesu eri Abaamawanga, nga nkola obuweereza obutukuvu nga mbulira Enjiri ya Katonda, ekiweebwayo ky’Abaamawanga kiryoke kikkirizibwe, nga kitukuzibbwa Mwoyo Mutukuvu." 
Romans15:17 Noolwekyo neenyumiririza mu Kristo olw’omulimu gwa Katonda; 
Romans15:18 kubanga siryaŋŋanga kwogera bintu Kristo by’atakolera mu nze Abaamawanga balyoke babeere abawulize mu kigambo ne mu bikolwa," 
Romans15:19 ne mu maanyi ag’obubonero n’eby’amagero, ne mu maanyi ag’Omwoyo wa Katonda. Bwe ntyo okuva e Yerusaalemi n’okwetooloola okutuuka mu Iruliko, mbulidde Enjiri ya Kristo mu bujjuvu." 
Romans15:20 Nduubirira okubuulira Enjiri mu bifo etayatulwanga linnya lya Kristo, nneme okuzimba ku musingi gw’omuntu omulala," 
Romans15:21 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Abo abatategeezebwanga bimufaako baliraba, n’abo abatawulirangako balitegeera.”" 
Romans15:22 Kyennava nziyizibwanga ennyo okujja gye muli; 
Romans15:23 naye kaakano nga bwe sikyalina kifo mu bitundu by’eno, ate nga maze emyaka mingi nga njagala okujja gye muli, nsubira okujjayo," 
Romans15:24 bwe ndiba nga ndaga mu Esupaniya. Kubanga nsuubira okubalaba nga mpitayo, n’oluvannyuma munnyambe okuva eyo ndyoke ntuukirize ekitundu ekisooka." 
Romans15:25 Naye kaakano ndaga e Yerusaalemi okuweereza abatukuvu. 
Romans15:26 Ab’omu Makedoniya ne mu Akaya baasanyuka okuwaayo ku byabwe eri abatukuvu abaavu ab’omu Yerusaalemi. 
Romans15:27 Baasanyuka era balina ebbanja gye bali, kubanga ng’Abaamawanga bwe baagabana ku bintu eby’omwoyo okuva gye bali, n’Abaamawanga nabo basaanye okubaweereza mu bintu eby’omubiri." 
Romans15:28 Noolwekyo bwe ndimaliriza ekyo ne mbakwasa ekibala ekyo, ndiyitira ewammwe nga ŋŋenda Esupaniya." 
Romans15:29 Era mmanyi nga bwe ndijja gye muli, ndijja n’omukisa gwa Kristo mu bujjuvu." 
Romans15:30 Kaakano mbakuutira abooluganda, mu Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo ne mu kwagala kw’Omwoyo, okufubiranga awamu nange, nga munsabira eri Katonda," 
Romans15:31 mpone abo abajeemu mu Buyudaaya, n’obuweereza bwange busiimibwe abatukuvu mu Yerusaalemi," 
Romans15:32 ndyoke nsobole okujja gye muli olw’okwagala kwa Katonda, okuwummulira awamu nammwe, nga ndi musanyufu." 
Romans15:33 Kale kaakano Katonda ow’emirembe, abeerenga nammwe mwenna. Amiina." 
Romans16:1 Kaakano mbanjulira Foyibe mwannyinaffe, era omuweereza w’ekkanisa ey’omu Kenkereya." 
Romans16:2 Mumwanirize mu Mukama waffe, nga bwe kigwanidde abatukuvu, era muyimirire naye nga mumuyamba mu nsonga yonna gye yeetaaga, kubanga naye yennyini yayamba bangi era nange kennyini." 
Romans16:3 Mundabire Pulisikira ne Akula, bwe tukola omulimu mu Kristo Yesu," 
Romans16:4 abeewaayo wakiri okutemwako emitwe olw’obulamu bwange, era si beebaza bokka wabula n’Ekkanisa z’Abamawanga zonna." 
Romans16:5 Mutuuse okulamusa kwange eri abo bonna abakuŋŋaana ng’ekkanisa mu maka gaabwe. Mundabire mukwano gwange omwagalwa Epayineeto, kye kibala eky’olubereberye eky’omu Asiya eri Kristo." 
Romans16:6 Mundabire Maliyamu eyabakolera ennyo. 
Romans16:7 Mundabire Anduloniiko ne Yuniya ab’ekika kyange, abaasibibwa awamu nange mu kkomera, era bassibwamu nnyo ekitiibwa abatume era be bansooka okubeera mu Kristo." 
Romans16:8 Mundabire Ampuliyaato omwagalwa wange mu Mukama waffe. 
Romans16:9 Mundabire Ulubano, mukozi munnaffe mu Kristo, n’omwagalwa waffe Sutaku." 
Romans16:10 Mundabire Apere, asiimibwa mu Kristo. Mundabire n’ab’omu nnyumba ya Alisutobulo." 
Romans16:11 Mundabire Kerodiyoni muganda wange. Mundabire ab’omu nnyumba ya Nalukiso. 
Romans16:12 Mundabire Terufayina ne Terufoosa, abaakola ennyo omulimu gwa Mukama waffe. Mundabire Perusi omwagalwa eyakola ennyo omulimu mu Mukama waffe." 
Romans16:13 Mundabire Luufo Mukama gwe yalonda, era ne nnyina ali nga mmange." 
Romans16:14 Mundabire Asunkulito ne Felegoni, ne Kerume, ne Patuloba, ne Keruma era n’abooluganda abali nabo." 
Romans16:15 Mundabire Firologo ne Yuliya, ne Nerewu ne mwannyina, ne Olumpa n’abatukuvu bonna abali awamu nabo." 
Romans16:16 Mulamusagane n’okunywegera okutukuvu. Ekkanisa zonna eza Kristo, zibalamusizza." 
Romans16:17 Noolwekyo mbakuutira abooluganda mwegenderezenga abo abaleeta enjawukana, n’eby’esittaza ebikontana n’okuyigiriza kwe mwayiga, era mubakubenga amabega." 
Romans16:18 Kubanga abantu ng’abo tebaweereza Mukama waffe Yesu, wabula embuto zaabwe. Bakozesa ebigambo ebirungi eby’okuwaanawaana nga balimbalimba emitima gy’abanafu." 
Romans16:19 Kubanga amawulire ag’okuwulira kwammwe gaabuna mu bantu bonna, kyenvudde mbasanyukira. Naye njagala mubenga bagezi mu kukola obulungi, era abalongoofu abeewala ekibi." 
Romans16:20 Kaakano Katonda ow’emirembe ajja kubetentera Setaani wansi w’ebigere byammwe, mangu. Ekisa kya Mukama waffe Yesu kibeerenga nammwe." 
Romans16:21 Timoseewo mukozi munnange, ne Lukiyo ne Yasooni wamu ne Sosipateri, baganda bange, babatumidde." 
Romans16:22 Nange Terutiyo awandiika ebbaluwa eno, mbatumidde mu Mukama waffe." 
Romans16:23 Gaayo ansuza, n’ekkanisa yonna babalamusizza. Mundabire Erasuto omuwanika w’ekibuga, ne Kwaluto muganda we." 
Romans16:24 Ekisa kya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo kibeerenga nammwe mwenna. Amiina. 
Romans16:25 Kaakano eri oyo ayinza okubanyweza ng’enjiri yange n’okubuulira mu Kristo Yesu bwe biri, ng’ekyama ky’okubikkulirwa eby’ebiro eby’emirembe n’emirembe ebyasirikirwa, bwe kiri," 
Romans16:26 kaakano nga bannabbi bwe baayogerera mu byawandiikibwa, ng’ekiragiro kya Katonda ataggwaawo bwe kiri, olw’okugonda mu kukkiriza eri Abaamawanga bonna abaamanyibwa," 
Romans16:27 Katonda omu yekka ow’amagezi, agulumizibwenga ku bwa Yesu Kristo, emirembe n’emirembe. Amiina." 
1Corinthians1:1 Nze Pawulo eyayitibwa okuba omutume wa Yesu Kristo olw’okwagala kwa Katonda, ne Sossene owooluganda," 
1Corinthians1:2 tuwandiikira ekkanisa ya Katonda eri mu Kkolinso n’eri abo abaatukuzibwa mu Kristo Yesu, abayitibwa abatukuvu, n’abo bonna abakoowoola erinnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo mu buli kifo, owaabwe era owaffe;" 
1Corinthians1:3 ekisa kibe ku mmwe n’emirembe egiva eri Katonda Kitaffe ne Mukama waffe Kristo. 
1Corinthians1:4 Nneebaza Katonda wange bulijjo ku lwammwe, olw’ekisa kya Katonda ekyabaweebwa mu Kristo Yesu," 
1Corinthians1:5 mu ye mwagaggawazibwa mu buli kintu, ne mu kwogera kwonna, era ne mu kutegeera kwonna," 
1Corinthians1:6 era ng’obujulirwa bwa Kristo bwe bwakakasibwa mu mmwe," 
1Corinthians1:7 muleme kubaako kye mwetaaga mu kirabo kyonna, nga mulindirira okubikkulirwa kwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
1Corinthians1:8 Era oyo y’alibanyweza ku nkomerero, nga temuliiko kya kunenyezebwa ku lunaku lwa Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo." 
1Corinthians1:9 Katonda mwesigwa, oyo eyabayita mu kussekimu okw’Omwana we Yesu Kristo Mukama waffe." 
1Corinthians1:10 Kaakano mbeegayirira abooluganda, mu Iinnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo, mukkiriziganyenga mwekka na mwekka muleme okwawukananga. Naye mube n’omutima gumu n’endowooza emu." 
1Corinthians1:11 Abooluganda, ab’ewa Kuloowe bannyinnyonnyola nti mu mmwe mulimu ennyombo." 
1Corinthians1:12 Kye ŋŋamba kye kino nti buli omu ku mmwe agamba nti nze ndi wa Pawulo, nze ndi wa Apolo, nze ndi wa Keefa, nze ndi wa Kristo." 
1Corinthians1:13 Kale Kristo ayawuliddwamu? Pawulo yakomererwa ku musaalaba ku lwammwe? Oba mwabatizibwa mu linnya lya Pawulo? 
1Corinthians1:14 Neebaza Katonda kubanga nze sibatizanga muntu n’omu ku mmwe okuggyako Kulisupo ne Gaayo. 
1Corinthians1:15 Noolwekyo si kulwa nga wabaawo agamba nti mwabatizibwa mu linnya lyange. 
1Corinthians1:16 Naye nzijukira nga nabatiza ab’omu nnyumba ya Suteefana, naye sirowooza nga nabatiza omuntu omulala yenna." 
1Corinthians1:17 Kristo teyantuma kubatiza wabula yantuma kubuulira Njiri. Era sigibuulira mu magezi ga bigambo bugambo, si kulwa ng’omusaalaba gwa Kristo gumalibwamu amaanyi gaagwo." 
1Corinthians1:18 Ekigambo ky’omusaalaba kya busirusiru eri abo abazikirira naye eri ffe abaalokolebwa ge maanyi ga Katonda. 
1Corinthians1:19 Kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, “Ndizikiriza amagezi g’abagezi, ne nzigyawo okumanya kw’abayivu.”" 
1Corinthians1:20 Kale omugezi aluwa? N’omuwandiisi aluwa? Omuwakanyi w’omulembe guno aluwa? Katonda teyafuula amagezi ag’ensi eno okuba obusirusiru? 
1Corinthians1:21 Kubanga Katonda, mu magezi ge, yalaba ng’ensi teyinza kumumanya ng’eyita mu kutegeera kwayo. Katonda kyeyava asiima okuyita mu busirusiru bw’okubuulira Enjiri okulokola abakkiriza." 
1Corinthians1:22 Kubanga Abayudaaya banoonya bubonero, Abayonaani bo ne banoonya amagezi," 
1Corinthians1:23 naye ffe tubuulira Kristo eyakomererwa. Eri Abayudaaya nkonge, eri Abaamawanga busirusiru," 
1Corinthians1:24 naye eri abaayitibwa, Abayudaaya n’Abamawanga, Kristo ge maanyi ga Katonda, era amagezi ga Katonda." 
1Corinthians1:25 Kubanga obusirusiru bwa Katonda businga amagezi g’abantu, n’obunafu bwa Katonda businga abantu amaanyi." 
1Corinthians1:26 Kubanga mulabe okuyitibwa kwammwe abooluganda, bangi ku mmwe temwali bagezi mu mubiri, era nga bangi temuli b’amaanyi, era nga bangi temwazaalibwa nga muli ba kitiibwa." 
1Corinthians1:27 Naye Katonda yalonda ebisirusiru eby’ensi, akwase abagezi ensonyi; era Katonda yalonda ebinafu eby’ensi, akwase ab’amaanyi ensonyi," 
1Corinthians1:28 era n’alonda abakopi ab’ensi n’abo abanyoomebwa; era n’ebitaliiwo alyoke aggyewo ebiriwo," 
1Corinthians1:29 waleme kubaawo muntu n’omu eyeenyumiriza mu maaso ga Katonda. 
1Corinthians1:30 Kyokka ku bw’oyo muli mu Kristo Yesu, eyafuuka amagezi gye tuli okuva eri Katonda, bwe butuukirivu, n’okutukuzibwa, n’okununulibwa," 
1Corinthians1:31 nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti eyeenyumiriza yeenyumirizenga mu Mukama waffe. 
1Corinthians2:1 Bwe najja gye muli abooluganda sajja gye muli na bumanyirivu mu kwogera wadde amagezi nga nangirira ekyama kya Katonda gye muli. 
1Corinthians2:2 Kubanga nasalawo obutamanya kintu kyonna mu mmwe wabula Yesu Kristo oyo eyakomererwa. 
1Corinthians2:3 Bwe nnali nammwe nnali munafu, nga ntya era nga nkankana nnyo." 
1Corinthians2:4 Era okubuulira kwange n’okuyigiriza tebyali mu bigambo bya magezi ebisendasenda, naye byali mu maanyi ne Mwoyo Mutukuvu," 
1Corinthians2:5 okukkiriza kwammwe kuleme kuba kw’amagezi ga bantu wabula kwesigame ku maanyi ga Katonda. 
1Corinthians2:6 Naye eri abo abakulu mu mwoyo, twogera eby’amagezi agatali ga mu mulembe guno, wadde ag’abafuzi ab’omu mulembe guno abaggwaawo." 
1Corinthians2:7 Wabula twogera eby’amagezi ga Katonda, agatamanyiddwa era agakisibwa, Katonda bye yateekateeka edda n’edda olw’ekitiibwa kyaffe;" 
1Corinthians2:8 tewali n’omu ku bafuzi ab’omulembe guno abaagategeera, kubanga singa baamanya tebandikomeredde Mukama ow’ekitiibwa." 
1Corinthians2:9 Naye nga bwe kyawandiikibwa nti, “Eriiso bye litalabangako, n’okutu bye kutawulirangako, n’omutima gw’omuntu kye gutalowoozangako Katonda bye yategekera abo abamwagala.”" 
1Corinthians2:10 Naye ffe Katonda yabitubikkulira mu Mwoyo, kubanga Omwoyo anoonyereza ebintu byonna, n’eby’omunda ennyo ebya Katonda." 
1Corinthians2:11 Kubanga muntu ki ategeera eby’omuntu omulala okuggyako omwoyo w’omuntu oyo ali mu ffe? Noolwekyo n’ebintu bya Katonda tewali abimanyi okuggyako Omwoyo wa Katonda. 
1Corinthians2:12 Era kaakano ffe tetwafuna mwoyo wa ku nsi, wabula Omwoyo eyava eri Katonda, tulyoke tumanye ebintu Katonda bye yatuwa obuwa," 
1Corinthians2:13 era ne mu bigambo bye twogera so si mu kuyigirizibwa okw’amagezi g’abantu, naye mu bigambo Omwoyo by’ayigiriza, ebintu eby’Omwoyo nga bikwatagana n’eby’Omwoyo." 
1Corinthians2:14 Omuntu obuntu tasobola kufuna bintu bya Mwoyo wa Katonda, kubanga busirusiru gy’ali, era tasobola kubimanya, kubanga bikeberwa Mwoyo." 
1Corinthians2:15 Naye omuntu ow’Omwoyo akebera ebintu byonna, naye tewali n’omu amukebera." 
1Corinthians2:16 “Kubanga ani eyali ategedde okulowooza kwa Mukama, era ani alimulagira? Kyokka ffe tulina endowooza ya Kristo.”" 
1Corinthians3:1 Nange abooluganda ssaasobola kwogera nammwe ng’ab’omwoyo, naye nayogera nammwe ng’ab’omubiri era ng’abaana abawere mu Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:2 Nabanywesa mata so si mmere enkalubo, kubanga mwali temunnagisobola. Naye era ne kaakano temunnagisobola," 
1Corinthians3:3 kubanga mukyafugibwa mubiri. Naye obanga mukyalimu obuggya n’ennyombo, temufugibwa mubiri era temutambula ng’abalina empisa z’abantu obuntu?" 
1Corinthians3:4 Kubanga omuntu yenna bw’agamba nti, “Nze ndi wa Pawulo,” n’omulala nti, “Nze ndi wa Apolo,” olwo temuba ng’abantu obuntu?" 
1Corinthians3:5 Kale Apolo ye ani? Ne Pawulo ye ani? Baweereza buweereza ababakkirizisa, nga Mukama bwe yawa buli omu." 
1Corinthians3:6 Nze nasiga, Apolo n’afukirira, kyokka Katonda ye yakuza." 
1Corinthians3:7 Kale bwe kityo oyo asiga n’oyo afukirira si be bakulu wabula Katonda akuza. 
1Corinthians3:8 Oyo asiga kaakano n’oyo afukirira bali bumu, era buli omu aliweebwa empeera ye okusinziira ku mulimu gw’aliba akoze." 
1Corinthians3:9 Kubanga ffe tuli bakozi abakolera awamu ne Katonda, ate mmwe muli nnimiro ya Katonda, muli nnyumba ya Katonda." 
1Corinthians3:10 Okusinziira ku kisa kya Katonda ekya mpeebwa, ng’omuzimbi ow’amagezi, nazimba omusingi, kaakano omulala aguzimbako. Naye buli aguzimbako yeegenderezenga bw’aguzimbako." 
1Corinthians3:11 Kubanga tewali n’omu ayinza kuteekawo musingi mulala okuggyako ogwo ogwateekebwawo, ye Yesu Kristo." 
1Corinthians3:12 Naye Omuntu bw’aguzimbisaako ezaabu, effeeza, n’amayinja ag’omuwendo n’emiti, n’essubi, oba ebisasiro;" 
1Corinthians3:13 omulimu gwa buli omu gulirabibwa, kubanga omuliro guligwolesa ku lunaku olwo, era omuliro ogwo gwe gulyoreka omulimu gwa buli omu nga bwe guli." 
1Corinthians3:14 Omuntu kye yazimba ku musingi ogwo bwe kirisigalawo, aliweebwa empeera." 
1Corinthians3:15 Naye omulimu gw’omuntu yenna bwe gulyokebwa omuliro, alifiirwa, kyokka ye yennyini alirokolebwa, naye ng’ayita mu muliro." 
1Corinthians3:16 Temumanyi nti mmwe muli yeekaalu ya Katonda era nga Omwoyo wa Katonda abeera mu mmwe? 
1Corinthians3:17 Omuntu yenna azikiriza Yeekaalu ya Katonda, Katonda alizikiriza omuntu oyo; kubanga Yeekaalu ya Katonda ntukuvu, ye mmwe." 
1Corinthians3:18 Omuntu yenna teyeerimbalimbanga; omuntu yenna bwe yeerowoozanga okuba omugezi mu mmwe mu mirembe gino afuukenga musirusiru alyoke abeere omugezi. 
1Corinthians3:19 Kubanga amagezi ag’ensi eno, bwe busirusiru eri Katonda. Kubanga kyawandiikibwa nti, “Akwatira abagezi mu nkwe zaabwe.”" 
1Corinthians3:20 Era kyawandiikibwa nti, “Mukama amanyi ng’ebirowoozo by’abagezi temuli nsa.”" 
1Corinthians3:21 Noolwekyo waleme kubaawo muntu n’omu yeenyumiririza mu bantu, kubanga byonna byammwe," 
1Corinthians3:22 oba Pawulo oba Apolo oba Keefa oba nsi, oba bulamu, oba kufa, oba bintu ebya kaakano, oba ebijja, byonna byammwe," 
1Corinthians3:23 nammwe muli ba Kristo, ne Kristo wa Katonda." 
1Corinthians4:1 Omuntu asaanidde atulabe ng’abaweereza ba Kristo era abawanika b’ebyama bya Katonda. 
1Corinthians4:2 Ate era omuwanika kimugwanira okuba omuntu omwesigwa. 
1Corinthians4:3 Naye gye ndi ekyo kintu kitono nnyo mmwe okunsalira omusango oba omuntu yenna ku lunaku olw’okusalirako omusango; nange sseesalira musango. 
1Corinthians4:4 Kubanga nze seemanyiiko nsonga yonna, wabula ekyo tekimpeesa butuukirivu, naye ansalira omusango ye Mukama waffe." 
1Corinthians4:5 Noolwekyo temusalanga musango ekiseera nga tekinnatuuka okutuusa Mukama waffe lw’alijja, alimulisa ebyakwekebwa eby’ekizikiza, n’ayolesa n’ebigendererwa by’omutima, buli muntu n’alyoka atendebwa Katonda." 
1Corinthians4:6 Kaakano abooluganda ebintu ebyo mbigeredde ku nze ne ku Apolo ku lwammwe, mulyoke muyigire ku ffe obutasukkanga ku byawandiikibwa, omuntu omu alemenga okwegulumiza ng’anyooma omulala." 
1Corinthians4:7 Kubanga ani akwawula? Era mulina kye mutaaweebwa? Kale obanga ddala mwaweebwa, kiki ate ekibenyumirizisa ng’abataakifuna?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Mwakkuta dda n’okugaggawala ne mugaggawala, era ne mufuuka bakabaka awatali ffe; naye nandyagadde mufuuke bakabaka, naffe tulyoke tufuukire wamu bakabaka nammwe." 
1Corinthians4:9 Kubanga ndowooza nga ffe abatume, Katonda yatuteeka ku nkomerero ng’abasibe abalindirira okuttibwa, kubanga twafuulibwa ekyerolerwa eri ensi, eri bamalayika n’eri abantu." 
1Corinthians4:10 Tuli basirusiru ku bwa Kristo, naye mmwe muli bagezi mu Kristo; Ffe tuli banafu naye mmwe muli ba maanyi! Mmwe muli ba kitiibwa naye ffe tunyoomebwa." 
1Corinthians4:11 Era ne mu kiseera kino tulumwa enjala n’ennyonta nga tetulina na kyakwambala, tukubibwa era tubungeeta bubungeesi." 
1Corinthians4:12 Tutegana nga tukola emirimu n’emikono gyaffe; tusabira emikisa abo abatukolimira; bwe tuyigganyizibwa tugumiikiriza; 
1Corinthians4:13 abo abatuvuma tubaddamu ne gonjebwa. Era n’okutuusa kaakano tuli ng’ebisooto mu bigere era tuli ng’ebisaaniiko. 
1Corinthians4:14 Siwandiika bintu bino lwa kubaswaza naye lwa kubabuulirira ng’abaana bange abaagalwa. 
1Corinthians4:15 Kubanga newaakubadde mulina abalala nkumi na nkumi ababayigiriza ebya Kristo, naye mujjukirenga nga mulina bakitammwe batono. Kubanga nze mbazaala mu Kristo olw’enjiri." 
1Corinthians4:16 Noolwekyo mbongeramu amaanyi mulabire ku nze. 
1Corinthians4:17 Kyennava mbatumira Timoseewo omwana wange omwesigwa era omwagalwa mu Mukama waffe, anaabajjukizanga ebyo bye ngoberera mu Kristo Yesu nga bwe njigiriza wonna wonna mu buli Kkanisa." 
1Corinthians4:18 Naye waliwo abamu mu mmwe abeekuluntaza nga balowooza nti sigenda kujja gye muli. 
1Corinthians4:19 Naye nzija mangu, Mukama bw’anaasiima ndyoke mmanye amaanyi g’abo abeekuluntaza so si mu bigambo obugambo." 
1Corinthians4:20 Kubanga obwakabaka bwa Katonda tebuli mu kwogera bwogezi, wabula mu maanyi." 
1Corinthians4:21 Kiruwa kye mwagala? Nzije n’omuggo, oba nzije na kwagala n’omwoyo ogw’obuwombeefu?" 
1Corinthians5:1 Twategeezebwa nga mu mmwe mulimu obwenzi, ate obwenzi obutali na mu baamawanga, kubanga omuntu atwala muka kitaawe n’amufuula mukazi we." 
1Corinthians5:2 Mwekuluntazizza mu kifo ky’okwewombeeka. Oyo akola ekikolwa ng’ekyo eky’okwekuluntaza, tasaanye kuggyibwamu mu mmwe?" 
1Corinthians5:3 Nze newaakubadde nga siri eyo nammwe mu mubiri, naye nga bwe ndi nammwe mu mwoyo, omuntu eyakola ekyo mmaze okumusalira omusango okumusinga." 
1Corinthians5:4 Mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu, mukuŋŋaane nga nange ndi nammwe mu mwoyo n’amaanyi ga Mukama waffe Yesu nga gali nammwe." 
1Corinthians5:5 Omuntu ng’oyo mumuweeyo eri Setaani omubiri gwe guzikirizibwe, omwoyo gwe gulyoke gulokolebwe ku lunaku lwa Mukama waffe." 
1Corinthians5:6 Okwenyumiriza kwammwe si kulungi. Temumanyi ng’ekizimbulukusa ekitono kizimbulukusa ekitole kyonna? 
1Corinthians5:7 Muggyeemu ekizimbulukusa eky’edda, mulyoke mubeere ekitole ekiggya, nga temuliimu kizimbulukusa; kubanga Kristo ye ndiga eyaweebwayo ng’ekiweebwayo eky’Okuyitako ku lwaffe." 
1Corinthians5:8 Noolwekyo tulye embaga si na kizimbulukusa eky’edda, newaakubadde ekizimbulukusa eky’ettima n’ekibi, naye tugirye n’omugaati ogutaliimu kizimbulukusa nga gulimu obulongoofu n’amazima." 
1Corinthians5:9 Mbawandiikira nga mbalabula obutegattanga na benzi," 
1Corinthians5:10 so si okwewala abenzi ab’ensi eno, oba aboomululu, oba abakumpanya, oba abasinza bakatonda abalala, kubanga kyandibagwanidde mmwe okuva mu nsi." 
1Corinthians5:11 Naye kaakano mbawandiikira nga mbategeeza nti mwewale omuntu yenna ayitibwa owooluganda ng’ate mwenzi, owoomululu, asinza bakatonda abalala, oba omuvumi, oba omutamiivu oba omukumpanya. Ab’engeri eyo n’okulya temulyanga nabo." 
1Corinthians5:12 Kale nze nfaayo ki okusalira ab’ebweru omusango? Lwaki sisalira abo abali mu mmwe? 
1Corinthians5:13 Naye ab’ebweru Katonda ye abasalira. Omubi oyo ali mu mmwe mumuggyeemu. 
1Corinthians6:1 Omuntu yenna mu mmwe bw’aba n’ensonga ne munne, agitwala eri abatali batuukirivu oba eri abatukuvu?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Oba temumanyi ng’abatukuvu be balisalira ensi omusango? Kale obanga mmwe mulisalira ensi omusango, temusobola kusala nsonga ntono eziri mu mmwe?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Temumanyi nga ffe tulisalira bamalayika omusango, okwo nga totaddeeko bintu bya mu bulamu buno?" 
1Corinthians6:4 Kale bwe muba n’ensonga lwaki muzitwala mu abo abanyoomebwa ekkanisa ne mubalonda okuba abalamuzi? 
1Corinthians6:5 Njagala kubakwasa nsonyi; ddala mu mmwe temuli muntu n’omu alina magezi asobola okusala ensonga wakati w’abooluganda? 
1Corinthians6:6 Naye owooluganda ayinza okuwoza n’owooluganda mu maaso g’abatali bakkiriza? 
1Corinthians6:7 N’okuwozaŋŋana mwekka na mwekka kiraga nti muli mu kabi. Lwaki obutamala gakolwanga bubi? Lwaki obutamala galyazaamaanyizibwanga? 
1Corinthians6:8 Naye musobya baganda bammwe ne mubalyazaamaanya. 
1Corinthians6:9 Oba temumanyi ng’abatali batuukirivu tebaliyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda? Temulimbibwanga. Abakaba, newaakubadde abasinza bakatonda abalala, newaakubadde abenzi, newaakubadde abasajja abeeyisa ng’abakazi, newaakubadde abalya ebisiyaga," 
1Corinthians6:10 newaakubadde ababbi, newaakubadde aboomululu, newaakubadde abatamiivu, newaakubadde abajerega, newaakubadde abanyazi tebaliyingira mu bwakabaka bwa Katonda." 
1Corinthians6:11 Era abamu ku mmwe mwali nga bo, naye ebibi byammwe byanaazibwa era mwatukuzibwa era mwaweebwa obutuukirivu mu linnya lya Mukama waffe Yesu Kristo n’Omwoyo wa Katonda waffe." 
1Corinthians6:12 Ebintu byonna nzikirizibwa okubikola, mu mateeka, naye byonna tebinsanira. Ebintu byonna nzikirizibwa okubikola naye sigenda kufugibwa kintu na kimu." 
1Corinthians6:13 Ebyokulya bya lubuto, n’olubuto lwa byakulya. Naye byombi Katonda alibizikiriza. Omubiri si gwa bwenzi, naye gwa Mukama." 
1Corinthians6:14 Era Katonda eyazuukiza Mukama waffe alituzuukiza olw’amaanyi ge. 
1Corinthians6:15 Temumanyi ng’emibiri gyammwe bitundu bya Kristo? Ate nzirire ebitundu bya Kristo mbifuule eby’omwenzi? Kikafuuwe. 
1Corinthians6:16 Oba temumanyi nti omuntu yenna eyeegatta n’omwenzi, emibiri gyammwe gifuuka gumu? Kubanga kigambibwa nti, “Bombi balifuuka omubiri gumu.”" 
1Corinthians6:17 Naye eyeegatta ne Mukama waffe bafuuka omu mu mwoyo. 
1Corinthians6:18 Mudduke obwenzi. Buli kibi omuntu ky’akola kiba ku mubiri, naye ayenda akola ekibi ku mubiri gwe ye yennyini." 
1Corinthians6:19 Oba temumanyi ng’omubiri gwammwe ye Yeekaalu ya Mwoyo Mutukuvu Katonda gwe yabawa, era n’emibiri gyammwe si gyammwe ku bwammwe?" 
1Corinthians6:20 Kubanga mwagulibwa na muwendo, noolwekyo emibiri gyammwe gigulumizenga Katonda." 
1Corinthians7:1 Kaakano ku bintu bye mwampandiikira, kirungi omusajja obutakwatanga ku mukazi." 
1Corinthians7:2 Naye olw’ebikolwa eby’obwenzi, buli musajja abeerenga ne mukazi we; era na buli mukazi abeerenga ne bba." 
1Corinthians7:3 Omusajja ateekwa okutuukirizanga eby’obufumbo byonna eri mukazi we era n’omukazi bw’atyo. 
1Corinthians7:4 Kubanga omukazi bw’afumbirwa aba takyafuga mubiri gwe ye wabula bba, era n’omusajja bw’atyo aba takyafuga mubiri gwe ye wabula mukazi we y’aba agulinako obuyinza." 
1Corinthians7:5 Buli omu alemenga okumma munne wabula nga mulagaanye ekiseera mulyoke mufune ebbanga ery’okusabiramu n’oluvannyuma muddiŋŋanenga, Setaani aleme okubasuula olw’obuteefuga bwammwe." 
1Corinthians7:6 Naye kino nkyogera mu ngeri ya kukkiriziganya so si mu ngeri ya kuwa kiragiro. 
1Corinthians7:7 Nandyagadde buli omu abeere nga nze; naye buli muntu alina ekirabo ekikye ku bubwe ekiva eri Katonda, omu mu ngeri emu n’omulala mu ngeri endala." 
1Corinthians7:8 Naye njogera eri abo abatannawasa ne bannamwandu; kirungi okusigala nga bwe bali, era nga nze bwe ndi." 
1Corinthians7:9 Naye bwe baba tebasobola kwefuga bafumbirwe, oba bawase, kubanga okufumbiriganwa kisinga okwakiriranga okw’okwegomba." 
1Corinthians7:10 Naye abafumbo mbawa etteeka eriva eri Mukama waffe: omukazi tanobanga ku bba. 
1Corinthians7:11 Singa baawukana, omukazi ateekwa kubeerera awo, oba si ekyo addeyo ewa bba basonyiwagane; n’omusajja tagobanga mukazi we." 
1Corinthians7:12 Abalala njogera gye bali kubanga si tteeka eriva eri Mukama waffe, naye mbagamba nti owooluganda bw’abeera n’omukazi atali mukkiriza ng’ayagala okubeera naye, tamugobanga." 
1Corinthians7:13 Era omukazi omukkiriza alina bba atali mukkiriza naye ng’amwagala, tamuvangako." 
1Corinthians7:14 Kubanga omusajja atali mukkiriza ayinza okufuulibwa omukkiriza ng’ayambibwa mukyala we omukkiriza, oba omukyala atali mukkiriza ayinza okufuulibwa omukkiriza ng’ayambibwa bba omukkiriza. Kubanga bwe kitaba ekyo abaana bammwe banditwaliddwa ng’abatali balongoofu naye ku lw’ekyo abaana bammwe baba balongoofu." 
1Corinthians7:15 Kyokka oyo atali mukkiriza bw’ayagala okwawukana, baawukane; mu nsonga eyo omusajja omukkiriza oba omukyala taasibwenga mu ekyo, kubanga Katonda ayagala abaana be okubeera n’eddembe." 
1Corinthians7:16 Ggwe omukazi omukkiriza omanyi otya ng’olirokola balo? Oba ggwe omusajja omukkiriza omanyi otya ng’olirokola mukazi wo? 
1Corinthians7:17 Buli omu abeere mu bulamu Mukama bwe yamuwa, era Katonda mwe yamuyitira mw’abatambuliranga. Ekyo ky’ekiragiro kye mpa ekkanisa zonna." 
1Corinthians7:18 Eyayitibwa ng’amaze okukomolebwa aleme kugamba nti ssinga teyakomolebwa, n’oyo eyakkiriza nga si mukomole aleme kufaayo ku kukomolebwa." 
1Corinthians7:19 Kubanga okukomolebwa si kintu era obutakomolebwa si kintu, wabula ekikulu kwe kukwata amateeka ga Katonda." 
1Corinthians7:20 Buli omu abeerenga mu kuyitibwa Katonda kwe yamuyitiramu. 
1Corinthians7:21 Oba nga wayitibwa ng’oli muddu ekyo kireme okuba ekikulu; naye bw’oba ng’ofunye omukisa okufuuka ow’eddembe, gukozese." 
1Corinthians7:22 Kubanga eyayitibwa Mukama nga muddu, Mukama yamufuula wa ddembe, n’oyo eyali ow’eddembe yafuuka muddu wa Kristo." 
1Corinthians7:23 Mwagulibwa na muwendo noolwekyo temufuukanga baddu ba bantu. 
1Corinthians7:24 Kale abooluganda, buli kifo kyonna omuntu yenna ky’alimu, mwe yayitirwa abeere mu ekyo." 
1Corinthians7:25 Naye ku ky’abatafumbirwanga wadde okuwasa, sirina kiragiro kiva eri Mukama wabula Mukama mu kusaasira kwe yampa amagezi agayinza okwesigibwa kwe nnaasinziira okubawa ekirowoozo kyange." 
1Corinthians7:26 Kino nkirowooza nga kirungi, olw’embeera eya kaakano, nga kirungi omuntu okusigala nga bw’ali." 
1Corinthians7:27 Obanga oli mufumbo tosaanye kwawukana na munno. Naye obanga wayawukana n’omukazi, tonoonya wa kuwasa." 
1Corinthians7:28 Kyokka omusajja bw’awasa aba tayonoonye, era n’embeerera bw’afumbirwa naye aba tayonoonye. Wabula abafumbo, obufumbo bujja kubaleetera emitawaana gye nandiyagadde mwewale." 
1Corinthians7:29 Naye kino kye mbategeeza abooluganda nti ekiseera kiyimpawadde. Noolwekyo abo abalina abakazi babe ng’abatabalina. 
1Corinthians7:30 N’abo abakaaba babe ng’abatakaaba, n’abo abasanyuka babe ng’abatasanyuka. N’abo abagula ebintu babe ng’abatalina kintu kye bayita kyabwe." 
1Corinthians7:31 Era n’abo abakozesa eby’oku nsi kuno bireme okubamalamu ennyo, kubanga ensi eya kaakano eggwaawo." 
1Corinthians7:32 Naye kye mbagaliza mmwe bwe buteraliikirira. Omusajja atali mufumbo yeemalira ku bya Mukama, engeri gy’asanyusa Mukama." 
1Corinthians7:33 Naye omufumbo yeeraliikirira bya nsi, nga bw’anaasanyusa mukazi we;" 
1Corinthians7:34 aba yeesazeemu, ng’atta aga n’aga. N’omukazi atali mufumbo n’embeerera bafaayo ku bintu bya Mukama, babeerenga batukuvu mu mubiri ne mu mwoyo. Naye omukazi omufumbo yeeraliikirira bya mu nsi, engeri gy’anaasanyusaamu bba." 
1Corinthians7:35 Bino mbyogera olw’okubagasa, so si kubaziyiza kuwasa na kufumbirwa. Kubanga njagala musobole okuweereza Mukama nga tewali birala bibaziyiza okweweerayo ddala." 
1Corinthians7:36 Omusajja bw’alowooza nti aba teyeeyisizza bulungi eri omuwala oyo gw’ayogereza bw’atamuwasa, bwe bafumbiriganwa, aba tayonoonye." 
1Corinthians7:37 Naye oyo asobola okwefuga ng’alina omutima omunywevu, n’asalawo awatali kuwalirizibwa nti omuwala tajja kumuwasa, aba asazeewo bulungi." 
1Corinthians7:38 Kale oyo awasa omuwala gw’ayogereza aba akoze bulungi, naye oyo atamuwasa y’aba asinze okukola obulungi." 
1Corinthians7:39 Omukazi omufumbo abeera kitundu kya bba, bba bw’aba akyali mulamu. Naye bba bw’afa olwo ayinza okufumbirwa omusajja omulala gw’ayagala, kyokka omusajja oyo ateekwa kuba mu Mukama waffe yekka." 
1Corinthians7:40 Naye nze ndowooza nti alina omukisa oyo singa taddayo kufumbirwa. Era ndowooza nga nange nnina Omwoyo wa Katonda. 
1Corinthians8:1 Kale ku nsonga ey’okuwaayo ssaddaaka eri bakatonda abalala: tumanyi nti byonna tubitegeera. Naye okwerowooza nti tumanyi kuleeta okwekuluntaza naye okwagala kuzimba. 
1Corinthians8:2 Omuntu alowooza nti amanyi, aba alaga nga bw’atannamanya era nga bwe kimugwanira okumanya." 
1Corinthians8:3 Naye oyo ayagala Katonda amanyibwa Katonda. 
1Corinthians8:4 Kale ku nsonga eno ey’okulya ebiweereddwayo eri bakatonda abalala, tumanyi bakatonda abalala bwe bataliimu nsa. Era tumanyi nga waliwo Katonda omu yekka, tewali mulala." 
1Corinthians8:5 Waliwo abayitibwa bakatonda abali mu ggulu ne ku nsi newaakubadde nga waliwo bakatonda bangi n’abaami bangi. 
1Corinthians8:6 Kyokka ffe tumanyi nga waliwo Katonda omu yekka, ye Kitaffe, era ye yatonda ebintu byonna, era naffe tuli mu ye, era nga waliwo Mukama omu ye Yesu Kristo, ebintu byonna mwe byayita okutondebwa, era mu ye mwe tuyita okufuna obulamu." 
1Corinthians8:7 Kyokka kino abamu tebakimanyi. Obulamu bwabwe bwonna bwamanyiira okulowooza nti bakatonda abalala balamu ddala, era nga n’ebiweebwayo ebyo biweebwayo eri bakatonda ddala. Kaakano bwe balya emmere eyo eyonoona emyoyo gyabwe, kuba minafu, beeyonoona bokka." 
1Corinthians8:8 Naye emmere si yeetuleetera okusiimibwa Katonda. Bwe tutagirya tewaba kye tusubwa, era ne bwe tugirya terina kye twongerako." 
1Corinthians8:9 Kyokka mwegendereze bwe muba mukozesa eddembe lyabwe eryo, si kulwa nga mwesittaza abo abanafu mu kukkiriza." 
1Corinthians8:10 Kubanga ggwe amanyi, singa omunafu mu kukkiriza akulaba ng’olya mu ssabo lya bakatonda abalala, ekyo tekirimugumya okulya ebiweereddwayo eri bakatonda abalala." 
1Corinthians8:11 Kale owooluganda oyo omunafu, Kristo gwe yafiirira, azikirizibwe olw’okumanya kwo!" 
1Corinthians8:12 Noolwekyo bwe mukola ekibi ku booluganda muba muleeta ekiwundu ku mwoyo gwabwe kubanga banafu, era muba mukola kibi eri Kristo." 
1Corinthians8:13 Kale obanga kye ndya kyesittaza muganda wange, siryenga nnyama emirembe gyonna, nnemenga okwesittaza muganda wange." 
1Corinthians9:1 Ssiri wa ddembe? Ssiri mutume? Ssaalaba Yesu Mukama waffe? Si mmwe bibala by’omulimu gwange mu Mukama waffe? 
1Corinthians9:2 Obanga ssiri mutume eri abalala, naye ndi mutume eri mmwe, kubanga mmwe kabonero k’obutume bwange mu Mukama waffe." 
1Corinthians9:3 Ekyo ky’eky’okuwoza kyange eri abo abambulirizaako. 
1Corinthians9:4 Sirina buyinza kulya na kunywa? 
1Corinthians9:5 Singa nnewasiza omukazi, siyinza kutambula naye mu ŋŋendo zange ng’abatume abalala ne Keefa, ne baganda ba Mukama waffe bwe bakola?" 
1Corinthians9:6 Oba Balunabba nange, ffe ffekka ffe tusaana okwekolera?" 
1Corinthians9:7 Muserikale ki ali mu magye nga yeesasula empeera? Muntu ki eyalima ennimiro y’emizabbibu naye n’aziyizibwa okulya ku bibala byayo? Oba ani alunda ekisibo n’atanywa ku mata gaamu? 
1Corinthians9:8 Ebyo mbyogera ku bwange ng’omuntu, etteeka nalyo si bwe ligamba?" 
1Corinthians9:9 Kubanga kyawandiikibwa mu mateeka ga Musa nti, “Tosibanga mumwa gwa nte ewuula eŋŋaano,” Mulowooza Katonda afa ku bya nte zokka," 
1Corinthians9:10 oba kino akyogera ku lwaffe? Kubanga kino kyawandiikibwa ku lwaffe, oyo alima mu kusuubira alime, n’oyo awuula asuubire okufuna ku bibala." 
1Corinthians9:11 Obanga ffe twabasigamu eby’omwoyo, tekiriba kya kitalo bwe tulikungula ebyammwe eby’omubiri?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Kale obanga abalala balina obuyinza ku mmwe, ffe tetusaanidde nnyo n’okusingawo? Kyokka ffe tetwabakaka kubituwa. Naye tugumiikiriza byonna, tuleme okuziyiza Enjiri ya Kristo." 
1Corinthians9:13 Temumanyi ng’abo abakola mu Yeekaalu baliisibwa bya Yeekaalu, era nga n’abo abaweereza ku kyoto bagabana bya ku kyoto?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Mu ngeri y’emu Mukama waffe yalonda abo ababuulira Enjiri baliisibwenga olw’Enjiri. 
1Corinthians9:15 Kyokka nze siriiko na kimu ku ebyo kye nkozesezzaako. Era ssawandiika bino ndyoke binkolerwe kubanga waakiri nze okufa okusinga okwenyumiriza kwange bwe kutaabeemu nsa. 
1Corinthians9:16 Kubanga bwe mbuulira Enjiri sisobola kwenyumiriza, kubanga mpalirizibwa okugibuulira. Era ziba zinsanze bwe sigibuulira." 
1Corinthians9:17 Kubanga bwe mbuulira Enjiri olw’okweyagalira, mbeera n’empeera, naye ne bwe mba nga ssaagala, nkikola lwa kubanga nakwasibwa omulimu ogwo." 
1Corinthians9:18 Kale empeera yange y’eruwa? Empeera yange kwe kubuulira Enjiri nga sisasulwa era nga sibasaba nsasulwe olw’omulimu ogwo nga bwe nsaanidde. 
1Corinthians9:19 Kubanga newaakubadde nga ndi wa ddembe eri abantu bonna, nfuuka omuddu wa bonna olw’okweyagalira, ndyoke ndeete bangi eri Kristo." 
1Corinthians9:20 Eri Abayudaaya nafuuka ng’Omuyudaaya ndyoke nsobole okubaleeta eri Kristo. N’eri abo abafugibwa amateeka nafuuka ng’afugibwa amateeka, newaakubadde nze nga ssifugibwa mateeka, ndyoke mbaleete eri Kristo." 
1Corinthians9:21 Eri abo abatalina mateeka ga Katonda, nafuuka ng’atafugibwa mateeka, newaakubadde nga ssaaleka mateeka ga Katanda, naye nga ndi mu mateeka ga Kristo, n’abo abatalina mateeka ndyoke mbaleete eri Kristo." 
1Corinthians9:22 Mu banafu nafuuka ng’omunafu ndyoke mbaleete eri Kristo. Eri abantu bonna nfuuse byonna, mu ngeri yonna ndyoke mbeeko beentusa ku kulokolebwa." 
1Corinthians9:23 Byonna mbikola olw’enjiri, era nange ndyoke nfunire wamu nabo ebiva mu Njiri eyo." 
1Corinthians9:24 Temumanyi nga mu mpaka ez’okudduka abo bonna abazeetabamu badduka, naye awangula ekirabo abeera omu? Kale nammwe muddukenga bwe mutyo nga mufubirira okuwangula ekirabo." 
1Corinthians9:25 Buli muzanyi eyeetaba mu mpaka ateekwa okufuna okutendekebwa okw’amaanyi nga yeefuga mu bintu byonna. Ekyo bakikola balyoke bawangule engule eyonooneka. Naye ffe tulifuna engule eteyonooneka. 
1Corinthians9:26 Noolwekyo nziruka nga nnina kye ŋŋenderera. Sirwana ng’omukubi w’ebikonde amala gawujja n’akuba ebbanga. 
1Corinthians9:27 Naye mbonereza omubiri gwange ne ngufuula omuddu wange, si kulwa nga mbuulira abalala Enjiri, ate nze nzennyini ne sisiimibwa." 
1Corinthians10:1 Abooluganda, musaana mutegeere nga bajjajjaffe bonna baakulemberwa ekire, era bonna ne bayita mu nnyanja," 
1Corinthians10:2 bwe batyo bonna ne bakulemberwa Musa ne babatizibwa mu kire ne mu nnyanja. 
1Corinthians10:3 Bonna baalyanga emmere y’emu ey’omwoyo," 
1Corinthians10:4 era bonna baanywanga ekyokunywa kye kimu eky’omwoyo, kubanga bonna baanywanga mu lwazi olw’omwoyo olwabagobereranga era olwazi olwo yali Kristo." 
1Corinthians10:5 Naye era abasinga obungi Katonda teyabasiima, bwe batyo ne bazikirizibwa mu ddungu." 
1Corinthians10:6 Ebintu bino ebyabatuukako bitulabula obuteegomba bibi nga bo bwe baakola. 
1Corinthians10:7 Temusinzanga bakatonda balala, ng’abamu ku bo bwe baali, ng’Ekyawandiikibwa bwe kigamba nti, “Abantu baatuula okulya n’okunywa ne basituka ne bakola effujjo.”" 
1Corinthians10:8 Tetusaana kubeera benzi ng’abamu ku bo bwe baali, abantu emitwalo ebiri mu enkumi ssatu ku bo ne bafa mu lunaku lumu." 
1Corinthians10:9 Era tetusaana kukema Kristo ng’abamu ku bo bwe baakola, emisota ne gibazikiriza." 
1Corinthians10:10 Era temwemulugunyanga ng’abamu ku bo bwe baakola, ne battibwa omuzikiriza." 
1Corinthians10:11 Ebyo byonna byabatuukako ng’ekyokulabirako gye tuli, era byawandiikibwa olw’okutulabula ffe abaliwo abatuukiddwako enkomerero." 
1Corinthians10:12 Kale alowooza ng’ayimiridde, yeekuumenga aleme okugwa." 
1Corinthians10:13 Tewali kukemebwa kubatuukako okutali kwa bantu; kyokka Katonda mwesigwa, kubanga taabalekenga kutuukibwako kukemebwa kwe mutayinza kugumira, naye anaabasobozesanga okubigumira, n’abalaga n’ekkubo ery’okubiwangula." 
1Corinthians10:14 Noolwekyo, mikwano gyange, muddukenga okusinza bakatonda abalala." 
1Corinthians10:15 Muli bantu abategeera. Kale, mulabe obanga kye njogera kye kikyo." 
1Corinthians10:16 Ekikompe eky’omukisa, kye tusabira omukisa, si kwe kussekimu okw’omusaayi gwa Kristo? Omugaati gwe tumenya, si kwe kussekimu okw’omubiri gwa Kristo?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Kubanga ffe bangi, ffenna tulya ku mugaati gumu, ekiraga nga bwe tuli omubiri ogumu." 
1Corinthians10:18 Mulabe Isirayiri ow’omubiri, abalya ssaddaaka tebassa kimu na Kyoto?" 
1Corinthians10:19 Kale kiki kye ngezaako okutegeeza? Mulowooza ŋŋamba nti ebyokulya ebiweebwayo eri bakatonda abalala birimu amakulu? Oba nti bakatonda abalala balina omugaso? 
1Corinthians10:20 Nedda. Kye ŋŋamba kye kino nti abo abawaayo ssaddaaka eri bakatonda abalala bawa eri baddayimooni so si eri Katonda. Saagala mwegatte wamu ne baddayimooni mussekimu nabo. 
1Corinthians10:21 Temuyinza kunywa ku kikompe kya Mukama ate ne munywa ne ku kikompe kya baddayimooni. Era temuyinza kuliira ku mmeeza ya Mukama ate ne ku ya baddayimooni. 
1Corinthians10:22 Oba Mukama tetumukwasa buggya? Tumusinza amaanyi? 
1Corinthians10:23 Byonna bikkirizibwa, naye si byonna ebirimu omugaso. Byonna bikkirizibwa naye si byonna ebizimba." 
1Corinthians10:24 Omuntu yenna alemenga okwefaako yekka, naye afengayo ne ku bya munne." 
1Corinthians10:25 Mwegulire ennyama eya buli ngeri gye batunda mu katale mulye, awatali kusooka kwebuuza olw’omwoyo gwammwe." 
1Corinthians10:26 Kubanga ensi ya Mukama n’okujjula kwayo. 
1Corinthians10:27 Singa omu ku batali bakkiriza abayita ku kijjulo, ne mwagala okugenda, kale mulyenga kyonna kye banaabagabulanga nga temuliiko kye mubuuzizza olw’obulungi bw’omwoyo gwammwe." 
1Corinthians10:28 Kyokka omuntu yenna bw’abategeezanga nti, “Kino kyaweereddwayo eri bakatonda abalala,” temukiryanga olw’oyo abategeezezza n’olw’obulungi bw’omwoyo gwammwe," 
1Corinthians10:29 bwe njogera bwe ntyo, njogera ku mwoyo gwe so si ogw’oli omulala. Kubanga lwaki eddembe lyange lisalirwa omusango omwoyo gw’omulala?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Bwe ndya nga neebazizza, lwaki nnenyezebwa olw’ekyo kye ndya nga neebazizza?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Kubanga buli kye mukola, oba kulya oba kunywa, mukikole nga mugenderera kugulumiza Katonda." 
1Corinthians10:32 Temukolanga ekyo ekineesittaza Abayudaaya oba Abayonaani wadde ab’ekkanisa ya Katonda. 
1Corinthians10:33 Nange bwe ntyo ngezaako okusanyusa abantu bonna mu byonna bye nkola, nga sinoonya byange, wabula nga nfa ku bulungi bw’abalala balyoke balokolebwe." 
1Corinthians11:1 Mundabireko nga nange bwe ndabira ku Kristo. 
1Corinthians11:2 Mbatenda nnyo Olw’okunzijjukiza mu bintu byonna era n’olw’okunyweza ebyo bye nabayigiriza. 
1Corinthians11:3 Kyokka njagala mutegeere nti Kristo ye mutwe gwa buli muntu, n’omusajja gwe mutwe gwa mukazi we. Era Katonda ye mutwe gwa Kristo." 
1Corinthians11:4 Noolwekyo omusajja yenna bw’asaba oba bw’ayogera eby’obunnabbi nga taggyeko kibikka ku mutwe gwe, aba aswaza omutwe gwe." 
1Corinthians11:5 N’omukazi bw’asaba oba n’ayogera eby’obunnabbi nga tabisse mutwe gwe aba tawadde bba kitiibwa kubanga kyekimu n’oyo amwereddwako enviiri. 
1Corinthians11:6 Obanga omukazi tayagala kubikka ku mutwe gwe, kale enviiri ze azisalengako. Naye obanga omukazi kimuswaza enviiri ze okuzisalako oba okuzimwako, kale ateekwa omutwe gwe okugubikkangako." 
1Corinthians11:7 Omusajja tasaana kubikka ku mutwe gwe, kubanga ye kye kifaananyi n’ekitiibwa kya Katonda; naye omukazi ye ky’ekitiibwa ky’omusajja." 
1Corinthians11:8 Kubanga omusajja teyatondebwa ng’aggibwa mu mukazi, wabula omukazi ow’olubereberye ye yaggyibwa mu musajja." 
1Corinthians11:9 Era omusajja teyatondebwa lwa mukazi, wabula omukazi ye yatondebwa olw’omusajja." 
1Corinthians11:10 Kale olw’ensonga eyo, omukazi kimusaanira okubikkanga ku mutwe gwe, okulaga nti afugibwa era ne bamalayika bakirabe." 
1Corinthians11:11 Kyokka mu Mukama waffe, omukazi n’omusajja, buli omu yeetaaga munne." 
1Corinthians11:12 Kuba, newaakubadde ng’omukazi ava mu musajja, naye buli musajja azaalibwa mukazi; kyokka byonna biva eri Katonda." 
1Corinthians11:13 Kale nammwe bennyini mwebuuze obanga kisaana omukazi okusaba Katonda nga tabisse ku mutwe. 
1Corinthians11:14 Obuzaaliranwa tebubalaga ng’omusajja bw’aba n’enviiri empanvu tekimuweesa kitiibwa," 
1Corinthians11:15 ate ng’omukazi ye zimuweesa kitiibwa? Kubanga yaweebwa enviiri empanvu okumubikkako.
